tumor_list: 炎性肌纤维母细胞性肺肿瘤

snvindel.gene_function: MUTYH基因属于抑癌基因。编码蛋白是介导碱基切除修复的DNA糖基化酶，可以修复由于氧化损伤导致的鸟嘌呤与腺嘌呤错配的DNA损伤，防止碱基GC转化为TA（PMID: 23507534, PMID: 1495996, PMID: 17581577）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 310th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Glutamine to Histidine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.3135(1570/5008), 0.2967(28865/97294), 0.2601(377531/1451368), 0.2696(41017/152134), 0.4569(56071/122724) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=41767) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 32 times of amino acid change at the MUTYH protein position 310, of which the mutant Q310H is recorded 30 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.3135(1570/5008), 0.2967(28865/97294), 0.29(67377/232316), 0.2562(8021/31308), 0.4571(49642/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; the COSMIC database records 32 times of amino acid change at the MUTYH protein position 310, of which the mutant Q310H is recorded 30 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.3135（1570/5008）、0.2967（28865/97294）、0.2601（377531/1451368）、0.2696（41017/152134）、0.4569（56071/122724）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=41767）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录32次MUTYH蛋白第310位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型H记录30次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第310位氨基酸由谷氨酰胺突变为组氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: MUTYH, mutY DNA glycosylase, encodes for an enzyme that is part of the base excision pathway, which is responsible for excising an adenine that was inserted into the DNA to pair with the oxidation base lesion, 8-Oxoguanine (PMID: 21235684). Germline MUTYH mutations have been linked to an increased risk for colorectal cancer development (PMID: 29147111), and have been associated with an elevated risk for breast cancer (PMID: 21952991).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.4798（2403/5008）、0.538（65302/121382）、0.5507（805012/1461790）、0.4911（74697/152102）、0.7025（86252/122778）；COSMIC数据库记录11次RNASEL蛋白第541位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型E记录11次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: RNASEL基因编码干扰素调控的2-5A系统的一个组成部分，在干扰素的抗病毒和抗增殖作用中发挥作用。RNASEL基因的突变与前列腺癌的易感性有关，是遗传性前列腺癌1（HPC1）等位基因的候选基因。

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.4798(2403/5008), 0.538(65302/121382), 0.5507(805012/1461790), 0.4911(74697/152102), 0.7025(86252/122778) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the ClinVar database has no record about this variant. The COSMIC database records 11 times of amino acid change at the RNASEL protein position 541, of which the mutant D541E is recorded 11 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: This gene encodes a component of the interferon-regulated 2-5A system that functions in the antiviral and antiproliferative roles of interferons. Mutations in this gene have been associated with predisposition to prostate cancer and this gene is a candidate for the hereditary prostate cancer 1 (HPC1) allele.

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.8137（4075/5008）、0.7138（86635/121374）、0.7177（180276/251202）、0.6838（21410/31310）、0.9879（76507/77444）；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: GEN1，Flap内切酶GEN homolog 1，是一种结构特异性内切酶，能够在有丝分裂和减数分裂的双链DNA修复事件中处理Holliday连接体（PMID: 28327556）。在乳腺癌中已经发现蛋白截断的GEN1体细胞变异，但对BRCA1/2阴性的家族性乳腺癌易感性没有明显的贡献（PMID: 20512659）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 92nd amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Serine to Threonine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.8137(4075/5008), 0.7138(86635/121374), 0.664(968998/1459374), 0.6979(106116/152042), 0.9877(121317/122830) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=1169875) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 11 times of amino acid change at the GEN1 protein position 92, of which the mutant S92T is recorded 11 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: GEN1, Flap endonuclease GEN homolog 1, is a structure-specific endonuclease capable of processing Holliday junctions during double-stranded DNA repair events within mitosis and meiosis (PMID: 28327556). Somatic truncating GEN1 variants have been identified in breast cancers, but do not contribute significantly to BRCA1/2-negative familial breast cancer susceptibility (PMID: 20512659).

snvindel.gene_function_en: GEN1, Flap endonuclease GEN homolog 1, is a structure-specific endonuclease capable of processing Holliday junctions during double-stranded DNA repair events within mitosis and meiosis (PMID: 28327556). Somatic truncating GEN1 variants have been identified in breast cancers, but do not contribute significantly to BRCA1/2-negative familial breast cancer susceptibility (PMID: 20512659).

snvindel.gene_function_en: ALK, anaplastic lymphoma kinase, is a receptor in the insulin receptor superfamily and is a key regulator of neuronal development (PMID: 21502284) and also promotes cell proliferation through activation of MAPK and PI3K signaling pathways (PMID: 27573755). Alk activating mutations, rearrangements, and fusions have been identified in various cancers (PMID: 22649787), including EML4-ALK in non-small cell lung cancer (PMID: 30108712, PMID: 30194140), and a number of mutations confer resistance in the context of Alk fusions (PMID: 25749034, PMID: 21948233).

snvindel.gene_function_en: EPCAM, epithelial cell adhesion molecule, is a glycoprotein that mediates cell-cell adhesion and regulates cell proliferation and differentiation (PMID: 23618806). Germline deletion of EPCAM is associated with Lynch syndrome and overexpression of EPCAM has been associated with poor prognosis in a variety of cancers (PMID: 23891921, PMID: 23618806).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg数据库EAS人群等位基因频率分别为0.0001764（7/39678）、0.001154（6/5198）；COSMIC数据库记录2次MSH2蛋白第839位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型H839R记录2次。研究利用嘌呤类似物6-硫鸟嘌呤(6-TG)对细胞进行选择，取6-TG处理前后的变异频率的log2数值作为LoF score， 该变异的LoF socre为-6.03723096596845（<0），认为不影响基因功能（PMID: 33357406）。基于该变异的HCI致病性先验概率认为该变异为neutral。
snvindel.gene_function: MSH2基因属于抑癌基因，其编码蛋白是错配修复（MMR）机制的核心组成之一。MSH2蛋白能分别与MSH6蛋白、MSH3蛋白形成异二聚体，构成MutS-α与MutS-β两种错配修复复合物（PMID: 7973733, PMID: 8252616）。这两种复合物能够识别DNA复制过程中产生的错配碱基对，与之结合形成DNA-MutS复合物定位损伤位点，再通过信号招募错配修复下游其他修复因子切除错误的核苷酸，最终完成修复。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 839th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Histidine to Arginine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.0001764(7/39678), 0.001154(6/5198) in the EAS population of the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=90990) is Conflicting classifications of pathogenicity (Uncertain significance, benign, likely benign) in germline classification (review status: one star). The LoF score of this variant is -6.03723096596845 (<0), derived from the log2-transformed variant frequency before and after 6-thioguanine (6-TG) treatment for cell selection, indicating that the variant does not impair gene function (PMID: 33357406). Based on HCI prior probability for pathogenicity, the variant is considered neural.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.0001764(7/39678), 0.001154(6/5198) in the EAS population of the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records twice of amino acid change at the MSH2 protein position 839, of which the mutant H839R is recorded twice. The LoF score of this variant is -6.03723096596845 (<0), derived from the log2-transformed variant frequency before and after 6-thioguanine (6-TG) treatment for cell selection, indicating that the variant does not impair gene function (PMID: 33357406). Based on HCI prior probability for pathogenicity, the variant is considered neural.

snvindel.gene_function_en: MSH2, mutS homolog 2, is a tumor suppressor (PMID: 30562755) that functions as part of the DNA mismatch repair system (PMID: 9024626, PMID: 18157157) and is associated with microsatellite instability (MSI) (PMID: 30121009) and genomic stability (PMID: 31747945). Mutations in MSH2 are associated with susceptibility to colon cancer and endometrial cancer (PMID: 23255516), and germline MSH2 mutations are associated with Lynch (Hereditary Nonpolyposis Colorectal Cancer) syndrome (HNPCC1) (PMID: 15528792).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.3662（1834/5008）、0.3783（45875/121256）、0.3739（93956/251276）、0.384（12025/31318）、0.3596（27839/77426）；CKB数据库报道为no effect - predicted，COSMIC数据库记录7次BARD1蛋白第507位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型M记录7次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: BARD1基因属于抑癌基因，编码蛋白是一种衔接蛋白，与BRCA1蛋白（PMID: 11573085）复合时，可作为E3连接酶发挥作用。BARD1-BRCA1复合物参与多种细胞过程，包括DNA修复、基因表达、复制叉维护和染色质调节的各个阶段（PMID: 27239795）。BARD1蛋白与BRCA1蛋白相互作用，结合新复制DNA上的DNA损伤，并将泛素分子添加到组蛋白H2A上的赖氨酸残基（PMID: 30804502）；BARD1-BRCA1复合物介导DNA损伤的切除，驱逐拮抗性修复蛋白53BP1，并将几种DNA反应蛋白募集到受损部位，包括RAD51蛋白（PMID: 27239795）。

snvindel.gene_function_en: BARD1, BRCA1 associated RING domain 1, forms a heterodimer with Brca1, which functions as an E3 ubiquitin ligase and mediator of DNA repair through homology-directed repair (HDR) (PMID: 8944023, PMID: 30925164) and centrosome regulation (PMID: 29858377). Germline mutations in BARD1 are associated with increased susceptibility to breast and ovarian cancers (PMID: 21344236), somatic mutations are highest in colon and endometrial cancers (PMID: 27283171) and BARD1 has also been implicated in neuroblastoma (PMID: 32047556).

snvindel.gene_function: BARD1基因属于抑癌基因，编码蛋白是一种衔接蛋白，与BRCA1蛋白（PMID: 11573085）复合时，可作为E3连接酶发挥作用。BARD1-BRCA1复合物参与多种细胞过程，包括DNA修复、基因表达、复制叉维护和染色质调节的各个阶段（PMID: 27239795）。BARD1蛋白与BRCA1蛋白相互作用，结合新复制DNA上的DNA损伤，并将泛素分子添加到组蛋白H2A上的赖氨酸残基（PMID: 30804502）；BARD1-BRCA1复合物介导DNA损伤的切除，驱逐拮抗性修复蛋白53BP1，并将几种DNA反应蛋白募集到受损部位，包括RAD51蛋白（PMID: 27239795）。

evi_sum.evi_interpretation: FANCD2基因的双等位基因致病性或疑似致病性胚系变异（纯合或复合杂合）与范可尼贫血（常染色体隐性遗传）明确相关（ClinGen）。范可尼贫血表型包括骨髓衰竭、急性髓系白血病、骨髓增生异常综合征，以及其他表型及临床特征：身材矮小、皮肤色素沉着(皮肤色素沉着或色素沉着斑)、骨骼异常(拇指、手臂)、多种其他先天性异常、头/颈/外阴/阴道鳞状细胞癌、肝脏肿瘤、染色体脆性增加（NCCN Myelodysplastic Syndromes Version 2.2025）。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation_en: Biallelic pathogenic or likely pathogenic germline variants (homozygous or compound heterozygous) in the FANCD2 gene are definitively associated with Fanconi anemia (autosomal recessive inheritance) (ClinGen). Clinical features are consistent with other FA subtypes: bone marrow failure, acute myeloid leukemia, myelodysplastic syndrome, short stature, pigmentary anomalies, skeletal abnormalities, congenital malformations, squamous cell carcinoma of the head/neck/vulva/vagina, liver tumors, and chromosomal fragility (NCCN Myelodysplastic Syndromes, Version 2.2025).

snvindel.gene_function: XPC（XPC 复合物亚基，DNA 损伤识别和修复因子）是一种蛋白质编码基因。与XPC相关的疾病包括色素性皮肤病-C组。其相关途径包括蛋白质代谢和转录偶联核苷酸切除修复（TC-NER）。在缺乏DNA修复的情况下，XPC复合物还充当转录辅激活剂：XPC与DNA结合转录因子 E2F1 在特定启动子上相互作用，招募KAT2A和组蛋白乙酰转移酶复合物（HAT）（PMID: 29973595, PMID: 31527837）。KAT2A 的招募会特异性地促进组蛋白变体H2A.Z.1/H2A.Z的乙酰化，但不会促进H2A.Z.2/H2A.V的乙酰化，从而促进靶基因的表达（PMID: 31527837）。

snvindel.gene_function_en: XPC (XPC Complex Subunit, DNA Damage Recognition And Repair Factor) is a Protein Coding gene. Diseases associated with XPC include Xeroderma Pigmentosum, Complementation Group C and Xeroderma Pigmentosum, Variant Type. Among its related pathways are Metabolism of proteins and Transcription-Coupled Nucleotide Excision Repair (TC-NER). In absence of DNA repair, the XPC complex also acts as a transcription coactivator: XPC interacts with the DNA-binding transcription factor E2F1 at a subset of promoters to recruit KAT2A and histone acetyltransferase complexes (HAT) (PubMed:29973595, PubMed:31527837). KAT2A recruitment specifically promotes acetylation of histone variant H2A.Z.1/H2A.Z, but not H2A.Z.2/H2A.V, thereby promoting expression of target genes (PMID: 31527837).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.233（1167/5008）、0.2378（28649/120500）、0.2469（360862/1461616）、0.2153（32687/151848）、0.3364（41257/122640）；COSMIC数据库记录87次XPC蛋白第499位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型A499V记录86次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: XPC（XPC 复合物亚基，DNA 损伤识别和修复因子）是一种蛋白质编码基因。与XPC相关的疾病包括色素性皮肤病-C组。其相关途径包括蛋白质代谢和转录偶联核苷酸切除修复（TC-NER）。在缺乏DNA修复的情况下，XPC复合物还充当转录辅激活剂：XPC与DNA结合转录因子 E2F1 在特定启动子上相互作用，招募KAT2A和组蛋白乙酰转移酶复合物（HAT）（PMID: 29973595, PMID: 31527837）。KAT2A 的招募会特异性地促进组蛋白变体H2A.Z.1/H2A.Z的乙酰化，但不会促进H2A.Z.2/H2A.V的乙酰化，从而促进靶基因的表达（PMID: 31527837）。

The COSMIC database records 87 times of amino acid change at the XPC protein position 499, of which the mutant A499V is recorded 86 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Diseases associated with XPC include Xeroderma Pigmentosum, Complementation Group C and Xeroderma Pigmentosum, Variant Type. Among its related pathways are Metabolism of proteins and Transcription-Coupled Nucleotide Excision Repair (TC-NER). In absence of DNA repair, the XPC complex also acts as a transcription coactivator: XPC interacts with the DNA-binding transcription factor E2F1 at a subset of promoters to recruit KAT2A and histone acetyltransferase complexes (HAT) (PubMed:29973595, PubMed:31527837). KAT2A recruitment specifically promotes acetylation of histone variant H2A.Z.1/H2A.Z, but not H2A.Z.2/H2A.V, thereby promoting expression of target genes (PMID: 31527837).

snvindel.gene_function: FAM175A基因（又名ABRAXAS1基因）编码一种DNA修复蛋白ABRAXAS1，ABRAXAS1通过直接与BRCA1结合，调节用于DNA损伤检查点调控和DNA损伤修复的DNA双链断裂处BRCA1蛋白募集过程。ABRAXAS1-BRCA1复合物在肿瘤抑制中起重要作用。在多种人类癌症中，包括子宫内膜癌、结肠癌、肺癌、肝癌、肾癌和白血病中观察到FAM175A（ABRAXAS1）基因拷贝丢失和体细胞突变，其中在子宫内膜癌的突变率最高（2.5%）（PMID: 25066119）。研究发现一个新型的FAM175A（ABRAXAS1）胚系突变会损害BRCA1依赖性DNA修复功能，并导致家族性乳腺癌易感性的升高（PMID: 22357538）。

The COSMIC database records 11 times of amino acid change at the ABRAXAS1 protein position 348, of which the mutant A348T is recorded 11 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: ABRAXAS1 (FAM175A), abraxas 1, BRCA1 A complex subunit, is a BRCA1-binding protein that plays a role in DNA repair and regulation of the G2/M cell cycle phase checkpoint (PMID: 17525340, PMID: 29497033). ABRAXAS1 variants have been identified in several breast cancer pedigrees (PMID: 22357538) and contribute to a small proportion of unexplained hereditary breast cancer cases (PMID: 27270457).

snvindel.gene_function: MSH3基因属于抑癌基因，编码蛋白质MutS同源物3（MSH3），是细菌MutS蛋白的人类同源物，在DNA的错配修复（MMR）途径中起作用。MSH3与MSH2结合形成异二聚体MutS-β，对于识别和修复错配的碱基对非常重要，形成DNA-MutS复合物，向MMR机制的其他组件发出信号以切除异常的核苷酸（PMID: 9679053）。MSH3的缺失或功能缺失突变可导致MMR缺陷，与MSH6的缺失共同导致突变率的增加和肿瘤发生的增加（PMID: 10706084）。

The COSMIC database records 56 times of amino acid change at the MSH3 protein position 949, of which the mutant Q949R is recorded 55 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: MSH3, mutS homolog 3, encodes for one of the DNA mismatch repair proteins, which forms a stable heterodimer with MSH2 in order to recognize and repair mismatched DNA (PMID: 8942985). Somatic MSH3 mutations have been identified in colon, lung, and breast cancers, and oral squamous cell carcinoma while MSH3 polymorphisms, which may be associated with increased risk, have been observed in ovarian and prostate cancers, and non-small cell lung carcinoma (PMID: 25966119).

snvindel.gene_function_en: MSH3, mutS homolog 3, encodes for one of the DNA mismatch repair proteins, which forms a stable heterodimer with MSH2 in order to recognize and repair mismatched DNA (PMID: 8942985). Somatic MSH3 mutations have been identified in colon, lung, and breast cancers, and oral squamous cell carcinoma while MSH3 polymorphisms, which may be associated with increased risk, have been observed in ovarian and prostate cancers, and non-small cell lung carcinoma (PMID: 25966119).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.8654（4334/5008）、0.7981（96526/120944）、0.7948（199083/250474）、0.8094（25384/31360）、0.9065（98422/108578）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，COSMIC数据库记录68次APC蛋白第1822位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型D记录68次。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: APC基因属于抑癌基因，其编码蛋白是Wnt/β-catenin信号通路的负调控因子（PMID: 8259518, PMID: 8259519），通过调控细胞内β-catenin的水平来发挥其核心抑癌功能（PMID: 11978510）。APC蛋白是降解复合体中的关键组分，该复合体能够介导细胞质中β-catenin的泛素化降解（PMID: 10984057）。当APC基因功能失活时，Wnt/β-catenin信号通路会发生异常激活，导致细胞增殖并最终驱动肿瘤进展（PMID: 8259511）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 1822nd amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Valine to Aspartic acid.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.8654(4334/5008), 0.7981(96526/120944), 0.7767(1133202/1459012), 0.8201(124789/152160) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively, with no record in the iJGVD database; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=21030) is Benign in germline classification (review status: three stars). Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing; the loss-of-function mechanism is the main pathogenic mechanism of the APC gene, and this variant is located outside the first 15-amino acids of the β-catenin binding domain(p.1021-p.1035).
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.8654(4334/5008), 0.7981(96526/120944), 0.7948(199083/250474), 0.8094(25384/31360), 0.9065(98422/108578) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; this variant is reported as unknown  in the CKB database, the COSMIC database records 71 times of amino acid change at the APC protein position 1822, of which the mutant V1822D is recorded 71 times. Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.8654（4334/5008）、0.7981（96526/120944）、0.7767（1133202/1459012）、0.8201（124789/152160），iJGVD数据库无记录；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=21030）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为三颗星）。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接；功能丧失机制（Loss of function, LOF）是APC基因的主要致病机制，该变异位于β连环蛋白结合结构域前15个氨基酸（p.1021-p.1035）范围之外。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第1822位氨基酸由缬氨酸突变为天冬氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: APC, adenomatous polyposis coli, is a tumor suppressor (PMID: 30562755) and multi-domain protein regulating numerous cellular functions through interaction with beta-catenin and subsequent inhibition of Wnt signalling (PMID: 10959075). APC germline mutations are associated with familial adenomatous polyposis (PMID: 30562755) and somatic mutations with colon, endometrial, NSCLC, and breast cancers (PMID: 27283171).

snvindel.gene_function_en: PMS2, PMS1 homolog 2, mismatch repair system component, interacts with MLH1 to form the MutL-alpha complex, which functions in DNA mismatch repair (PMID: 18157157, PMID: 24333356) and is associated with microsatellite instability (MSI) (PMID: 30121009) and genomic stability (PMID: 31747945). Germline PMS2 mutations are associated with Lynch syndrome (PMID: 15528792), mutations in PMS2 are associated with susceptibility to colon cancer and endometrial cancer (PMID: 24978665), and overexpression has been reported in prostate cancer (PMID: 27803051).

Germline PMS2 mutations are associated with Lynch syndrome (PMID: 15528792), mutations in PMS2 are associated with susceptibility to colon cancer and endometrial cancer (PMID: 24978665), and overexpression has been reported in prostate cancer (PMID: 27803051).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2921（1463/5008）、0.287（34827/121364）、0.2716（397092/1461872）、0.233（35481/152300）、0.6205（76212/122818）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，OncoKB数据库报道为Inconclusive，COSMIC数据库记录95次EGFR蛋白第521位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型R521K记录90次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: EGFR基因属于原癌基因，其编码蛋白是表皮生长因子受体家族的一员，同时也隶属于受体酪氨酸激酶家族，为跨膜蛋白。该受体被激活后，可启动下游信号通路，包括RAS-RAF-MEK-ERK通路与PI3K-AKT-mTOR通路，进而促进细胞增殖与生长（PMID: 24312144）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 521st amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Arginine to Lysine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2921(1463/5008), 0.287(34827/121364), 0.2716(397092/1461872), 0.233(35481/152300), 0.6205(76212/122818) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=134021) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 95 times of amino acid change at the EGFR protein position 521, of which the mutant R521K is recorded 90 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2921(1463/5008), 0.287(34827/121364), 0.2716(397092/1461872), 0.233(35481/152300), 0.6205(76212/122818) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; this variant is reported as unknown in the CKB database, and Inconclusive in the OncoKB database, the COSMIC database records 95 times of amino acid change at the EGFR protein position 521, of which the mutant R521K is recorded 90 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: EGFR (HER1), epidermal growth factor receptor, is a tyrosine kinase receptor, which activates RAS/RAF/MEK and PI3K/AKT/mTOR pathways, leading to increased cell proliferation and growth (PMID: 24312144). EGFR activating mutations, amplification, and overexpression are found in a variety of tumors, including non-small cell lung cancer (PMID: 26609494, PMID: 30284706) and colorectal cancer (PMID: 30243897), and the EGFRvIII variant is commonly found in glioblastoma (PMID: 30201736).

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: WRN, Werner syndrome RecQ helicase-like, possesses both DNA helicase and exonuclease activities, thus plays important roles in maintaining genomic stability (PMID: 27902925).

snvindel.gene_function: RECQL4（类似于解旋酶4的RecQ）是一种RecQ家族解旋酶，可展开双链DNA，并参与DNA修复和复制起始（PMID: 24606147, PMID: 31276497）。 RECQL4突变与发生淋巴瘤和骨肉瘤的风险增加有关（PMID: 29080750, PMID: 31604778），并且在浸润性乳腺癌中已报道RECQL4扩增（PMID: 32152520）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is located in the canonical splice sites of the gene.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: This variant may cause abnormal splicing. The allele frequencies of this variant are 1.0(5008/5008), 0.9999(115583/115598) in the 1000G, ExAC databases, respectively, with no record in the gnomAD or iJGVD databases (data in the ExAC database fails the filter); the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=1327943) is Benign in germline classification (review status: one star).

snvindel.gene_function_en: TSC1, TSC complex subunit 1, is a tumor suppressor (PMID: 30562755) that forms a complex with Tsc2 and inhibits mTOR pathway signaling, thus regulating cell growth and metabolism (PMID: 27226234). Germline TSC1 inactivating mutations cause tuberous sclerosis complex and somatic TSC1 mutations have been identified in various cancers, including renal cell carcinoma, mucosal melanoma, and breast cancer (PMID: 27226234, PMID: 30327302, PMID: 29185092, PMID: 28027327).

snvindel.gene_function: RET基因属于原癌基因，是一种受体酪氨酸激酶，可以激活MAPK和PI3K/AKT途径并调节细胞生长和分化（PMID: 24561444, PMID: 29134959）。在癌症中，RET基因可以通过点突变或与多种易位基因重排而被激活，从而构成活性的癌蛋白（PMID: 24561444）。RET基因的遗传突变导致MEN2A综合征（如甲状腺髓样癌、嗜铬细胞瘤、甲状旁腺功能亢进）、MEN2B（如甲状腺髓样癌、嗜铬细胞瘤、多发性肠粘膜神经瘤、星形胶质细胞瘤和Marfan综合征）和家族性甲状腺髓样癌（FMTC）（PMID: 15322516）；RET基因的体细胞突变包括点突变和RET基因座的基因组重排，导致逆转或易位；目前，已经在各种癌症中被确定，包括乳头状甲状腺癌、肺腺癌和慢性粒细胞白血病（CMML）。此外，野生型RET的异常表达或激活与胰腺癌的肿瘤侵袭和转移以及乳腺癌的内分泌治疗耐药相关（PMID: 24561444）。

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: RET, ret proto-oncogene, is a receptor tyrosine kinase that activates MAPK and PI3K/AKT pathways and regulates cell growth and differentiation (PMID: 24561444, PMID: 29134959). RET germline mutations result in MEN2 syndromes and familial medullary thyroid carcinoma (PMID: 20930041, PMID: 24561444) and somatic RET activating mutations, fusions, and Ret overexpression has been associated with a variety of cancers including lung (PMID: 30257958) and colorectal (PMID: 30210625, PMID: 30038711).

The COSMIC database records 31 times of amino acid change at the RET protein position 691, of which the mutant G691S is recorded 30 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: RET, ret proto-oncogene, is a receptor tyrosine kinase that activates MAPK and PI3K/AKT pathways and regulates cell growth and differentiation (PMID: 24561444, PMID: 29134959). RET germline mutations result in MEN2 syndromes and familial medullary thyroid carcinoma (PMID: 20930041, PMID: 24561444) and somatic RET activating mutations, fusions, and Ret overexpression has been associated with a variety of cancers including lung (PMID: 30257958) and colorectal (PMID: 30210625, PMID: 30038711).

snvindel.gene_function_en: BMPR1A, bone morphogenetic protein receptor type IA, is a serine/threonine kinase receptor that activates SMAD signaling pathways, thus regulating transcription of geens involved in growth and development (PMID: 16246179). Germline mutations of BMPR1A are associated with juvenile polyposis syndrome (PMID: 16246179).

Based on the ensemble prediction tool BayesDel, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: MEN1, multiple endocrine neoplasia I, is a scaffold protein that can function with various partners to control gene transcription, signal transduction, and genome integrity (PMID: 23850066). MEN1 is mutated in patients with multiple endocrine neoplasia type 1 syndrome (PMID: 9215690).

snvindel.gene_function: MEN1基因属于抑癌基因。编码蛋白是一种支架蛋白，与多种伴侣蛋白协同作用，控制基因转录、信号转导和基因组完整性（PMID: 23850066）。

MEN1 is mutated in patients with multiple endocrine neoplasia type 1 syndrome (PMID: 9215690).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为1.0（5008/5008）、1.0（121308/121308）、1.0（251212/251212）、1.0（31404/31404），iJGVD数据库无记录；COSMIC数据库记录50次ATM蛋白第1983位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型S记录48次。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: ATM基因属于抑癌基因，其编码蛋白是DNA损伤应答机制的核心调控者，其主要功能是在DNA双链断裂或其他形式的细胞应激时，被激活以启动DNA损伤检查点信号（PMID: 23219553）。激活后的ATM蛋白能够磷酸化数百种底物，进而激活并增强DNA损伤应答反应，最终驱动DNA修复、细胞周期停止或细胞凋亡等进程（PMID: 17525332）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 1983rd amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Asparagine to Serine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 1.0(5008/5008), 1.0(121308/121308) in the 1000G, ExAC databases, respectively, with no record in the gnomAD or iJGVD databases; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=133627) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 1.0(5008/5008), 1.0(121308/121308), 1.0(251212/251212), 1.0(31404/31404) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg database, respectively, with no record in the iJGVD database; the COSMIC database records 53 times of amino acid change at the ATM protein position 1983, of which the mutant N1983S is recorded 51 times. Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第1983位氨基酸由天冬酰胺突变为丝氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: ATM, ATM serine/threonine kinase, is a member of the serine-threonine kinase family and coordinates cellular responses to DNA damage through activation of distinct DNA repair and signaling pathways (PMID: 22079189). ATM germline mutations are associated with ataxia telangiectasia (PMID: 27283171) and ATM somatic mutations are associated with endometrial, colon, pancreatic, breast cancers (PMID: 27283171, PMID: 27413114) and urothelial cancer (PMID: 29682192).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.9858（4937/5008）、0.9726（117863/121184）、0.9732（244403/251146）、0.9771（30682/31402）、1.0（77436/77436）；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: CHEK1基因属于抑癌基因，编码检查点激酶1（PMID: 30562755），属于丝氨酸/苏氨酸蛋白激酶家族。CHEK1蛋白在DNA损伤检查点通路中起着不可或缺的作用，组织损伤细胞进入细胞循环中。

The COSMIC database records 10 times of amino acid change at the CHEK1 protein position 471, of which the mutant I471V is recorded 10 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.9858(4937/5008), 0.9726(117863/121184), 0.9732(244403/251146), 0.9771(30682/31402), 1.0(108598/108598) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; the COSMIC database records 10 times of amino acid change at the CHEK1 protein position 471, of which the mutant I471V is recorded 10 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第471位氨基酸由异亮氨酸突变为缬氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: CHEK1, checkpoint kinase 1, is a tumor suppressor (PMID: 30562755) and serine/threonine kinase activated in response to DNA damage that is responsible for mediating checkpoint signaling from ATM and ATR (PMID: 23613359, PMID: 12781359). Overexpression of Chek1 has been observed in several tumor types, including gastric cancer, small cell lung cancer, and T-cell leukemia (PMID: 25132270, PMID: 26867682, PMID: 28490518).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.6617（3314/5008）、0.7481（1083132/1447820）、0.7008（106625/152158）、0.5468（66980/122501），ExAC数据库无记录；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: CDKN1B（p27）即环素依赖激酶抑制剂1B，调节细胞周期并作为肿瘤抑制因子参与G1期。CDKN1B突变可以促进肿瘤发生（PMID: 28687353）。CDKN1B的胚系突变与四型复杂内分泌肿瘤有关，体细胞突变与淋巴瘤、乳腺癌和内分泌肿瘤等各种肿瘤相关（PMID: 23555276, PMID: 18354415, PMID: 28687353）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is located in 5'UTR of the gene.

Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.6617(3314/5008), 0.7481(1083132/1447820), 0.7008(106625/152158), 0.5468(66980/122501) in the 1000G, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively, with no record in the ExAC database; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.6617（3314/5008）、0.7481（1083132/1447820）、0.7008（106625/152158）、0.5468（66980/122501），ExAC数据库无记录；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=307658）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为5'UTR区突变。
snvindel.gene_function_en: CDKN1B (p27), cyclin-dependent kinase inhibitor 1B, regulates cell cycle progression and is involved in G1 arrest to function as a tumor suppressor, while altered Cdkn1b may promote oncogenesis (PMID: 28687353). Germline mutations in CDKN1B are associated with multiple endocrine neoplasia type IV (MEN4) and reduced expression and somatic mutations are associated with a variety of tumors, including lymphoma, breast, and endocrine (PMID: 23555276; PMID: 18354415; PMID: 28687353).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.3335（487181/1460848）、0.2886（43847/151952）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，OncoKB数据库报道为Inconclusive，Cancer Hotspots数据库记录4次HNF1A蛋白第27位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型I27L记录4次。该变异位于HNF1A基因的DNA结合和二聚化结构域。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate。
snvindel.gene_function: HNF1A基因属于抑癌基因，是具有肿瘤抑制活性的转录因子，并在肝细胞分化和葡萄糖转运中发挥作用（PMID: 25233928, PMID: 26855178, PMID: 25076298）。HNF1A失活突变与3型青少年发病的成人型糖尿病（MODY3）和肝腺瘤相关（PMID: 33245425, PMID: 25076298）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 27th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Isoleucine to Leucine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.3335(487181/1460848), 0.2886(43847/151952) in the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=14937) is Benign/Likely benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). This variant is located in defined regions of the DNA binding and dimerization domains. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.3335(487181/1460848), 0.2886(43847/151952) in the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; this variant is reported as unknown in the CKB database, and Inconclusive in the OncoKB database, the Cancer Hotspots database records 4 times of amino acid change at the HNF1A protein position 27, of which the mutant I27L is recorded 4 times. This variant is located in defined regions of the DNA binding and dimerization domains. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.3335（487181/1460848）、0.2886（43847/151952）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=14937）的胚系突变分类为Benign/Likely benign（可靠度为两颗星）。该变异位于HNF1A基因的DNA结合和二聚化结构域。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第27位氨基酸由异亮氨酸突变为亮氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: HNF1A, HNF1 homeobox A, is a transcription factor that demonstrates tumor suppressor activity and plays a role in hepatocyte differentiation and glucose transport (PMID: 25233928, PMID: 26855178, PMID: 25076298). HNF1A inactivating mutations are associated with maturity onset diabetes of young, type 3 (MODY3) and hepatic adenomas (PMID: 33245425, PMID: 25076298).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.3123（456021/1460154）、0.2728（41510/152144）；CKB数据库报道为no effect，COSMIC数据库记录47次HNF1A蛋白第487位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型S487N记录46次。研究者在双中心从四个方面对变异进行研究，包括来源于两个荧光素酶报告系统的反式激活实验、 免疫印迹法测定蛋白表达和亚细胞定位，以及DNA结合实验，与野生型进行对比，研究结果分别为反式激活：conflict、蛋白表达：40%-75%、亚细胞定位：40%-75%、DNA结合：not detected（PMID: 32910913）。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate。
snvindel.gene_function: HNF1A基因属于抑癌基因，是具有肿瘤抑制活性的转录因子，并在肝细胞分化和葡萄糖转运中发挥作用（PMID: 25233928, PMID: 26855178, PMID: 25076298）。HNF1A失活突变与3型青少年发病的成人型糖尿病（MODY3）和肝腺瘤相关（PMID: 33245425, PMID: 25076298）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 487th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Serine to Asparagine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.3123(456021/1460154), 0.2728(41510/152144) in the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=129230) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Researchers at two centers investigated the variant from four aspects, including transactivation activity (concluded from two luciferase reporter assays), protein expression and subcellular localization by Western blot analysis, and DNA binding assay. Compared with the wild-type, the results were: transactivation activity: conflict, protein expression: 40%-75%, subcellular localization: 40%-75%, and DNA binding: not detected (PMID: 32910913). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.3123(456021/1460154), 0.2728(41510/152144) in the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; this variant is reported as no effect  in the CKB database, the COSMIC database records 47 times of amino acid change at the HNF1A protein position 487, of which the mutant S487N is recorded 46 times. Researchers at two centers investigated the variant from four aspects, including transactivation activity (concluded from two luciferase reporter assays), protein expression and subcellular localization by Western blot analysis, and DNA binding assay. Compared with the wild-type, the results were: transactivation activity: conflict, protein expression: 40%-75%, subcellular localization: 40%-75%, and DNA binding: not detected (PMID: 32910913). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate.

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.9758（4887/5008）、0.9937（120542/121304）、0.9979（1458237/1461288）、0.9806（149351/152310）、1.0（122816/122816）；OncoKB数据库报道为Likely Neutral，COSMIC数据库记录28次BRCA2蛋白第2466位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型V2466A记录28次。该变异位于BRCA2基因重要功能域之外，基于整合预测工具BayesDel认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: BRCA2基因属于抑癌基因，编码蛋白参与同源重组通路，进行双链DNA修复，从而在基因组稳定性中发挥作用（PMID: 27530658）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 2466th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Valine to Alanine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.9758(4887/5008), 0.9937(120542/121304), 0.9979(1458237/1461288), 0.9806(149351/152310), 1.0(122816/122816) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; this variant has not yet been reviewed by the BRCAExchange expert group, the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=133738) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). This variant is located outside the important functional domain of the BRCA2 gene, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.9758(4887/5008), 0.9937(120542/121304), 0.9979(1458237/1461288), 0.9806(149351/152310), 1.0(122816/122816) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; this variant is reported as Likely Neutral in the OncoKB database, the COSMIC database records 28 times of amino acid change at the BRCA2 protein position 2466, of which the mutant V2466A is recorded 28 times. This variant is located outside the important functional domain of the BRCA2 gene, based on the ensemble prediction tool BayesDel, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: BRCA2, breast cancer type 2 susceptibility protein, is a tumor suppressor involved in the homologous recombination pathway for double-strand DNA repair, thereby playing a role in genome stability (PMID: 27530658).

snvindel.gene_function: MAX基因是抑癌基因。编码蛋白是螺旋-环-螺旋亮氨酸拉链转录因子家族的成员，是MYC家族成员的转录辅助因子，在调节细胞生长中发挥作用（PMID: 16908182, PMID: 11031250）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为3'UTR区突变。
snvindel.gene_function_en: MAX, MYC associated factor X, is a member of the helix-loop-helix leucine zipper transcription factor family, and acts as a transcriptional cofactor for Myc family members, playing a role in regulation of cell growth (PMID: 16908182, PMID: 11031250). MAX inactivating mutations and deletions are associated with gastrointestinal stromal tumors (PMID: 28270683), and have been identified in pheochromocytoma (PMID: 22452945).

snvindel.gene_function: MLH3基因是DNA错配修复（MMR）基因的MutL同源（MLH）家族的成员，MLH参与DNA复制与减数分裂重组后基因组完整性的维持。MLH3基因的体细胞突变经常发生在表现出微卫星不稳定性的肿瘤中，胚系突变与遗传性非息肉性结直肠癌7型（HNPCC7）相关。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 826th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Asparagine to Aspartic acid.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: MLH3, DNA mismatch repair protein Mlh3, is a DNA mismatch repair gene that dimerizes with MLH1 and localizes to centrosomes (PMID: 24333356, PMID: 25116689). MLH3 mutations have been associated with cervical squamous cell carcinoma (PMID: 24759751).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2598（1301/5008）、0.3569（43323/121388）、0.3605（90634/251442）、0.3189（9989/31328）、0.286（22147/77444）；COSMIC数据库记录6次FANCI蛋白第86位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型V记录6次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: FANCI是范可尼贫血蛋白I，是ATM/ATR激酶的靶标，与FANCD2相互作用以调节DNA修复（PMID: 17412408）；其基因突变在侵袭性乳腺癌（PMID: 26296701） 和三阴性乳腺癌 （PMID: 26824983）中均有报道。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 86th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Alanine to Valine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2598(1301/5008), 0.3569(43323/121388), 0.3722(543699/1460616), 0.2984(45337/151916), 0.2856(35030/122652) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=257484) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 14 times of amino acid change at the FANCI protein position 86, of which the mutant A86V is recorded 13 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: FANCI, Fanconi anemia group I protein, is an ATM/ATR kinase target that interacts with FANCD2 to regulate DNA repair (PMID: 17412408). FANCI mutations have been identified in patients with invasive breast cancer (PMID: 26296701) and triple-negative receptor breast cancer (PMID: 26824983).

FANCI mutations have been identified in patients with invasive breast cancer (PMID: 26296701) and triple-negative receptor breast cancer (PMID: 26824983).

snvindel.gene_function: SLX4基因编码SLX4蛋白，SLX4蛋白参与与DNA损伤修复相关的各种过程。SLX4蛋白定位于DNA上的双链断裂（DSB），通过招募其他参与DNA修复和基因组稳定性的复合物或蛋白质单体（如ERCC1/ERCC4与SLX1核酸内切酶复合物、MSH2/MSH3错配修复复合物以及端粒蛋白TRF2等）进而形成多蛋白复合物（PMID: 19596235, PMID: 19596236, PMID: 19595721, PMID: 19595722）。SLX4对部分类型的DNA修复至关重要，包括DNA链间交联（ICLs）、霍利迪连接（HJ）解析和端粒稳态（PMID: 24938228）。SLX4蛋白在各种肿瘤中突变频率较低，该基因的胚系突变是导致范可尼贫血其中一个亚型（FANCP）的病因之一（PMID: 21240275, PMID: 21240277）。SLX4被认为是家族性非BRCA1/2突变型乳腺癌患者的一种假定遗传因素，但尚未被研究证实（PMID: 22911665, PMID: 22401137, PMID: 21805310, PMID: 23211700）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 1271st amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Serine to Phenylalanine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.0629(315/5008), 0.06416(7761/120956), 0.06074(88747/1461114), 0.04976(7577/152258), 0.2078(25294/121742) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=262050) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: SLX4, SLX4 structure-specific endonuclease subunit, is a component of the endonuclease complexes response to DNA interstrand crosslink repair and replication fork failure (PMID: 21527828). SLX4 mutations have been identified in breast and ovarian cancers (PMID: 28423363, PMID: 21805310).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1508（755/5008）、0.1176（12830/109096）、0.1045（26075/249632）、0.1289（4042/31364）、0.2019（21923/108604）；CKB数据库报道为no effect，COSMIC数据库记录105次PALB2蛋白第559位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型R记录104次。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: PALB2基因属于抑癌基因，编码DNA修复因子和BRCA2结合蛋白（PMID: 16793542）。PALB2蛋白在同源重组途径中充当支架蛋白，参与修复双链DNA断裂，可在受损基因座上介导BRCA2蛋白和RAD51蛋白的募集（PMID: 19423707）。PALB2蛋白还与BRCA1蛋白相互作用，在同源重组途径中充当BRCA1蛋白和BRCA2蛋白之间的中介因子（PMID: 19268590, PMID: 19584259）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 559th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Glutamine to Arginine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.1508(755/5008), 0.1176(12830/109096), 0.09504(138857/1461000), 0.1285(19545/152096), 0.2018(24747/122640) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=126613) is Benign/Likely benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing; the ClinGen Expert Panel concluded from the results of the available functional study experiments that missense mutations in the PALB2 gene are extremely unlikely to cause disease.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.1508(755/5008), 0.1176(12830/109096), 0.1045(26075/249632), 0.1289(4042/31364), 0.2019(21923/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; this variant is reported as no effect  in the CKB database, the COSMIC database records 108 times of amino acid change at the PALB2 protein position 559, of which the mutant Q559R is recorded 107 times. Based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1508（755/5008）、0.1176（12830/109096）、0.09504（138857/1461000）、0.1285（19545/152096）、0.2018（24747/122640）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=126613）的胚系突变分类为Benign/Likely benign（可靠度为两颗星）。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接；ClinGen专家组根据现有功能研究实验结果认为PALB2基因错义突变的致病可能性极低。

snvindel.gene_function_en: PALB2, partner and localizer of BRCA2, recruits Brca2 and Rad51 to repair DNA through homologous recombination (PMID: 24998779, PMID: 30638972). PALB2 loss of function mutations have been linked to hereditary breast cancer (PMID: 25135369) and male breast cancer (PMID: 31067289).

snvindel.gene_function: BRCA1基因属于抑癌基因（PMID: 30562755），其编码的蛋白主要参与DNA的损伤修复，因此BRCA1基因在维持DNA的结构和完整性上具有重要作用（PMID: 21203981）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a nonsense mutation, which changes the 157th amino acid from Serine to stop codon.

evi_sum.evi_interpretation: NCCN子宫肿瘤指南（2024 Version 2）推荐奥拉帕利、鲁卡帕尼、尼拉帕利用于BRCA突变的晚期复发/转移或不能手术的子宫平滑肌肉瘤（LMS）患者的二线或后线治疗。
临床前研究表明（2024 AACR, Abstract 670），LAE120有效抑制BRCA突变的MDA-MB-436乳腺癌细胞的增殖，并且在BRCA突变的MDA-MB-436细胞异种移植模型中，LAE120显示出强大的单药肿瘤抑制活性和良好的剂量依赖性响应，LAE120联合奥拉帕利在低剂量下具有更强、更持久的抗肿瘤疗效。
临床前研究表明（2024 AACR, Abstract 670），LAE120有效抑制BRCA突变的MDA-MB-436乳腺癌细胞的增殖，并且在BRCA突变的MDA-MB-436细胞异种移植模型中，LAE120显示出强大的单药肿瘤抑制活性和良好的剂量依赖性响应，LAE120联合奥拉帕利在低剂量下具有更强、更持久的抗肿瘤疗效。
乳腺癌NCCN指南（2025 V4）指出，针对携带BRCA1、BRCA2胚系突变的复发、无法手术（局部或区域性转移病灶）或IV期（M1）浸润性乳腺癌患者，优先推荐采用奥拉帕利、他拉唑帕利（Talazoparib）进行治疗（等级1）。

evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗用于一线铂类为基础的化疗完全或部分缓解的、HRD阳性的晚期卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者的治疗，其中HRD阳性定义为携带BRCA有害或疑似有害突变或基因组不稳定。
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_en:
FDA approved Olaparib in combination with bevacizumab for the maintenance treatment of adult patients with advanced epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube or primary 
peritoneal cancer who are in complete or partial response to first-line platinum-based chemotherapy and whose cancer is associated with homologous recombination deficiency (HRD)-positive status defined by either: a deleterious or suspected deleterious BRCA mutation, and/or genomic instability.
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机、双盲、安慰剂对照、多中心的III 期临床试验（PAOLA-1, NCT03737643），入组806例经一线含铂化疗和贝伐珠单抗治疗后达到完全缓解或部分缓解的晚期高级别上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌患者。患者按照2:1比例随机接受每日两次口服奥拉帕利（300mg）联合贝伐珠单抗（537例）或安慰剂联合贝伐珠单抗（269例）治疗，研究主要终点为无进展生存期（PFS），次要终点为总生存期（OS）。研究结果显示，奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗治疗组对比安慰剂联合贝伐珠单抗治疗组的中位PFS分别为22.1 个月 和16.6 个月（HR 0.59; 95% CI: 0.49-0.72;p<0.0001）；同时，研究者对入组患者的HRD及tBRCAm进行了检测并分组分析，结果显示，对于HRD阳性患者，经奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗治疗后PFS显著高于安慰剂组（28.1 个月 vs 16.6个月），tBRCA阳性患者经奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗治疗后PFS同样显著高于安慰剂组（37.2 个月 vs 21.7 个月），而HRD和tBRCA同时阳性的患者PFS获益最为明显（37.2 个月 vs 17.7个月）。基于上述研究，FDA批准奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗用于一线铂类为基础的化疗完全或部分缓解的、HRD阳性的晚期卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者的治疗，其中HRD阳性定义为携带BRCA有害或疑似有害突变或基因组不稳定。

evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准氟唑帕利单药或联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼用于新辅助、辅助或转移阶段接受过化疗治疗的伴有胚系BRCA突变（gBRCAm）的人表皮生长因子受体（HER2）阴性转移性乳腺癌成年患者。激素受体（HR）阳性乳腺癌患者既往需接受过内分泌治疗或被认为不适合接受内分泌治疗。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机对照、开放、多中心的III期临床试验（FZPL-III-303, NCTO4296370），截至2023年12月15日，共入组203例伴有gBRCA1/2突变的HER2阴性转移性乳腺癌患者，其中201例纳入意向性治疗集（ITT），按1∶1∶1比例随机分配至氟唑帕利联合阿帕替尼（n=69）、氟唑帕利（n=67）或标准化疗方案（n=65）进行治疗。入组的患者既往均接受过蔥环类和/或紫杉类治疗，且在复发转移阶段接受至多2线系统化疗。对于激素受体阳性乳腺癌患者，既往均接受过至少一线内分泌治疗或不适合接受内分泌治疗。研究的主要终点为由盲态独立影像评审委员会（BICR）根据RECIST v1.1评估的无进展生存期（PFS），次要终点为根据研究者评估的无进展生存期（PFS）、客观缓解率（ORR）、疾病控制率（DCR）以及总生存期（OS）等。研究结果显示：BIRC评估的中位PFS在氟唑帕利联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼组、氟唑帕利单药组以及研究者选择化疗组分别为11.0个月、6.7个月和2.8个月，客观缓解率（ORR）分别为66.7%、43.6%及21.4%，疾病控制率（DCR）分别为87.0%、80.6%和46.2%。基于以上研究，NMPA批准氟唑帕利单药或联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼用于新辅助、辅助或转移阶段接受过化疗治疗的伴有胚系BRCA突变（gBRCAm）的人表皮生长因子受体（HER2）阴性转移性乳腺癌成年患者。激素受体（HR）阳性乳腺癌患者既往需接受过内分泌治疗或被认为不适合接受内分泌治疗。

evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准帕米帕利用于既往经过二线及以上化疗的伴有胚系BRCA（gBRCA）突变的复发性晚期卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌患者的治疗。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项多中心、开放标签I/II期临床试验（NCT03333915）的II期临床部分，入组113例既往接受过至少两项标准化疗、携有胚系BRCA1/2突变的高级别上皮性卵巢癌（包括输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌）或高级别子宫内膜上皮样癌中国患者，其中包括90例晚期铂敏感卵巢癌患者（队列1）和23例晚期铂耐药卵巢癌患者（队列2）。患者接受帕米帕利每日两次口服用药、每次60 mg的治疗，试验的主要终点为客观缓解率（ORR）。在101例疗效可评估患者中，队列1中的铂敏感卵巢癌患者的中位随访时间为17.0个月，ORR为68.3%，中位缓解持续时间（DOR）为13.8个月；队列2中的铂耐药卵巢癌患者的中位随访时间为11.6个月，ORR为31.6%，中位DOR为11.1个月。基于上述研究，NMPA附条件批准帕米帕利用于治疗既往经过二线及以上化疗、伴有胚系BRCA（gBRCA）突变的复发性晚期卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌患者的治疗。
乳腺癌NCCN指南（2025 V4）指出，针对携带BRCA1、BRCA2胚系突变的复发、无法手术（局部或区域性转移病灶）或IV期（M1）浸润性乳腺癌患者，优先推荐采用奥拉帕利、他拉唑帕利（Talazoparib）进行治疗（等级1）。
NCCN子宫肿瘤指南（2024 Version 2）推荐奥拉帕利、鲁卡帕尼、尼拉帕利用于BRCA突变的晚期复发/转移或不能手术的子宫平滑肌肉瘤（LMS）患者的二线或后线治疗。

一项多中心1/2期临床试验（PETRA），评估Saruparib在306名经治HRR缺陷型乳腺、卵巢、胰腺或前列腺癌患者中的安全性、耐受性和有效性。患者的肿瘤在HRR相关基因中出现突变，包括：BRCA1、BRCA2、PALB2、RAD51C或RAD51D。数据显示，在接受60mg Saruparib治疗的31名乳腺癌患者中，客观缓解率（ORR）为48.4%，中位缓解持续时间（mDOR）为7.3个月，中位无进展生存期（PFS）为9.1个月。

evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准氟唑帕利单药或联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼用于新辅助、辅助或转移阶段接受过化疗治疗的伴有胚系BRCA突变（gBRCAm）的人表皮生长因子受体（HER2）阴性转移性乳腺癌成年患者。激素受体（HR）阳性乳腺癌患者既往需接受过内分泌治疗或被认为不适合接受内分泌治疗。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机对照、开放、多中心的III期临床试验（FZPL-III-303, NCTO4296370），截至2023年12月15日，共入组203例伴有gBRCA1/2突变的HER2阴性转移性乳腺癌患者，其中201例纳入意向性治疗集（ITT），按1∶1∶1比例随机分配至氟唑帕利联合阿帕替尼（n=69）、氟唑帕利（n=67）或标准化疗方案（n=65）进行治疗。入组的患者既往均接受过蔥环类和/或紫杉类治疗，且在复发转移阶段接受至多2线系统化疗。对于激素受体阳性乳腺癌患者，既往均接受过至少一线内分泌治疗或不适合接受内分泌治疗。研究的主要终点为由盲态独立影像评审委员会（BICR）根据RECIST v1.1评估的无进展生存期（PFS），次要终点为根据研究者评估的无进展生存期（PFS）、客观缓解率（ORR）、疾病控制率（DCR）以及总生存期（OS）等。研究结果显示：BIRC评估的中位PFS在氟唑帕利联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼组、氟唑帕利单药组以及研究者选择化疗组分别为11.0个月、6.7个月和2.8个月，客观缓解率（ORR）分别为66.7%、43.6%及21.4%，疾病控制率（DCR）分别为87.0%、80.6%和46.2%。基于以上研究，NMPA批准氟唑帕利单药或联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼用于新辅助、辅助或转移阶段接受过化疗治疗的伴有胚系BRCA突变（gBRCAm）的人表皮生长因子受体（HER2）阴性转移性乳腺癌成年患者。激素受体（HR）阳性乳腺癌患者既往需接受过内分泌治疗或被认为不适合接受内分泌治疗。

BRCA1基因的功能缺失型致病性或疑似致病性胚系变异（杂合）与BRCA1相关肿瘤易感综合征（常染色体显性遗传）明确相关（ClinGen）。乳腺癌疾病风险为：原发性乳腺癌的绝对风险为60%-72%，对侧乳腺癌20年累积风险为30%-40%，绝经前女性15年累积风险为>20%，男性在70岁患乳腺癌绝对风险为0.2%-1.2%；卵巢癌、胰腺癌、前列腺癌绝对风险分别为39%-58%、≤5%、7%-26%，患胆道癌、黑色素瘤风险增加（NCCN Genetic/Familial High-Risk Assessment: Breast, Ovarian, Pancreatic, and Prostate Version 3.2025, NCCN Pancreatic Adenocarcinoma Version 2.2025, NCCN Biliary Tract Cancers Version 1.2025, NCCN Prostate Cancer Version 2.2025, NCCN Melanoma: Cutaneous Version 2.2025）。
BRCA1基因的双等位基因致病性和/或疑似致病性胚系变异（纯合或复合杂合）与范可尼贫血（常染色体隐性遗传）明确相关（ClinGen）。范可尼贫血表型包括骨髓衰竭、急性髓系白血病、骨髓增生异常综合征，以及其他表型及临床特征：身材矮小、皮肤色素沉着(皮肤色素沉着或色素沉着斑)、骨骼异常(拇指、手臂)、多种其他先天性异常、头/颈/外阴/阴道鳞状细胞癌、肝脏肿瘤、染色体脆性增加（NCCN Myelodysplastic Syndromes Version 2.2025）。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation_en:
Heterozygous loss-of-function pathogenic or likely pathogenic variants in BRCA1 are definitively associated with BRCA1-related hereditary cancer predisposition syndrome (autosomal dominant) (ClinGen). Breast cancer: 60%–72% absolute risk for primary breast cancer; 30%–40% 20-year cumulative risk for contralateral breast cancer; >20% 15-year cumulative risk in premenopausal women; 0.2%–1.2% risk of male breast cancer by age 70. Ovarian, pancreatic, and prostate cancers: 39%–58%, ≤5%, and 7%–26% absolute risks, respectively. Increased risks for cholangiocarcinoma and melanoma. (NCCN Genetic/Familial High-Risk Assessment: Breast, Ovarian, Pancreatic, and Prostate V3.2025; Pancreatic Adenocarcinoma V2.2025; Biliary Tract Cancers V1.2025; Prostate Cancer V2.2025; Melanoma: Cutaneous V2.2025).
Biallelic pathogenic or likely pathogenic germline variants (homozygous or compound heterozygous) in the BRCA1 gene are definitively associated with Fanconi anemia (autosomal recessive inheritance) (ClinGen). Clinical features include bone marrow failure, acute myeloid leukemia, myelodysplastic syndrome, congenital anomalies (short stature, hyperpigmentation, skeletal abnormalities), and increased risk for squamous cell carcinomas (head/neck, vulva, vagina), liver tumors, and chromosomal instability (NCCN Myelodysplastic Syndromes, Version 2.2025).

evi_sum.regimen_name: 尼拉帕利阿比特龙片+泼尼松龙
evi_sum.tumor_name_cn: 转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准尼拉帕利阿比特龙片联合泼尼松或泼尼松龙用于携带胚系和/或体系 BRCA基因突变的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌成人患者（mCRPC）。
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_en: The NMPA has approved Niraparib and Abiraterone Acetate Tablets in combination with prednisone or prednisolone for adult patients with metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer (mCRPC) who harbor germline and/or somatic BRCA gene mutations.
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机双盲、安慰剂对照的、多中心、多队列、III期临床试验（MAGNITUDE，NCT03748641），入组423例携带HRR相关基因变异（mHRR）的转移性趋势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）患者，随机（1:1）接受了尼拉帕利200 mg和阿比特龙1000 mg（AKEEGA组，N＝212）或安慰剂和阿比特龙（N＝211）给药，时间持续至出现不可耐受的毒性或疾病进展。所有患者均接受了泼尼松或泼尼松龙10mg/天和 GnRH类似物治疗或既往接受过双侧睾丸切除术。在纳入的423例患者中，225例（53%）有BRCA基因突变（BRCAm）。主要疗效指标是BICR评估得到的放射学无进展生存期（rPFS）、其他疗效指标包括总生存期（OS）。研究结果显示，在BRCAm和意向治疗（ITT）人群中观察到AKEEGA组与安慰剂组相比rPFS有统计学显著改善，BRCAm亚组中两组的PFS风险比为0.53，中位rPFS分别为16.6个月和10.9个月。在BRCAm患者亚组的探索性OS分析中，AKEEGA组与安慰剂组的中位OS分别为30.4个月和28.6个月， OS风险比为0.79。基于上述研究，NMPA批准尼拉帕利阿比特龙片联合泼尼松或泼尼松龙用于治疗携带胚系和/或体系BRCA基因突变的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌成人患者（mCRPC）。

evi_sum.regimen_name: 尼拉帕利阿比特龙片+泼尼松
evi_sum.tumor_name_cn: 转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌

evi_sum.tumor_name_cn: 转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准他拉唑帕利联合恩扎卢胺治疗同源重组修复(HRR)基因突变的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌(mCRPC)成人患者。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机、双盲、安慰剂对照、多队列III期临床试验（TALAPRO-2, NCT03395197），评估了他拉唑帕利与恩扎卢胺联合治疗同源重组修复（HRR）基因突变的转移性、去势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）患者的疗效。研究纳入399例mCRPC患者，按1:1的比例随机接受恩扎卢胺联合他拉唑帕利或安慰剂给药，直至出现不可接受的毒性或疾病进展，要求患者至少携带直接或间接涉及HRR通路的12个基因（ATM、ATR、BRCA1、BRCA2、CDK12、 CHEK2、FANCA、MLH1、MRE11A（MRE11）、NBN、PALB2、RAD51C）中的至少1个突变基因。主要疗效指标是由盲法独立中心评审（BICR）根据RECIST 1.1和前列腺癌工作组（PCWG3）（针对骨骼）标准评估的影像学无进展生存期（rPFS），另一个疗效指标是总生存期（OS）。在HRR基因突变人群中，与安慰剂+恩扎卢胺组相比，他拉唑帕利+恩扎卢胺组的rPFS有统计学上的显著改善，他拉唑帕利+恩扎卢胺组 vs 安慰剂+恩扎卢胺组的中位rPFS：未达到 vs 13.8个月（HR 0.45; 95% CI: 0.33, 0.61; p<0.0001）。在rPFS分析时，OS 数据尚未成熟（观察到24%的死亡事件）。按BRCA突变状态进行的探索性rPFS分析显示，BRCA突变组的HR为0.20（95% CI: 0.11, 0.36），非BRCA基因突变组的HR为0.72（95% CI: 0.49,1.07）。基于上述研究，NMPA批准他拉唑帕利联合恩扎卢胺治疗同源重组修复(HRR)基因突变的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌(mCRPC)成人患者。

evi_sum.regimen_name: 奥拉帕利+醋酸阿比特龙+泼尼松
evi_sum.tumor_name_cn: 转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准奥拉帕利与阿比特龙和泼尼松（或泼尼松龙）联合用于有害或疑似有害BRCA突变（BRCAm）转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）成人患者。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机、双盲、安慰剂对照的多中心III期临床试验（PROpel; NCT03732820），入组了796名mCRPC患者，患者被随机分配（1：1）接受奥拉帕利联合阿比特龙或安慰剂联合阿比特龙，并且所有患者还接受泼尼松或泼尼松龙治疗。BRCA基因突变(BRCAm)状态在随机分组后、初步分析前对ctDNA或组织样本进行测定。主要疗效终点指标为研究者评估的放射学无进展生存期（rPFS），其他疗效终点指标包括总生存期（OS）。在接受检测的796名患者中，85名患者（11%）检测出BRCAm。研究结果显示，在意向治疗（ITT）人群中，观察到与安慰剂联合阿比特龙相比，奥拉帕利联合阿比特龙的rPFS出现统计学显著改善。85例（11% ITT人群）BRCAm患者的探索性亚组分析显示，奥拉帕利+阿比特龙组 vs 安慰剂+阿比特龙组中位rPFS分别为NR vs 8个月（风险比[HR]=0.24），中位OS分别为NR vs 23个月（HR=0.30）。711例（89% ITT人群）无BRCAm的患者中，rPFS HR为0.77，OS HR为0.92，表明在ITT人群中观察到的rPFS改善主要归因于BRCAm患者。基于以上研究，FDA批准奥拉帕利与阿比特龙和泼尼松（或泼尼松龙）联合用于有害或疑似有害BRCA突变（BRCAm）转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）成人患者。

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: This variant is expected to form functionally impaired or inactivated proteins. This variant is not recorded in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomAD or iJGVD databases; this variant is being reviewed by the BRCAExchange expert group as Pathogenic, the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=37608) is Pathogenic in germline classification (review status: three stars). A multifactor likelihood analysis model based on clinical phenotypic data indicated the Likelihood ratio (LR) for this variant is 0.0546 (Family-History LR:0.0546) (PMID: 31853058).
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: This variant is expected to form functionally impaired or inactivated proteins. This variant is not recorded in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomAD or iJGVD databases; this variant is reported as Likely Oncogenic in the OncoKB database, the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异可能形成功能损伤或失活的蛋白。该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；BRCAExchange数据库专家组复核为Pathogenic，ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=37608）的胚系突变分类为Pathogenic（可靠度为三颗星）。基于临床表型数据的多因素似然分析模型显示，该变异的Likelihood ratio（LR）为0.0546（Family-History LR:0.0546）（PMID: 31853058）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为无义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第157位氨基酸由丝氨酸突变为终止密码子。
snvindel.gene_function_en: BRCA1, breast cancer type 1 susceptibility protein, is a tumor suppressor (PMID: 30562755) involved in the DNA damage response and DNA repair (PMID: 21203981).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.00001754（2/114038）、0.000003425（5/1459812）、0.000006570（1/152206），1000G、iJGVD数据库无记录；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: HOXB13基因属于原癌基因，编码一个HOX基因家族的成员。编码蛋白是参与脊椎动物胚胎发育的转录因子，特别是在沿前/后轴的身体节段发育中发挥作用（PMID: 12668621, PMID: 31137568）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 4th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Glycine to Valine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.00001754(2/114038), 0.000003425(5/1459812), 0.000006570(1/152206) in the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G or iJGVD databases; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=483505) is Uncertain significance in germline classification (review status: two stars). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.00001754(2/114038), 0.000003425(5/1459812), 0.000006570(1/152206) in the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G or iJGVD databases; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.00001754（2/114038）、0.000003425（5/1459812）、0.000006570（1/152206），1000G、iJGVD数据库无记录；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=483505）的胚系突变分类为Uncertain significance（可靠度为两颗星）。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第4位氨基酸由甘氨酸突变为缬氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: HOXB13, homeobox B13, encodes a member of the HOX gene family and is a transcription factor involved in vertebrate embryonic development, particularly playing a role in the development of body segments along the anterior/posterior axes (PMID: 12668621, PMID: 31137568).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.3996（2001/5008）、0.3972（46854/117962）、0.395（98463/249256）、0.3741（11715/31312）、0.4283（33169/77444）；COSMIC数据库记录6次RNF43蛋白第418位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型M记录6次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: RNF43，无名指蛋白43，是一种E3泛素连接酶，靶向Frizzled受体，导致Frizzled的溶酶体降解和Wnt信号的负调控（PMID: 25460271）。RNF43突变与多种肿瘤类型有关，在结直肠癌和子宫内膜癌中很常见（PMID: 25460271, PMID: 25344691）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 418th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Leucine to Methionine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.3996(2001/5008), 0.3972(46854/117962), 0.3699(540390/1460844), 0.378(57488/152088), 0.4277(52359/122410) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=403384) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 19 times of amino acid change at the RNF43 protein position 418, of which the mutant L418M is recorded 19 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.3996(2001/5008), 0.3972(46854/117962), 0.395(98463/249256), 0.3741(11715/31312), 0.4275(46429/108604) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; the COSMIC database records 19 times of amino acid change at the RNF43 protein position 418, of which the mutant L418M is recorded 19 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.3996（2001/5008）、0.3972（46854/117962）、0.3699（540390/1460844）、0.378（57488/152088）、0.4277（52359/122410）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=403384）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录19次RNF43蛋白第418位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型L418M记录19次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第418位氨基酸由亮氨酸突变为蛋氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: RNF43, ring finger protein 43, is an E3 ubiquitin ligase that targets Frizzled receptors, resulting in lysosomal degradation of Frizzleds and negative regulation of Wnt signaling (PMID: 25460271). RNF43 mutations are associated with several tumor types, and are frequent in colorectal and endometrial cancer (PMID: 25460271, PMID: 25344691).

snvindel.gene_function: BRIP1基因属于抑癌基因，编码蛋白是RecQ DEAH解旋酶家族的成员，参与DNA受损修复过程。BRIP1蛋白与BRCA1蛋白相互作用，共同修补受损的DNA链，从而阻止细胞内积累过多可能触发其分裂失控的基因损伤。

The COSMIC database records 18 times of amino acid change at the BRIP1 protein position 919, of which the mutant S919P is recorded 16 times. snvindel.gene_function_en: BRIP1, BRCA1 interacting protein C-terminal helicase 1, is involved in DNA repair and aids the tumor suppressor function of Brca1 (PMID: 14983014). BRIP1 germline mutations are associated with breast and ovarian cancers and somatic mutations are highest in endometrial, colon, and NSCLC (PMID: 27283171).

snvindel.gene_function_en: AXIN2, axin 2, is a homologue of Axin that regulates beta-catenin degradation (PMID: 9554852). AXIN2 mutations have been identified in colorectal, ovarian, endometrial, and liver cancers (PMID: 15735151).

snvindel.gene_function: PRKAR1A基因属于抑癌基因，编码蛋白激酶A的调节亚基，是Pka的重要组分，可介导cAMP信号转导（PMID: 26042218）。

snvindel.gene_function_en: PRKAR1A, protein kinase cAMP-dependent type I regulatory subunit alpha, is a major component of Pka which mediates cAMP-dependent signaling (PMID: 26042218). Inactivation of PRKAR1A is associated with Carney complex (PMID: 20301463) and adrenocortical tumors (PMID: 26042218).

snvindel.gene_function: ERCC1基因编码蛋白是一种DNA核酸内切酶。该蛋白通过与核酸内切酶ERCC4相互作用，形成ERCC1-XPF DNA修复复合物（PMID: 23623389），在DNA核苷酸切除修复过程中发挥重要作用（PMID: 8811092, PMID: 10320375）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为3'UTR区突变。
snvindel.gene_function_en: ERCC1, ERCC excision repair 1, endonuclease non-catalytic subunit, forms part of an endonuclease complex that functions in DNA repair (PMID: 26074087). ERCC1 expression level has been correlated with response to platinum-based therapies in various tumor types, including ovarian, non-small cell lung, and head and neck cancers (PMID: 26804248, PMID: 26179868, PMID: 26870207).

snvindel.gene_function: ASXL1是转录调节因子，参与基因表达的表观遗传调控，并与几种蛋白质形成复合物以调控转录（PMID: 23736028）。ASXL1突变在慢性粒细胞单核细胞白血病中很常见（PMID: 26771811, PMID: 23736028），并且已在许多不同的肿瘤类型包括急性髓细胞性白血病和肝癌（PMID: 23736028）中被报道。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 815th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Leucine to Proline.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 1.0(5008/5008), 1.0(120931/120934) in the 1000G, ExAC databases, respectively, with no record in the gnomAD or iJGVD databases; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=133599) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 19 times of amino acid change at the ASXL1 protein position 815, of which the mutant L815P is recorded 15 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: ASXL1, additional sex combs like 1, transcriptional regulator, is involved in epigenetic regulation of gene expression and forms complexes with several proteins to regulate transcription (PMID: 23736028). Mutations in ASXL1 are frequent in chronic myelomonocytic leukemia (PMID: 26771811, PMID: 23736028), and have been identified in a number of different tumor types including acute myeloid leukemia and liver cancer (PMID: 23736028).

snvindel.gene_function: TNFRSF14，TNF受体超家族成员14，编码一种跨膜糖蛋白，该蛋白在肿瘤坏死因子信号传导途径中起受体作用，协调促炎和抗炎信号传导，并在T细胞活化和维持中起作用（PMID: 22017438;PMID: 21920726）。 已在滤泡性淋巴瘤（PMID: 20884631）和弥漫性大B细胞淋巴瘤（PMID: 22343534）中发现TNFRSF14突变，并且已报道多种癌症的表达发生了改变，包括经典霍奇金淋巴瘤（PMID: 26650888）的水平降低，和在胃癌中的升高表达（PMID: 28243127）。

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: TNFRSF14, TNF receptor superfamily member 14, encodes a transmembrane glycoprotein that acts as a receptor in the tumor necrosis factor signaling pathway, coordinating pro- and anti-inflammatory signaling, and plays a role in T-cell activation and maintenance (PMID: 22017438, PMID: 21920726). TNFRSF14 mutations have been identified in follicular lymphoma (PMID: 20884631) and diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (PMID: 22343534), and altered expression has been reported in multiple cancers including reduced levels in classical Hodgkin lymphoma (PMID: 26650888), and increased expression in gastric cancer (PMID: 28243127).

snvindel.gene_function:
该基因编码的蛋白质催化5,10-亚甲基四氢叶酸盐转化为5-甲基四氢叶酸盐，后者是同型半胱氨酸再甲基化为蛋氨酸的共底物。
该基因的遗传变异影响对闭塞性血管疾病、神经管缺陷、结肠癌和急性白血病的易感性，该基因的突变与亚甲基四氢叶酸还原酶缺乏有关。

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered disease-causing, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: The protein encoded by this gene catalyzes the conversion of 5,10-methylenetetrahydrofolate to 5-methyltetrahydrofolate, a co-substrate for homocysteine remethylation to methionine. Genetic variation in this gene influences susceptibility to occlusive vascular disease, neural tube defects, colon cancer and acute leukemia, and mutations in this gene are associated with methylenetetrahydrofolate reductase deficiency.

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.00004599（7/152202）、0.0006687（82/122630），ExAC、gnomADe数据库EAS人群等位基因频率分别为0.00104（9/8650）、0.0008068（32/39664），1000G数据库无记录；OncoKB数据库报道为Unknown，Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: SPEN是SPEN家族转录抑制因子，作为ESR1的负转录调节因子（PMID:26297734），在初级纤毛形成和细胞迁移中发挥激素独立作用（PMID:28877752），并促进β-连环蛋白通路活性（PMID:17234755）。在ER阳性乳腺癌中发现了SPEN突变和拷贝数丢失（PMID:26297734），在结直肠癌中表达水平增加（PMID:17234755）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 2599th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Serine to Leucine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.00004599(7/152202), 0.0006687(82/122630) in the gnomADg, iJGVD databases, 0.00104(9/8650), 0.0008068(32/39664) in the EAS population of the ExAC, gnomADe databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G database; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.00004599(7/152202), 0.0006687(82/122630) in the gnomADg, iJGVD databases, 0.00104(9/8650), 0.0008068(32/39664) in the EAS population of the ExAC, gnomADe databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G database; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.00004599（7/152202）、0.0006687（82/122630），ExAC、gnomADe数据库EAS人群等位基因频率分别为0.00104（9/8650）、0.0008068（32/39664），1000G数据库无记录；OncoKB数据库报道为Unknown，Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第2599位氨基酸由丝氨酸突变为亮氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: SPEN, spen family transcriptional repressor, acts acts as a negative transcriptional regulator of ESR1 (PMID: 26297734), plays a hormone independent role in primary cilia formation and cell migration (PMID: 28877752), and promotes beta-catenin pathway activity (PMID: 17234755). SPEN mutations and copy number loss have been identified in ER-positive breast cancer (PMID: 26297734), and increased expression levels have been reported in colorectal cancer (PMID: 17234755).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异为发生在功能未知重复区域的框内缺失突变。该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.00003170（46/1451314）、0.00004604（7/152030）、0.000008162（1/122516），ExAC数据库OTH人群等位基因频率为0.0123（11/894），1000G数据库无记录；CKB数据库报道为unknown，OncoKB数据库报道为Unknown，COSMIC数据库记录47次ARID1A蛋白第1334位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型Q1334del记录31次。
snvindel.gene_function: ARID1A基因属于抑癌基因，在动物实验中显示，ARID1A基因的功能与调节基因转录的增强子相关，其突变失活可能影响多种基因的表达和活性（PMID: 27941798）。ARID1A基因在多种肿瘤中均有发生，包括卵巢癌、子宫内膜癌、结直肠癌等（PMID: 21590771; PMID: 21900401） 。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a deletion mutation, which deletes the 1334th amino acid in the gene-encoded protein.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: This variant is an in-frame deletion that occurs in a functionally unknown repeat region. The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.00003170(46/1451314), 0.00004604(7/152030), 0.000008162(1/122516) in the gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, 0.0123(11/894) in the OTH population of the ExAC database, respectively, with no record in the 1000G database; this variant is reported as unknown  in the CKB database, the COSMIC database records 49 times of amino acid change at the ARID1A protein position 1334, of which the mutant Q1334del is recorded 33 times.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: This variant is an in-frame deletion that occurs in a functionally unknown repeat region. The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.00003170(46/1451314), 0.00004604(7/152030), 0.000008162(1/122516) in the gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, 0.0123(11/894) in the OTH population of the ExAC database, respectively, with no record in the 1000G database; this variant is reported as unknown  in the CKB database, the COSMIC database records 49 times of amino acid change at the ARID1A protein position 1334, of which the mutant Q1334del is recorded 33 times.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异为发生在功能未知重复区域的框内缺失突变。该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.00003170（46/1451314）、0.00004604（7/152030）、0.000008162（1/122516），ExAC数据库OTH人群等位基因频率为0.0123（11/894），1000G数据库无记录；CKB数据库报道为unknown，OncoKB数据库报道为Unknown，COSMIC数据库记录47次ARID1A蛋白第1334位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型Q1334del记录31次。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为缺失突变，导致基因编码蛋白第1334位氨基酸缺失。
snvindel.gene_function_en: ARID1A, AT rich interactive domain 1A (SWI1-like), is a member of the SWI/SNF chromatin remodeling complex and is involved in cell-cycle activation (PMID: 29136504). ARID1A has been reported to influence PI3K/AKT pathways (PMID: 24618703), and loss of function is commonly found in gastric, colorectal (PMID: 28937020), and bladder cancers (PMID: 28583311), while in liver cancer, Arida1a has a context dependent role (PMID: 29136504).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: ARID1A基因全长编码2285个氨基酸，该变异导致蛋白编码终止于第1882位氨基酸，逃逸无义介导的mRNA降解，造成超过10%的编码氨基酸丢失，影响蛋白结构功能域：SWI/SNF-like complex subunit BAF250/Osa（Pfam）。该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；CKB数据库报道为loss of function - predicted，OncoKB数据库报道为Likely Oncogenic，COSMIC数据库记录173次ARID1A蛋白第1850位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型D1850Tfs*33记录87次。
snvindel.gene_function: ARID1A基因属于抑癌基因，在动物实验中显示，ARID1A基因的功能与调节基因转录的增强子相关，其突变失活可能影响多种基因的表达和活性（PMID: 27941798）。ARID1A基因在多种肿瘤中均有发生，包括卵巢癌、子宫内膜癌、结直肠癌等（PMID: 21590771; PMID: 21900401） 。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a frameshift mutation, which induces a substitution of Aspartic acid with Threonine at position 1850 and causes termination of the protein at codon 1882.

evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项临床前研究表明（PMID: 27958275），ARID1A缺陷的结直肠癌细胞系对VE-821、Berzosertib（VX-970）、AZ20三种ATR抑制剂敏感，表现为细胞存活率降低，并且在细胞系异种移植瘤模型中，Berzosertib（VX-970）可抑制携带ARID1A失活突变的肿瘤细胞生长。
一项临床前研究表明（PMID: 27958275），ARID1A缺陷的结直肠癌细胞系对VE-821、Berzosertib（VX-970）、AZ20三种ATR抑制剂敏感，表现为细胞存活率降低，并且在细胞系异种移植瘤模型中，Berzosertib（VX-970）可抑制携带ARID1A失活突变的肿瘤细胞生长。

一项临床前实验中（PMID: 35852858），EZH2抑制剂GSK-126可抑制ARID1A突变的膀胱癌细胞系的生长（包括细胞活力、细胞增殖和克隆形成），并抑制这些细胞系构建的移植瘤模型中的肿瘤生长；其他EZH2相关抑制剂CPI-1205、EPZ-6438、MAK683也有类似的效果。另外，PIK3CA抑制剂阿培利司、Pictilisib、Dactolisib等可抑制ARD1A敲除或者突变的细胞的细胞活力；并且，在几个ARID1A敲除的细胞系中，与GSK-126与Pictilisib具有协同作用。
一项临床前研究表明（PMID: 26069190），ARID1A缺陷的结直肠癌细胞系和乳腺癌细胞系对PARP抑制剂Veliparib、奥拉帕利、鲁卡帕尼、他拉唑帕利敏感，表现为细胞凋亡增加，且在这两种细胞系异种移植瘤模型中，他拉唑帕利可抑制肿瘤生长。
一项临床前实验中（PMID: 27364904），达沙替尼可抑制多种携带ARID1A突变的卵巢透明细胞癌细胞系的生长，在移植瘤模型中，也可抑制肿瘤的生长。
一项Ia期临床研究中（NCT05226507），18位晚期实体瘤患者接受了至少一种剂量的NXP800治疗，截至2023年4月，最长的治疗持续时间达到10个月，该药物的临床活性支持了早期临床前数据。2023年8月，FDA授予NXP800治疗ARID1A突变的胆管癌孤儿药资格。
