一项回顾性研究中（PMID: 32111729），分析了3403位病人的数据，这些患者的肿瘤组织均有二代测序数据。在9个ARID1A发生率大于5%的癌种中，与ARID1A野生型的患者相比，ARID1A突变的患者中具有MSI-H和TMB-H的比例显著更高（20% vs 0.9%, p<0.001;26% vs 8.4%, p<0.001）。在接受检查点阻断免疫疗法后，ARID1A突变的患者（n=46）的中位PFS显著高于ARID1A野生型的患者（n=329）（11个月 vs 4个月，p=0.006），且该结果独立于MSI或TMB；另外，ARID1A突变患者的中位OS也显著高于野生型患者（31个月 vs 20个月），但是没有统计学差异。

一项回顾性研究中（PMID: 32111729），分析了3403位病人的数据，这些患者的肿瘤组织均有二代测序数据。在9个ARID1A发生率大于5%的癌种中，与ARID1A野生型的患者相比，ARID1A突变的患者中具有MSI-H和TMB-H的比例显著更高（20% vs 0.9%, p<0.001;26% vs 8.4%, p<0.001）。在接受检查点阻断免疫疗法后，ARID1A突变的患者（n=46）的中位PFS显著高于ARID1A野生型的患者（n=329）（11个月 vs 4个月，p=0.006），且该结果独立于MSI或TMB；另外，ARID1A突变患者的中位OS也显著高于野生型患者（31个月 vs 20个月），但是没有统计学差异。

一项II期临床试验（PMID: 32975815），入组39位肾细胞癌患者，其中乳头状特征的未分类肾细胞癌（uRCC）患者24例，乳头状肾细胞癌（pRCC）患者14例，乳头状特征的转座相关的RCC患者1例。在结果可评估的37位患者中，6个月PFS为78%，中位PFS为13.7个月，ORR为35%；中位随访17.6个月，中位OS为33.9个月。对其中33位患者进行NGS测序，发现ARID1A、FH、MET突变的患者具有响应。其中，100%的ARID1A患者（7/7）、91%的FH突变患者（10/11）达到6个月的无进展生存；57%的ARID1A突变患者和55%的FH突变患者有客观缓解。

一项首次人体、开放标签的I/II期临床试验（NCT04104776），旨在评估Tulmimetostat在晚期实体瘤和淋巴瘤患者中的疗效和安全性。研究招募了携带ARID1A突变的晚期实体瘤和淋巴瘤患者，这些患者在先前的治疗方案中出现了疾病进展。患者被分为6个疾病特异性队列：ARID1A突变体实体瘤（M1）、ARID1A突变体卵巢透明细胞癌（M2）、ARID1A突变体子宫内膜癌（M3）、淋巴瘤（M4）、胸膜或腹膜间皮瘤伴BAP1丢失（M5）、转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌（M6）。研究的主要终点是研究人员评估的客观缓解率（ORR）；次要终点包括无进展生存期（PFS）、缓解持续时间（DOR）、至症状缓解时间（TTR）、疾病控制率（DCR）、总生存期（OS）等。研究结果显示，在采用Simon两阶段设计的五个队列中（M4队列除外），M2、M3和M5共三个队列获得了进入第二阶段的资格。在M2中（n=14），4例最佳反应为部分缓解（PR），4例疾病稳定（SD），6例疾病进展（PD）。在M3中（n=8），2例最佳反应为完全缓解（CR），1例SD，2例PD，1例无法评估疗效，1例停止治疗。在M5中（n=21），3例最佳反应为PR，10例SD，6例PD，2例停止治疗。另外三个队列（不进入第二阶段研究）的数据如下：在M1中（n=10），1例获得未经确认的PR，3例SD，2例PD，4例停止治疗。在M4中（n=12），2例最佳反应为CR，1例最佳反应为PR，4例PD，5例停止治疗。在M6中（n=10），6例最佳缓解为SD，3例PD，1例停止治疗。基于上述研究，FDA授予Tulmimetostat（CPI-0209）快速通道资格，用于治疗携带ARID1A突变且在至少1种既往治疗中出现进展的、晚期复发性或转移性子宫内膜癌患者。
一项临床前研究表明（PMID: 26069190），ARID1A缺陷的结直肠癌细胞系和乳腺癌细胞系对PARP抑制剂Veliparib、奥拉帕利、鲁卡帕尼、他拉唑帕利敏感，表现为细胞凋亡增加，且在这两种细胞系异种移植瘤模型中，他拉唑帕利可抑制肿瘤生长。
一项临床前研究表明（PMID: 26069190），ARID1A缺陷的结直肠癌细胞系和乳腺癌细胞系对PARP抑制剂Veliparib、奥拉帕利、鲁卡帕尼、他拉唑帕利敏感，表现为细胞凋亡增加，且在这两种细胞系异种移植瘤模型中，他拉唑帕利可抑制肿瘤生长。
一项临床前研究表明（PMID: 26069190），ARID1A缺陷的结直肠癌细胞系和乳腺癌细胞系对PARP抑制剂Veliparib、奥拉帕利、鲁卡帕尼、他拉唑帕利敏感，表现为细胞凋亡增加，且在这两种细胞系异种移植瘤模型中，他拉唑帕利可抑制肿瘤生长。

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The full-length ARID1A gene encodes 2285 amino acids, this variant leads to the premature termination of protein coding at amino acid 1882, escaping nonsense-mediated mRNA decay, resulting in the loss of more than 10% of the coding amino acids, affecting protein domain: SWI/SNF-like complex subunit BAF250/Osa(Pfam). This variant is not recorded in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomAD or iJGVD databases; this variant is reported as loss of function - predicted in the CKB database, and Likely Oncogenic in the OncoKB database, the COSMIC database records 173 times of amino acid change at the ARID1A protein position 1850, of which the mutant D1850Tfs*33 is recorded 87 times.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The full-length ARID1A gene encodes 2285 amino acids, this variant leads to the premature termination of protein coding at amino acid 1882, escaping nonsense-mediated mRNA decay, resulting in the loss of more than 10% of the coding amino acids, affecting protein domain: SWI/SNF-like complex subunit BAF250/Osa(Pfam). This variant is not recorded in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomAD or iJGVD databases; this variant is reported as loss of function - predicted in the CKB database, and Likely Oncogenic in the OncoKB database, the COSMIC database records 173 times of amino acid change at the ARID1A protein position 1850, of which the mutant D1850Tfs*33 is recorded 87 times.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: ARID1A基因全长编码2285个氨基酸，该变异导致蛋白编码终止于第1882位氨基酸，逃逸无义介导的mRNA降解，造成超过10%的编码氨基酸丢失，影响蛋白结构功能域：SWI/SNF-like complex subunit BAF250/Osa（Pfam）。该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；CKB数据库报道为loss of function - predicted，OncoKB数据库报道为Likely Oncogenic，COSMIC数据库记录173次ARID1A蛋白第1850位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型D1850Tfs*33记录87次。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为移码突变，导致基因编码蛋白第1850位氨基酸由天冬氨酸突变为苏氨酸并于1882位发生终止。
snvindel.gene_function_en: ARID1A, AT rich interactive domain 1A (SWI1-like), is a member of the SWI/SNF chromatin remodeling complex and is involved in cell-cycle activation (PMID: 29136504). ARID1A has been reported to influence PI3K/AKT pathways (PMID: 24618703), and loss of function is commonly found in gastric, colorectal (PMID: 28937020), and bladder cancers (PMID: 28583311), while in liver cancer, Arida1a has a context dependent role (PMID: 29136504).

snvindel.gene_function: FGR基因，又名FGR原癌基因，编码的蛋白为Src家族酪氨酸激酶的成员之一，该蛋白是一种非受体酪氨酸激酶，在整合素介导的信号转导控制中发挥作用，并影响肌动蛋白细胞骨架结构和细胞迁移（PMID: 10547366）。WASF2基因和FGR基因的融合在黑色素瘤、卵巢癌和肺鳞状细胞癌中被观察到（PMID: 25204415）；FYB基因和FGR基因的融合在淋巴瘤中被观察到（Journal of Clinical Oncology 35, no. 15_suppl），FGR基因的表达增多在B细胞淋巴瘤中被观察到，并可能与HDAC抑制剂的耐药性有关（PMID: 27324824）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第42位氨基酸由精氨酸突变为谷氨酰胺。
snvindel.gene_function_en: FGR, FGR proto-oncogene, Src family tyrosine kinase, is a non-receptor tyrosine kinase that is a member of the Src gene family and plays a role in the control of integrin-mediated signal transduction, affecting the actin cytoskeletal structure and cell migration (PMID: 10547366). A fusion of WASF2 and FGR was identified in melanoma, ovarian cancer, and lung squamous cell carcinoma (PMID: 25204415) while a fusion of FYB and FGR was found in lymphoma (Journal of Clinical Oncology 35, no. 15_suppl), and increased expression of FGR has been observed in B-cell lymphomas and may be associated with resistance to HDAC inhibitors (PMID: 27324824).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: CSF3R基因为原癌基因，该变异为蛋白长度改变的变异。该变异在ExAC、gnomADe数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.000008249（1/121228）、0.000001368（2/1461818），1000G、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库无记录；CKB数据库报道为loss of function - predicted，COSMIC数据库记录32次CSF3R蛋白第469位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型S469Afs*22记录26次。
snvindel.gene_function: CSF3R，集落刺激因子3受体，编码调节骨髓祖细胞增殖和分化的细胞因子受体（PMID: 27789332）。 CSF3R突变通常发生在慢性中性粒细胞白血病和急性髓细胞性白血病中（PMID: 23896413, PMID: 30348809）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a frameshift mutation, which induces a substitution of Serine with Alanine at position 469 and causes termination of the protein at codon 490.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The CSF3R gene is an oncogene, this variant causes a change in protein length. The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.000008249(1/121228), 0.000001368(2/1461818) in the ExAC, gnomADe databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G, gnomADg or iJGVD databases; this variant is reported as loss of function - predicted  in the CKB database, the COSMIC database records 32 times of amino acid change at the CSF3R protein position 469, of which the mutant S469Afs*22 is recorded 26 times.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The CSF3R gene is an oncogene, this variant causes a change in protein length. The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.000008249(1/121228), 0.000001368(2/1461818) in the ExAC, gnomADe databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G, gnomADg or iJGVD databases; this variant is reported as loss of function - predicted  in the CKB database, the COSMIC database records 32 times of amino acid change at the CSF3R protein position 469, of which the mutant S469Afs*22 is recorded 26 times.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: CSF3R基因为原癌基因，该变异为蛋白长度改变的变异。该变异在ExAC、gnomADe数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.000008249（1/121228）、0.000001368（2/1461818），1000G、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库无记录；CKB数据库报道为loss of function - predicted，COSMIC数据库记录32次CSF3R蛋白第469位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型S469Afs*22记录26次。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为移码突变，导致基因编码蛋白第469位氨基酸由丝氨酸突变为丙氨酸并于490位发生终止。
snvindel.gene_function_en: CSF3R, colony stimulating factor 3 receptor, encodes a cytokine receptor regulating proliferation and differentiation of myeloid progenitor cells (PMID: 27789332). CSF3R mutations commonly occur in chronic neutrophilic leukemia and acute myeloid leukemia (PMID: 23896413, PMID: 30348809).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率为0.0002446（30/122652），ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库EAS人群等位基因频率分别为0.001276（11/8624）、0.0008914（35/39262）、0.001737（9/5180），1000G数据库EAS_CHS人群等位基因频率为0.009524（2/210）；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: 集落刺激因子 1 (CSF1) 是单核细胞/巨噬细胞存活、增殖和分化的主要调节因子，可维持肿瘤相关巨噬细胞 (TAM) 的促肿瘤发生功能。CSF1R，巨噬细胞集落刺激因子 1 受体，是 CSF1 和 IL34 的酪氨酸激酶和受体，在配体结合后激活 PI3K-AKT-mTOR、RAS-RAF-MEK-ERK 和 STAT 信号通路 (PMID: 22186992)。 可通过抑制CSF1R来治疗腱鞘巨细胞瘤。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 175th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Phenylalanine to Leucine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.0002446(30/122652) in the iJGVD database, 0.001276(11/8624), 0.0008914(35/39262), 0.001737(9/5180) in the EAS population of the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, 0.009524(2/210) in the EAS_CHS population of the 1000G database, respectively; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.0002446(30/122652) in the iJGVD database, 0.001276(11/8624), 0.0008914(35/39262), 0.001737(9/5180) in the EAS population of the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, 0.009524(2/210) in the EAS_CHS population of the 1000G database, respectively; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率为0.0002446（30/122652），ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库EAS人群等位基因频率分别为0.001276（11/8624）、0.0008914（35/39262）、0.001737（9/5180），1000G数据库EAS_CHS人群等位基因频率为0.009524（2/210）；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第175位氨基酸由苯丙氨酸突变为亮氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: encoded by CSF1 (Colony Stimulating Factor 1)  is a cytokine that controls the production, differentiation, and function of macrophages. Among its related pathways are Ras signaling pathway and PEDF Induced Signaling. Diseases associated with CSF1 include Pigmented Villonodular Synovitis and Tenosynovial Giant Cell Tumor.

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1268（635/5008）、0.07909（9598/121360）、0.06389（93405/1461880）、0.1092（16618/152124）、0.06855（8416/122766）；COSMIC数据库记录9次TENT5C蛋白第67位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型Q记录6次。
snvindel.gene_function: 末端核苷酸转移酶5C在信使RNA的多聚腺苷酸化中起作用（PMID: 30397099）。TENT5C突变和缺失在多发性骨髓瘤中很常见（PMID: 28619709;PMID: 26456599）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 67th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Histidine to Glutamine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.1268(635/5008), 0.07909(9598/121360), 0.06389(93405/1461880), 0.1092(16618/152124), 0.06855(8416/122766) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 9 times of amino acid change at the TENT5C protein position 67, of which the mutant H67Q is recorded 6 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.1268(635/5008), 0.07909(9598/121360), 0.06389(93405/1461880), 0.1092(16618/152124), 0.06855(8416/122766) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 9 times of amino acid change at the TENT5C protein position 67, of which the mutant H67Q is recorded 6 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1268（635/5008）、0.07909（9598/121360）、0.06389（93405/1461880）、0.1092（16618/152124）、0.06855（8416/122766）；COSMIC数据库记录9次TENT5C蛋白第67位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型Q记录6次。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第67位氨基酸由组氨酸突变为谷氨酰胺。
snvindel.gene_function_en: TENT5C, terminal nucleotidyltransferase 5C, plays a role in the polyadenylation of messenger RNA (PMID: 30397099). TENT5C mutations and deletions are frequent in multiple myeloma (PMID: 28619709, PMID: 26456599).

snvindel.gene_function: SPTA1是维持红细胞膜稳定性的细胞骨架网络的主要成分（PMID: 24569979）。SPTA1突变已在甲状腺乳头状癌（PMID: 31724970）、小细胞肺癌（PMID: 31612912）、前列腺癌（PMID: 30720096）和结直肠癌（PMID: 28280605）中发现。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 1858th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Leucine to Valine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2278(1141/5008), 0.2567(30954/120570), 0.2731(397913/1457228), 0.2536(38556/152012), 0.2328(28428/122134) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool BayesDel, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2278(1141/5008), 0.2567(30954/120570), 0.2731(397913/1457228), 0.2536(38556/152012), 0.2328(28428/122134) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool BayesDel, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第1858位氨基酸由亮氨酸突变为缬氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: SPTA1, spectrin alpha, erythrocytic 1, is a major component of the cytoskeletal network maintaining membrane stability of erythrocytes (PMID: 24569979). SPTA1 mutations have been identified in papillary thyroid carcinoma (PMID: 31724970), small cell lung cancer (PMID: 31612912), prostate adenocarcinoma (PMID: 30720096), and colorectal cancer (PMID: 28280605).

snvindel.gene_function: PAPPA2基因编码一个甲状腺素金属蛋白酶家族中的成员，可裂解胰岛素样生长因子结合蛋白5，被认为是胰岛素样生长因子（IGF）生物利用率的局部调节因子。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第716位氨基酸由缬氨酸突变为丙氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: This gene encodes a member of the pappalysin family of metzincin metalloproteinases. The encoded protein cleaves insulin-like growth factor-binding protein 5 and is thought to be a local regulator of insulin-like growth factor (IGF) bioavailability. Alternative splicing results in multiple transcript variants.

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.0003994（2/5008）、0.001736（213/122714），ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库EAS人群等位基因频率分别为0.008786（76/8650）、0.005416（215/39694）、0.006757（35/5180）；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: ABL2基因属于原癌基因，其编码蛋白为非受体酪氨酸激酶，在细胞外刺激与细胞生长、存活和侵袭信号传导途径中充当联络者的角色（PMID: 23842646）。目前在多种肿瘤类型中已观察到ABL2扩增、融合和表达改变，包括肝细胞癌（PMID: 24940071），白血病（PMID: 25098428）和胃癌（PMID: 29767389）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 78th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Arginine to Histidine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.0003994(2/5008), 0.001736(213/122714) in the 1000G, iJGVD databases, 0.008786(76/8650), 0.005416(215/39694), 0.006757(35/5180) in the EAS population of the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.0003994(2/5008), 0.001736(213/122714) in the 1000G, iJGVD databases, 0.008786(76/8650), 0.005416(215/39694), 0.006757(35/5180) in the EAS population of the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.0003994（2/5008）、0.001736（213/122714），ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库EAS人群等位基因频率分别为0.008786（76/8650）、0.005416（215/39694）、0.006757（35/5180）；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第78位氨基酸由精氨酸突变为组氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: ABL2, ABL proto-oncogene 2, non-receptor tyrosine kinase, serves as a liaison between extracellular stimuli and signaling pathways involved in cell growth, survival, and invasion (PMID: 23842646). ABL2 amplification, fusions, and altered expression has been observed in a variety of tumor types, including hepatocellular carcinoma (PMID: 24940071), leukemia (PMID: 25098428), and gastric cancer (PMID: 29767389).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2306（1155/5008）、0.3089（37492/121364）、0.3401（497143/1461852）、0.2822（42892/152002）、0.2021（24792/122656）；COSMIC数据库记录11次RNASEL蛋白第462位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型Q记录11次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: RNASEL基因编码干扰素调控的2-5A系统的一个组成部分，在干扰素的抗病毒和抗增殖作用中发挥作用。RNASEL基因的突变与前列腺癌的易感性有关，是遗传性前列腺癌1（HPC1）等位基因的候选基因。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 462nd amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Arginine to Glutamine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2306(1155/5008), 0.3089(37492/121364), 0.3401(497143/1461852), 0.2822(42892/152002), 0.2021(24792/122656) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 11 times of amino acid change at the RNASEL protein position 462, of which the mutant R462Q is recorded 11 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2306(1155/5008), 0.3089(37492/121364), 0.3401(497143/1461852), 0.2822(42892/152002), 0.2021(24792/122656) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 11 times of amino acid change at the RNASEL protein position 462, of which the mutant R462Q is recorded 11 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2306（1155/5008）、0.3089（37492/121364）、0.3401（497143/1461852）、0.2822（42892/152002）、0.2021（24792/122656）；COSMIC数据库记录11次RNASEL蛋白第462位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型Q记录11次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第462位氨基酸由精氨酸突变为谷氨酰胺。
snvindel.gene_function_en: This gene encodes a component of the interferon-regulated 2-5A system that functions in the antiviral and antiproliferative roles of interferons. Mutations in this gene have been associated with predisposition to prostate cancer and this gene is a candidate for the hereditary prostate cancer 1 (HPC1) allele.

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率为0.01313（1612/122810），1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库EAS人群等位基因频率分别为0.01587（16/1008）、0.02323（201/8652）、0.01632（648/39698）、0.01795（93/5180）；COSMIC数据库记录4次PTGS2蛋白第587位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型G587R记录3次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: PTGS2，前列腺素-过氧化物过氧化物合成酶2 ，也称为环加氧酶，是前列腺素生物合成中的关键酶，既充当双加氧酶又充当过氧化物酶。PTGS2表达与大肠癌患者的肿瘤复发风险增加和大肠癌特异性生存率降低有关（PMID: 23810915）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 587th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Glycine to Arginine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.01313(1612/122810) in the iJGVD database, 0.01587(16/1008), 0.02323(201/8652), 0.01632(648/39698), 0.01795(93/5180) in the EAS population of the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 4 times of amino acid change at the PTGS2 protein position 587, of which the mutant G587R is recorded 3 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.01313(1612/122810) in the iJGVD database, 0.01587(16/1008), 0.02323(201/8652), 0.01632(648/39698), 0.01795(93/5180) in the EAS population of the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 4 times of amino acid change at the PTGS2 protein position 587, of which the mutant G587R is recorded 3 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率为0.01313（1612/122810），1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库EAS人群等位基因频率分别为0.01587（16/1008）、0.02323（201/8652）、0.01632（648/39698）、0.01795（93/5180）；COSMIC数据库记录4次PTGS2蛋白第587位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型G587R记录3次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第587位氨基酸由甘氨酸突变为精氨酸。

snvindel.gene_function: IKBKE是B细胞中kappa轻多肽基因增强子的抑制剂，激酶epsilon，是I-kappaB家族成员，调节炎症和感染时NF-kappaB信号的激活（PMID:15102433，PMID:26025939）。IKBKE在几种肿瘤类型中过度表达，在三阴性乳腺癌中扩增（PMID:26025939，PMID:25365225）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第134位氨基酸由精氨酸突变为组氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: IKBKE, inhibitor of kappa light polypeptide gene enhancer in B-cells, kinase epsilon, is an I-kappaB family member that regulates activation of NF-kappaB signaling in response to inflammation and infection (PMID: 15102433, PMID: 26025939). IKBKE is over expressed in several tumor types, and is amplified in triple-negative breast cancer (PMID: 26025939, PMID: 25365225).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2314（1159/5008）、0.09648（11709/121366）、0.03592（52474/1460932）、0.1051（15983/152116）、0.4048（49538/122386）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，COSMIC数据库记录6次IKBKE蛋白第602位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型V记录5次。
snvindel.gene_function: IKBKE是B细胞中kappa轻多肽基因增强子的抑制剂，激酶epsilon，是I-kappaB家族成员，调节炎症和感染时NF-kappaB信号的激活（PMID:15102433，PMID:26025939）。IKBKE在几种肿瘤类型中过度表达，在三阴性乳腺癌中扩增（PMID:26025939，PMID:25365225）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 602nd amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Alanine to Valine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2314(1159/5008), 0.09648(11709/121366), 0.03592(52474/1460932), 0.1051(15983/152116), 0.4048(49538/122386) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool BayesDel, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2314(1159/5008), 0.09648(11709/121366), 0.03592(52474/1460932), 0.1051(15983/152116), 0.4048(49538/122386) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool BayesDel, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2314（1159/5008）、0.09648（11709/121366）、0.03592（52474/1460932）、0.1051（15983/152116）、0.4048（49538/122386）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，COSMIC数据库记录6次IKBKE蛋白第602位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型V记录5次。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第602位氨基酸由丙氨酸突变为缬氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: IKBKE, inhibitor of kappa light polypeptide gene enhancer in B-cells, kinase epsilon, is an I-kappaB family member that regulates activation of NF-kappaB signaling in response to inflammation and infection (PMID: 15102433, PMID: 26025939). IKBKE is over expressed in several tumor types, and is amplified in triple-negative breast cancer (PMID: 26025939, PMID: 25365225).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: GEN1基因耐受单倍剂量不足，该变异为蛋白长度改变的变异。该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.05931（297/5008）、0.08765（10602/120964）、0.08671（21729/250588）、0.08181（2567/31376）、0.08726（6754/77400）；COSMIC数据库记录10次GEN1蛋白第839位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型K839Efs*2记录1次。
snvindel.gene_function: GEN1，Flap内切酶GEN homolog 1，是一种结构特异性内切酶，能够在有丝分裂和减数分裂的双链DNA修复事件中处理Holliday连接体（PMID: 28327556）。在乳腺癌中已经发现蛋白截断的GEN1体细胞变异，但对BRCA1/2阴性的家族性乳腺癌易感性没有明显的贡献（PMID: 20512659）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a frameshift mutation, which induces a substitution of Lysine with Glutamic acid at position 839 and causes termination of the protein at codon 840.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The GEN1 gene either has no/little evidence for haploinsufficiency or dosage sensitivity unlikely, this variant causes a change in protein length. The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.05931(297/5008), 0.08765(10602/120964), 0.1031(150653/1460940), 0.07697(11714/152180), 0.08825(10783/122186) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=1168946) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars).
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The GEN1 gene either has no/little evidence for haploinsufficiency or dosage sensitivity unlikely, this variant causes a change in protein length. The allele frequency of this variant is 0.05931(297/5008), 0.08765(10602/120964), 0.08671(21729/250588), 0.08181(2567/31376), 0.08763(9513/108556) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; the COSMIC database records 15 times of amino acid change at the GEN1 protein position 839, of which the mutant K839Efs*2 is recorded 6 times.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: GEN1基因耐受单倍剂量不足，该变异为蛋白长度改变的变异。该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.05931（297/5008）、0.08765（10602/120964）、0.1031（150653/1460940）、0.07697（11714/152180）、0.08825（10783/122186）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=1168946）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为移码突变，导致基因编码蛋白第839位氨基酸由赖氨酸突变为谷氨酸并于840位发生终止。
snvindel.gene_function_en: GEN1, Flap endonuclease GEN homolog 1, is a structure-specific endonuclease capable of processing Holliday junctions during double-stranded DNA repair events within mitosis and meiosis (PMID: 28327556). Somatic truncating GEN1 variants have been identified in breast cancers, but do not contribute significantly to BRCA1/2-negative familial breast cancer susceptibility (PMID: 20512659).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1633（818/5008）、0.05826（7067/121308）、0.03049（44571/1461804）、0.1323（20106/152030）、0.1173（14371/122548）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，COSMIC数据库记录5次EPAS1蛋白第766位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型P记录5次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: EPAS1是一种含有内皮PAS结构域的蛋白质1，是缺氧诱导因子（HIF）的α亚基成员，是一种对氧敏感的转录复合物，失调时可促进肿瘤进展（PMID: 29032465;PMID: 22931260;PMID:  28322821）。 在副神经节瘤（PMID: 22931260;PMID: 23533246），嗜铬细胞瘤（PMID: 23533246）和血管母细胞瘤（PMID: 26514359）中已经鉴定出EPAS1突变。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 766th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Threonine to Proline.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.1633(818/5008), 0.05826(7067/121308), 0.03049(44571/1461804), 0.1323(20106/152030), 0.1173(14371/122548) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 7 times of amino acid change at the EPAS1 protein position 766, of which the mutant T766P is recorded 7 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.1633(818/5008), 0.05826(7067/121308), 0.03049(44571/1461804), 0.1323(20106/152030), 0.1173(14371/122548) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 7 times of amino acid change at the EPAS1 protein position 766, of which the mutant T766P is recorded 7 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1633（818/5008）、0.05826（7067/121308）、0.03049（44571/1461804）、0.1323（20106/152030）、0.1173（14371/122548）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，COSMIC数据库记录5次EPAS1蛋白第766位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型P记录5次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第766位氨基酸由苏氨酸突变为脯氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: EPAS1, endothelial PAS domain-containing protein 1, is an alpha subunit member of the hypoxia-inducible factor (HIF), which is an oxygen sensitive transcription complex that when dysregulated can promote tumor progression (PMID: 29032465, PMID: 22931260, PMID: 28322821). EPAS1 mutations have been identified in paraganglioma (PMID: 22931260, PMID: 23533246), pheochromocytoma (PMID: 23533246), and hemangioblastoma (PMID: 26514359).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1835（267218/1455968）、0.1888（28722/152158）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，OncoKB数据库报道为Inconclusive，COSMIC数据库记录24次MSH6蛋白第39位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型G39E记录23次。基于该变异的HCI致病性先验概率认为该变异为neutral。
snvindel.gene_function: MSH6基因属于抑癌基因，其编码蛋白能与MSH2蛋白形成异二聚体，共同构成MutSα错配修复（MMR）复合物。该复合物能够识别DNA复制过程中产生的错配碱基对与双核苷酸插入-缺失环，从而启动错配修复通路（PMID: 8816473）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 39th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Glycine to Glutamic acid.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.1835(267218/1455968), 0.1888(28722/152158) in the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=36581) is Benign in germline classification (review status: three stars). Based on HCI prior probability for pathogenicity, the variant is considered neural.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.1835(267218/1455968), 0.1888(28722/152158) in the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; this variant is reported as unknown in the CKB database, and Inconclusive in the OncoKB database, the COSMIC database records 24 times of amino acid change at the MSH6 protein position 39, of which the mutant G39E is recorded 23 times. Based on HCI prior probability for pathogenicity, the variant is considered neural.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1835（267218/1455968）、0.1888（28722/152158）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=36581）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为三颗星）。基于该变异的HCI致病性先验概率认为该变异为neutral。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第39位氨基酸由甘氨酸突变为谷氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: MSH6, mutS homolog 6, binds with Msh2 to form the MutS-alpha complex, which functions in initiation of the DNA mismatch repair system (PMID: 23391514) and is associated with microsatellite instability (MSI) (PMID: 30121009). Mutations in MSH6 are associated with susceptibility to colon cancer and endometrial cancer (PMID: 20028993), and germline MSH6 mutations are associated with Lynch (Hereditary Nonpolyposis Colorectal Cancer) syndrome (PMID: 15528792).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.01198（60/5008）、0.001363（167/122528），ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库AFR人群等位基因频率分别为0.03239（337/10406）、0.03516（1177/33480）、0.03376（1402/41524）；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: TCF7L1基因编码T细胞因子/淋巴增强因子家族转录因子的一员，可被β-catenin激活，介导Wnt信号通路，并被TGF-β信号通路拮抗。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 160th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Serine to Threonine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.01198(60/5008), 0.001363(167/122528) in the 1000G, iJGVD databases, 0.03239(337/10406), 0.03516(1177/33480), 0.03376(1402/41524) in the AFR population of the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.01198(60/5008), 0.001363(167/122528) in the 1000G, iJGVD databases, 0.03239(337/10406), 0.03516(1177/33480), 0.03376(1402/41524) in the AFR population of the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.01198（60/5008）、0.001363（167/122528），ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库AFR人群等位基因频率分别为0.03239（337/10406）、0.03516（1177/33480）、0.03376（1402/41524）；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第160位氨基酸由丝氨酸突变为苏氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: This gene encodes a member of the T cell factor/lymphoid enhancer factor family of transcription factors. These transcription factors are activated by beta catenin, mediate the Wnt signaling pathway and are antagonized by the transforming growth factor beta signaling pathway. The encoded protein contains a high mobility group-box DNA binding domain and participates in the regulation of cell cycle genes and cellular senescence.

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2843（1424/5008）、0.3138（13072/41652）、0.2532（358613/1416168）、0.2563（38982/152090）、0.288（35280/122504）；COSMIC数据库记录1次INPP4A蛋白第604位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型A记录1次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: INPP4A是一种脂质肌醇多磷酸4-磷酸酶，在PI3K/AKT信号通路中起负调控作用。INPP4A的主要功能是选择性水解肌醇环上的第4位磷酸基团，将PI(3,4)P2转化为PI(3)P (PMID: 24069021)。INPP4A主要在大脑中表达，并通过调节兴奋性毒性神经元死亡来维持大脑的完整性(PMID: 20463662)。INPP4A通过下调PI3K/AKT通路参与抑制小鼠细胞增殖和肿瘤生长(PMID: 21127264, PMID: 19325558)。最近的研究表明，BAP1和INPP4A在间皮瘤和石棉暴露肺腺癌患者中存在共突变(PMID: 26463840)。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 604th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Threonine to Alanine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2843(1424/5008), 0.3138(13072/41652), 0.2532(358613/1416168), 0.2563(38982/152090), 0.288(35280/122504) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 4 times of amino acid change at the INPP4A protein position 604, of which the mutant T604A is recorded 4 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2843(1424/5008), 0.3138(13072/41652), 0.2532(358613/1416168), 0.2563(38982/152090), 0.288(35280/122504) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 4 times of amino acid change at the INPP4A protein position 604, of which the mutant T604A is recorded 4 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2843（1424/5008）、0.3138（13072/41652）、0.2532（358613/1416168）、0.2563（38982/152090）、0.288（35280/122504）；COSMIC数据库记录1次INPP4A蛋白第604位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型A记录1次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为内含子区突变。
snvindel.gene_function_en: INPP4A is a lipid inositol polyphosphate 4-phosphatase that has a role in negatively regulating the PI3K/AKT signaling pathway. The primary function of INPP4A is to selectively hydrolyze the position 4 phosphate group on the inositol ring, converting PI(3,4)P2 to PI(3)P (PMID: 24069021). INPP4A is predominantly expressed in the brain and maintains the integrity of the brain by regulating excitotoxic neuronal death (PMID: 20463662). INPP4A has been implicated in the suppression of cell proliferation and tumor growth in mice via downregulation of the PI3K/AKT pathway (PMID: 21127264, PMID: 19325558). Recent studies have shown co-mutations with BAP1 and INPP4A in patients with mesothelioma and asbestos-exposed lung adenocarcinoma (PMID: 26463840).

snvindel.gene_function: RANBP2，RAN 结合蛋白 2，在核包膜的组装中发挥作用，并确保有丝分裂和染色体分离的进展 (PMID: 24113188)。 RANBP2 与 ALK 的融合已在急性粒单核细胞白血病、弥漫性大 B 细胞淋巴瘤和炎性肌纤维母细胞瘤中发现（PMID：24613277，PMID：24470379，PMID：12661011）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第1763位氨基酸由丙氨酸突变为丝氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: RANBP2, RAN binding protein 2, plays a role in appropriate assembly of the nuclear envelope and ensures proper progression of mitosis and chromosomal segregation (PMID: 24113188). RANBP2 fusions with ALK have been identified in acute myelomonocytic leukemia, diffuse large B-cell lymphoma, and an inflammatory myofibroblastic tumor (PMID: 24613277, PMID: 24470379, PMID: 12661011).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率为0.006339（778/122740），ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库EAS人群等位基因频率分别为0.003121（27/8652）、0.004736（188/39700）、0.003086（16/5184），1000G数据库EAS_KHV人群等位基因频率为0.0101（2/198）；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: ERCC3是TFIIH基础转录因子复合解旋酶XPB亚基，是ATP依赖的5'-3'DNA解旋酶，在核苷酸切除修复和RNA转录中起作用（PMID: 8157004）。ERCC3无义突变与乳腺癌风险相关（PMID: 27655433），ERCC3 mRNA表达与胰腺导管腺癌的不良预后相关（PMID: 27384421）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 735th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Serine to Proline.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.006339(778/122740) in the iJGVD database, 0.003121(27/8652), 0.004736(188/39700), 0.003086(16/5184) in the EAS population of the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, 0.0101(2/198) in the EAS_KHV population of the 1000G database, respectively; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: ERCC3, TFIIH basal transcription factor complex helicase XPB subunit, is an ATP-dependent 5’-3’ DNA helicase that plays a role in nucleotide excision repair and RNA transcription (PMID: 8157004). An ERCC3 nonsense mutation is associated with breast cancer risk (PMID: 27655433) and ERCC3 mRNA expression is correlated with poor prognosis in pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PMID: 27384421).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2175（1089/5008）、0.2338（28169/120498）、0.2286（333928/1460684）、0.1917（29143/152058）、0.4658（57142/122680）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，COSMIC数据库记录79次LRP1B蛋白第48位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型R记录79次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: LRP1B，低密度脂蛋白受体相关蛋白1B，是一种肿瘤抑制因子（PMID: 20095042）和细胞表面受体（PMID: 11384978），可负性调节尿激酶纤溶酶原激活物受体再生和细胞迁移（PMID: 12194987）。在黑色素瘤、肺癌、食管鳞状细胞癌、头颈部鳞状细胞癌和胃癌（PMID: 31164891）中经常观察到LRP1B突变，并且可能与高肿瘤突变负担有关（PMID: 31164891;PMID: 31493933）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 48th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Glutamine to Arginine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2175(1089/5008), 0.2338(28169/120498), 0.2286(333928/1460684), 0.1917(29143/152058), 0.4658(57142/122680) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 86 times of amino acid change at the LRP1B protein position 48, of which the mutant Q48R is recorded 86 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: LRP1B, LDL receptor related protein 1B, is a tumor repressor (PMID: 20095042) and a cell surface receptor (PMID: 11384978) that may negatively regulate urokinase plasminogen activator receptor regeneration and cell migration (PMID: 12194987). Mutations in LRP1B are frequently observed in melanoma, lung cancer, esophageal squamous-cell carcinoma, head and neck squamous cancer, and gastric cancer (PMID: 31164891) and may be associated with high tumor mutational burden (PMID: 31164891, PMID: 31493933).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.005391（27/5008）、0.006909（535/77432），ExAC、gnomADe数据库FIN人群等位基因频率分别为0.01421（94/6614）、0.01285（278/21640），gnomADg数据库AMR人群等位基因频率为0.01415（12/848）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，COSMIC数据库记录11次BARD1蛋白第658位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型C记录9次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: BARD1基因属于抑癌基因，编码蛋白是一种衔接蛋白，与BRCA1蛋白（PMID: 11573085）复合时，可作为E3连接酶发挥作用。BARD1-BRCA1复合物参与多种细胞过程，包括DNA修复、基因表达、复制叉维护和染色质调节的各个阶段（PMID: 27239795）。BARD1蛋白与BRCA1蛋白相互作用，结合新复制DNA上的DNA损伤，并将泛素分子添加到组蛋白H2A上的赖氨酸残基（PMID: 30804502）；BARD1-BRCA1复合物介导DNA损伤的切除，驱逐拮抗性修复蛋白53BP1，并将几种DNA反应蛋白募集到受损部位，包括RAD51蛋白（PMID: 27239795）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 658th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Arginine to Cysteine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.007157(878/122670) in the iJGVD database, 0.1217(111/912) in the AMI population of the gnomADg database, 0.01389(14/1008) in the EAS population of the 1000G database, 0.01421(94/6614), 0.01264(675/53400) in the FIN population of the ExAC, gnomADe databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=136500) is Benign/Likely benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 13 times of amino acid change at the BARD1 protein position 658, of which the mutant R658C is recorded 11 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率为0.007157（878/122670），gnomADg数据库AMI人群等位基因频率为0.1217（111/912），1000G数据库EAS人群等位基因频率为0.01389（14/1008），ExAC、gnomADe数据库FIN人群等位基因频率分别为0.01421（94/6614）、0.01264（675/53400）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=136500）的胚系突变分类为Benign/Likely benign（可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录13次BARD1蛋白第658位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型C记录11次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第658位氨基酸由精氨酸突变为半胱氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: BARD1, BRCA1 associated RING domain 1, forms a heterodimer with Brca1, which functions as an E3 ubiquitin ligase and mediator of DNA repair through homology-directed repair (HDR) (PMID: 8944023, PMID: 30925164) and centrosome regulation (PMID: 29858377). Germline mutations in BARD1 are associated with increased susceptibility to breast and ovarian cancers (PMID: 21344236), somatic mutations are highest in colon and endometrial cancers (PMID: 27283171) and BARD1 has also been implicated in neuroblastoma (PMID: 32047556).

snvindel.gene_function: PAX3，paired box 3，编码PAX基因家族的转录因子之一，在胎儿发育过程中发挥重要作用(PMID: 19221588)。 在腺泡状横纹肌肉瘤中发现PAX3与INO80D发生融合(PMID: 29104083, PMID: 24436047)。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为移码突变，导致基因编码蛋白第294位氨基酸由苯丙氨酸突变为丝氨酸并于380位发生终止。
snvindel.gene_function_en: PAX3, paired box 3, encodes for one of the transcription factors of the PAX gene family, which plays a prominent role during fetal development (PMID: 19221588). PAX3 fusions with FOXO1 are frequently observed in alveolar rhabdomyosarcoma (PMID: 24334454).

snvindel.gene_function: PAX3，paired box 3，编码PAX基因家族的转录因子之一，在胎儿发育过程中发挥重要作用(PMID: 19221588)。 在腺泡状横纹肌肉瘤中发现PAX3与INO80D发生融合(PMID: 29104083, PMID: 24436047)。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第50位氨基酸由脯氨酸突变为亮氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: PAX3, paired box 3, encodes for one of the transcription factors of the PAX gene family, which plays a prominent role during fetal development (PMID: 19221588). PAX3 fusions with FOXO1 are frequently observed in alveolar rhabdomyosarcoma (PMID: 24334454).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: PDCD1基因为原癌基因，该变异为蛋白长度改变的变异。该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.000002113（3/1419582）、0.000006601（1/151498），1000G、ExAC、iJGVD数据库无记录；COSMIC数据库记录35次PDCD1蛋白第36位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型T36Pfs*9记录26次。
snvindel.gene_function: PDCD1为程序性细胞死亡1，编码受体PD-1，在免疫细胞上表达，并与配体PD-L1和PD-L2相互作用后对免疫反应产生抑制作用（PMID: 26681673， PMID: 24403232）。肿瘤治疗中抑制PDCD1 （PD-1）可减轻抗肿瘤免疫应答的抑制（PMID: 26325035、PMID: 26681673、PMID: 26320063、PMID: 24403232）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a frameshift mutation, which induces a substitution of Threonine with Proline at position 36 and causes termination of the protein at codon 44.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The PDCD1 gene is an oncogene, this variant causes a change in protein length. The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.000002113(3/1419582), 0.000006601(1/151498) in the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G, ExAC or iJGVD databases; the COSMIC database records 35 times of amino acid change at the PDCD1 protein position 36, of which the mutant T36Pfs*9 is recorded 26 times.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The PDCD1 gene is an oncogene, this variant causes a change in protein length. The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.000002113(3/1419582), 0.000006601(1/151498) in the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G, ExAC or iJGVD databases; the COSMIC database records 35 times of amino acid change at the PDCD1 protein position 36, of which the mutant T36Pfs*9 is recorded 26 times.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: PDCD1基因为原癌基因，该变异为蛋白长度改变的变异。该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.000002113（3/1419582）、0.000006601（1/151498），1000G、ExAC、iJGVD数据库无记录；COSMIC数据库记录35次PDCD1蛋白第36位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型T36Pfs*9记录26次。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为移码突变，导致基因编码蛋白第36位氨基酸由苏氨酸突变为脯氨酸并于44位发生终止。
snvindel.gene_function_en: PDCD1, programmed cell death 1, encodes the receptor PD-1, which is expressed on immune cells and has an inhibitory effect on immune response upon interaction with its ligands, PD-L1 and PD-L2 (PMID: 26681673, PMID: 24403232). PDCD1 (PD-1) inhibition in cancer therapy may relieve suppression of anti-tumor immune response (PMID: 26325035, PMID: 26681673, PMID: 26320063, PMID: 24403232).

snvindel.gene_function: XPC（XPC 复合物亚基，DNA 损伤识别和修复因子）是一种蛋白质编码基因。与XPC相关的疾病包括色素性皮肤病-C组。其相关途径包括蛋白质代谢和转录偶联核苷酸切除修复（TC-NER）。在缺乏DNA修复的情况下，XPC复合物还充当转录辅激活剂：XPC与DNA结合转录因子 E2F1 在特定启动子上相互作用，招募KAT2A和组蛋白乙酰转移酶复合物（HAT）（PMID: 29973595, PMID: 31527837）。KAT2A 的招募会特异性地促进组蛋白变体H2A.Z.1/H2A.Z的乙酰化，但不会促进H2A.Z.2/H2A.V的乙酰化，从而促进靶基因的表达（PMID: 31527837）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第787位氨基酸由天冬氨酸突变为甘氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: XPC (XPC Complex Subunit, DNA Damage Recognition And Repair Factor) is a Protein Coding gene. Diseases associated with XPC include Xeroderma Pigmentosum, Complementation Group C and Xeroderma Pigmentosum, Variant Type. Among its related pathways are Metabolism of proteins and Transcription-Coupled Nucleotide Excision Repair (TC-NER). In absence of DNA repair, the XPC complex also acts as a transcription coactivator: XPC interacts with the DNA-binding transcription factor E2F1 at a subset of promoters to recruit KAT2A and histone acetyltransferase complexes (HAT) (PubMed:29973595, PubMed:31527837). KAT2A recruitment specifically promotes acetylation of histone variant H2A.Z.1/H2A.Z, but not H2A.Z.2/H2A.V, thereby promoting expression of target genes (PMID: 31527837).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率为0.009727（1191/122438），1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库EAS人群等位基因频率分别为0.01488（15/1008）、0.01387（120/8652）、0.01239（492/39700）、0.01351（70/5180）；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: TGFBR2基因属于抑癌基因，是一种丝氨酸/苏氨酸蛋白激酶，属于转化生长因子β（TGFβ）家族（PMID: 22992590）。TGFβ信号控制包括细胞增殖、分化和组织稳态的多种生物过程（PMID: 22992590, PMID: 11057902）。TGFBR2为II型受体，可与其他TGFβ家族受体通过异源二聚化以启动下游信号传导（PMID: 22992590），在TGFβ家族配体激活后，TGFBR2磷酸化其二聚体并诱导下游效应子（如SMAD蛋白）的磷酸化，后者可控制基因调节（PMID: 22992590, PMID: 18662538）。TGFBR2的种系突变已在常染色体Loeys-Dietz综合征2型和Marfan综合征中被发现（PMID: 8317497）。与洛伊迪茨综合征相关的TGFBR2突变在细胞系中表现为受体功能失活（PMID: 15235604）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 315th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Threonine to Methionine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.009727(1191/122438) in the iJGVD database, 0.01488(15/1008), 0.01387(120/8652), 0.01239(492/39700), 0.01351(70/5180) in the EAS population of the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: TGFBR2, transforming growth factor, beta receptor II, is a membrane bound Ser/Thr protein kinase that heterodimerize with Tgfbr1 to meidate Tgf beta signaling (PMID: 15270668). Mutations or abnormal expression of Tgfbr2 have been reported in colon and pancreatic cancers (PMID: 15256431, PMID: 25060520).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.001006（1471/1461884）、0.001054（160/151822）；CKB数据库报道为loss of function，OncoKB数据库报道为Inconclusive，COSMIC数据库记录71次MLH1蛋白第384位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型V384D记录68次。研究通过胞外错配修复活性分析实验证明该变异不影响基因正常功能（in vitro MMR activity:64.8%, relative MLH1 expression:>75%, definition:MMR+）（PMID: 17510385）。基于该变异的HCI致病性先验概率认为该变异为disease-causing。
snvindel.gene_function: MLH1基因属于肿瘤抑制基因（PMID: 30562755），编码蛋白与PMS2二聚化，形成DNA错配修复系统的一个组成部分（PMID: 16873062），并与微卫星不稳定性（MSI）（PMID: 30121009）和基因组稳定性（PMID: 31747945）相关。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 384th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Valine to Aspartic acid.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.001006(1471/1461884), 0.001054(160/151822) in the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=41632) is Benign in germline classification (review status: three stars). This variant was shown not to affect normal gene function in CIMRA (in vitro MMR activity:64.8%, relative MLH1 expression:>75%, definition:MMR+) (PMID: 17510385). Based on HCI prior probability for pathogenicity, the variant is considered disease-causing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.001006(1471/1461884), 0.001054(160/151822) in the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; this variant is reported as loss of function in the CKB database, and Inconclusive in the OncoKB database, the COSMIC database records 71 times of amino acid change at the MLH1 protein position 384, of which the mutant V384D is recorded 68 times. This variant was shown not to affect normal gene function in CIMRA (in vitro MMR activity:64.8%, relative MLH1 expression:>75%, definition:MMR+) (PMID: 17510385). Based on HCI prior probability for pathogenicity, the variant is considered disease-causing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.001006（1471/1461884）、0.001054（160/151822）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=41632）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为三颗星）。研究通过胞外错配修复活性分析实验证明该变异不影响基因正常功能（in vitro MMR activity:64.8%, relative MLH1 expression:>75%, definition:MMR+）（PMID: 17510385）。基于该变异的HCI致病性先验概率认为该变异为disease-causing。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第384位氨基酸由缬氨酸突变为天冬氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: MLH1, mutL homolog 1, is a tumor suppressor (PMID: 30562755) that dimerizes with Pms2 to form a component of the DNA mismatch repair (MMR) system (PMID: 16873062), and is associated with microsatellite instability (MSI) (PMID: 30121009) and genomic stability (PMID: 31747945). MLH1 promoter hypermethylation, resulting in Mlh1 deficiency, is frequently associated with sporadic colorectal, gastric, and esophageal cancers (PMID: 23555617, PMID: 21988782, PMID: 28224663, PMID: 28454461), and germline MLH1 mutations are associated with Lynch (Hereditary Nonpolyposis Colorectal Cancer) syndrome (PMID: 15528792).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.0003994（2/5008）、0.01248（1512/121200），ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库EAS人群等位基因频率分别为0.001502（13/8654）、0.006678（265/39680）、0.0029（15/5172）；COSMIC数据库记录6次SETD2蛋白第2421位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型A记录6次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: 组蛋白赖氨酸N-甲基转移酶SETD2通过H3K36调节染色质结构以影响基因转录（PMID: 28159833；PMID: 28386724），并在基因组稳定性中发挥作用（PMID: 31747945）。在肾透明细胞癌（PMID: 28260718）、乳腺癌（PMID: 20501857）和肺癌（PMID: 28202515）中发现了Setd2的功能丧失和表达降低。

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: SETD2, histone-lysine N-methyltransferase SETD2, regulates chromatin structure through H3K36 to influence gene transcription (PMID: 28159833; PMID: 28386724) and plays a role in genomic stability (PMID: 31747945). Loss of function and decreased expression of Setd2 has been demonstrated in clear cell renal cell carcinoma (PMID: 28260718), breast cancer (PMID: 20501857) and lung cancer (PMID: 28202515).

snvindel.gene_function: 巨噬细胞刺激1受体MST1R编码受体酪氨酸激酶RON，酪氨酸激酶RON作为巨噬细胞刺激蛋白的受体参与细胞迁移和分化(PMID: 21543897, PMID: 23792360)。MST1R的改变与几种肿瘤类型相关(PMID: 23792360)，过表达与胰腺癌进展相关(PMID: 30967626)。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第902位氨基酸由甘氨酸突变为天冬氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: MST1R, macrophage stimulating 1 receptor, encodes the receptor tyrosine kinase RON, which acts as a receptor for macrophage-stimulating protein and is involved in cell migration and differentiation (PMID: 21543897, PMID: 23792360). Alterations in MST1R are associated with several tumor types (PMID: 23792360) and overexpression has been correlated with pancreatic cancer progression (PMID: 30967626).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在ExAC、gnomADe、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.00001653（2/120972）、0.00001483（21/1416180）、0.000008160（1/122556），1000G、gnomADg数据库无记录；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: PBRM1基因属于抑癌基因，编码蛋白质BAF180，为核小体-重构复合物转换缺陷/蔗糖非发酵（SWI/SNF）的组分（PMID:21248752）。核小体是包裹DNA的组蛋白八聚体，其作用是调节转录因子和RNA聚合酶的暴露(PMID: 23113498)。重组复合物如SWI/SNF家族可使DNA/组蛋白接触放松、重新定位和断裂，使DNA易于调节(PMID: 21654818)。与PBRM1基因突变相关的肿瘤有透明细胞肾细胞癌、透明细胞乳头状肾细胞癌等。

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: PBRM1, polybromo 1, is a subunit of the PBAF complex, which functions in chromatin remodeling to modulate gene expression (PMID: 23867514). PBRM1 is frequently mutated in clear cell renal cell carcinoma (PMID: 19084573, PMID: 31861590).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异可能形成功能损伤或失活的蛋白。该变异在gnomADe数据库人群等位基因频率为0.0000006863（1/1457170），1000G、ExAC、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库无记录；OncoKB数据库报道为Likely Oncogenic，COSMIC数据库记录14次EPHA3蛋白第847位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型M847Wfs*10记录11次。
snvindel.gene_function: EPHA3，Aphrin A型受体3，是一种Ephrin受体酪氨酸激酶，参与细胞粘附，迁移和上皮-间充质转化（PMID: 23410976）。 Epha3的过表达将肿瘤细胞维持在分化程度较低的状态（PMID: 23410976），可能预示着胃癌的进展（PMID: 28465671;PMID: 30066881;PMID: 24908114;PMID: 22350700），并且经常 在肺癌中观察到Epha3体细胞突变（PMID: 22242939）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a frameshift mutation, which induces a substitution of Methionine with Tryptophan at position 847 and causes termination of the protein at codon 856.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: This variant is expected to form functionally impaired or inactive proteins. The allele frequency of this variant is 0.0000006863(1/1457170) in the gnomADe database, with no record in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADg or iJGVD databases; this variant is reported as Likely Oncogenic in the OncoKB database, the COSMIC database records 14 times of amino acid change at the EPHA3 protein position 847, of which the mutant M847Wfs*10 is recorded 11 times.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: This variant is expected to form functionally impaired or inactive proteins. The allele frequency of this variant is 0.0000006863(1/1457170) in the gnomADe database, with no record in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADg or iJGVD databases; this variant is reported as Likely Oncogenic in the OncoKB database, the COSMIC database records 14 times of amino acid change at the EPHA3 protein position 847, of which the mutant M847Wfs*10 is recorded 11 times.

snvindel.gene_function_en: EPHA3, Ephrin type-A receptor 3, is an ephrin receptor tyrosine kinase involved in cell adhesion, migration, and epithelial-to-mesenchymal transition (PMID: 23410976). Overexpression of Epha3 maintains tumor cells in a less differentiated state (PMID: 23410976), may be prognostic for gastric cancer progression (PMID: 28465671, PMID: 30066881, PMID: 24908114, PMID: 22350700), and Epha3 somatic mutations have been frequently observed in lung cancer (PMID: 22242939).

snvindel.gene_function: EPHA6可能激活跨膜-ephrin受体活性，参与轴突引导，参与激酶活性的正向调节以及跨膜受体蛋白酪氨酸激酶信号传导途径。

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: EPHA6 (EPH Receptor A6) is a Protein Coding gene. Predicted to enable transmembrane-ephrin receptor activity. Predicted to be involved in axon guidance; positive regulation of kinase activity; and transmembrane receptor protein tyrosine kinase signaling pathway.

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1859（931/5008）、0.1888（22853/121026）、0.181（264528/1461800）、0.1779（27068/152170）、0.2434（29890/122816）；COSMIC数据库记录6次UMPS蛋白第213位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型A记录6次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: UMPS（单磷酸尿苷合成酶）是一种蛋白质编码基因。与UMPS相关的疾病包括Orotic尿酸和嘧啶代谢紊乱。其相关途径包括嘧啶脱氧核糖核苷酸从头合成和代谢途径。与该基因有关的基因本体论（GO）注释包括转移酶活性和orotidine-5'-磷酸脱羧酶活性。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 213th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Glycine to Alanine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.1859(931/5008), 0.1888(22853/121026), 0.181(264528/1461800), 0.1779(27068/152170), 0.2434(29890/122816) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 11 times of amino acid change at the UMPS protein position 213, of which the mutant G213A is recorded 11 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.1859(931/5008), 0.1888(22853/121026), 0.181(264528/1461800), 0.1779(27068/152170), 0.2434(29890/122816) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 11 times of amino acid change at the UMPS protein position 213, of which the mutant G213A is recorded 11 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1859（931/5008）、0.1888（22853/121026）、0.181（264528/1461800）、0.1779（27068/152170）、0.2434（29890/122816）；COSMIC数据库记录6次UMPS蛋白第213位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型A记录6次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第213位氨基酸由甘氨酸突变为丙氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: UMPS (Uridine Monophosphate Synthetase) is a Protein Coding gene. Diseases associated with UMPS include Orotic Aciduria and Pyrimidine Metabolic Disorder. Among its related pathways are superpathway of pyrimidine deoxyribonucleotides de novo biosynthesis and Metabolism. Gene Ontology (GO) annotations related to this gene include transferase activity and orotidine-5'-phosphate decarboxylase activity.

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.01178（59/5008）、0.04093（5020/122660），ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库EAS人群等位基因频率分别为0.0509（439/8624）、0.047（1866/39700）、0.05242（271/5170）；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: GATA2基因属于原癌基因，编码的蛋白是一种锌指转录因子，在调节造血干细胞的增殖和存活中起着重要作用（PMID: 22192845）。GATA2基因突变与骨髓增生异常综合征和白血病相关（PMID: 22192845），该基因表达的降低与黑色素瘤进展相关（PMID: 29156497）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 250th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Proline to Alanine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.01178(59/5008), 0.04093(5020/122660) in the 1000G, iJGVD databases, 0.0509(439/8624), 0.047(1866/39700), 0.05242(271/5170) in the EAS population of the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records twice of amino acid change at the GATA2 protein position 250, of which the mutant P250A is recorded once. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.01178(59/5008), 0.04093(5020/122660) in the 1000G, iJGVD databases, 0.0509(439/8624), 0.047(1866/39700), 0.05242(271/5170) in the EAS population of the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records twice of amino acid change at the GATA2 protein position 250, of which the mutant P250A is recorded once. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第250位氨基酸由脯氨酸突变为丙氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: GATA2, GATA binding protein 2, is a zinc-finger transcription factor that plays a central role in regulating the proliferation and survival of hematopoietic stem cells (PMID: 22192845). Mutations in GATA2 are associated with myelodysplastic syndrome and leukemia (PMID: 22192845) and decreased expression has been associated with melanoma progression (PMID: 29156497).

snvindel.gene_function_en: GATA2, GATA binding protein 2, is a zinc-finger transcription factor that plays a central role in regulating the proliferation and survival of hematopoietic stem cells (PMID: 22192845). Mutations in GATA2 are associated with myelodysplastic syndrome and leukemia (PMID: 22192845) and decreased expression has been associated with melanoma progression (PMID: 29156497).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1022（512/5008）、0.1328（16072/121036）、0.1306（32811/251230）、0.1337（4192/31360）、0.1328（10252/77218）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，COSMIC数据库记录32次ATR蛋白第2425位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型Q记录26次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: ATR基因属于抑癌基因，其编码蛋白是一种丝氨酸/苏氨酸激酶，该蛋白与ATM蛋白同属一个激酶家族，在DNA损伤应答中扮演关键角色。ATR蛋白响应DNA损伤信号与单链DNA暴露信号，进而激活细胞周期检查点与DNA修复通路（PMID: 12791985, PMID: 20818375, PMID: 17157788）。此外，它也参与调控端粒维持、DNA复制起始及减数分裂等细胞周期核心过程（PMID: 17687332, PMID: 15220931, PMID: 23824539）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 2425th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Arginine to Glutamine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.1022(512/5008), 0.1328(16072/121036), 0.1487(217372/1461652), 0.1274(19375/152120), 0.1332(16210/121724) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=136470) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 35 times of amino acid change at the ATR protein position 2425, of which the mutant R2425Q is recorded 29 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.1022(512/5008), 0.1328(16072/121036), 0.1306(32811/251230), 0.1337(4192/31360), 0.1328(14394/108350) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; this variant is reported as unknown  in the CKB database, the COSMIC database records 35 times of amino acid change at the ATR protein position 2425, of which the mutant R2425Q is recorded 29 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1022（512/5008）、0.1328（16072/121036）、0.1487（217372/1461652）、0.1274（19375/152120）、0.1332（16210/121724）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=136470）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录34次ATR蛋白第2425位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型Q记录28次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。

snvindel.gene_function_en: ATR, ataxia telangiectasia and Rad3 related, is involved in regulation of the DNA damage response and mediation of cell-cycle checkpoints (PMID: 25512053). Inhibition of Atr selectively sensitizes cancerous cells to radiation and chemotherapy (PMID: 23583268).

snvindel.gene_function: ATR基因属于抑癌基因，其编码蛋白是一种丝氨酸/苏氨酸激酶，该蛋白与ATM蛋白同属一个激酶家族，在DNA损伤应答中扮演关键角色。ATR蛋白响应DNA损伤信号与单链DNA暴露信号，进而激活细胞周期检查点与DNA修复通路（PMID: 12791985, PMID: 20818375, PMID: 17157788）。此外，它也参与调控端粒维持、DNA复制起始及减数分裂等细胞周期核心过程（PMID: 17687332, PMID: 15220931, PMID: 23824539）。

snvindel.gene_function_en: ATR, ataxia telangiectasia and Rad3 related, is involved in regulation of the DNA damage response and mediation of cell-cycle checkpoints (PMID: 25512053). Inhibition of Atr selectively sensitizes cancerous cells to radiation and chemotherapy (PMID: 23583268).

snvindel.gene_function: MAP3K13是一种促分裂原活化的蛋白激酶激酶激酶13，是JNK途径信号传导（PMID: 11726277）中涉及的混合谱系激酶（MLK）蛋白家族的成员。 在乳腺癌中已鉴定出MAP3K13突变（PMID: 22722201），在头颈部鳞状细胞癌中已观察到扩增（PMID: 28760853）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第110位氨基酸由苏氨酸突变为异亮氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: MAP3K13, mitogen-activated protein kinase kinase kinase 13, is a member of the mixed lineage kinase (MLK) protein family that is involved in JNK pathway signaling (PMID: 11726277). MAP3K13 mutations have been identified in breast cancer (PMID: 22722201), and amplification has been observed in head and neck squamous cell carcinoma (PMID: 28760853).

snvindel.gene_function: ETV5是ETS变体5，是ETS转录因子家族的成员（PMID: 18781147）。 在前列腺癌中已经观察到ETV5与TMPRSS2和SLC5A3融合，并且该基因过表达可调节卵巢癌中的细胞粘附和增殖（PMID: 18781147;PMID: 21520040）。

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: ETV5, ETS variant 5, is a member of the ETS family of transcription factors (PMID: 18781147). ETV5 fusions have been observed with TMPRSS2 and SLC5A3 in prostate cancer and over-expression regulates cell adhesion and proliferation in ovarian cancer (PMID: 18781147, PMID: 21520040).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1851（927/5008）、0.1759（17120/97324）、0.15（218845/1458596）、0.2123（32277/152024）、0.09054（11099/122586）；COSMIC数据库记录9次BCL6蛋白第493位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型T记录8次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: BCL6属于抗细胞凋亡家族，被认为是转录阻遏物，在中心B细胞中起转录阻遏物的作用，在B淋巴细胞发育中起作用，并且对细胞存活和增殖至关重要（PMID: 20498019, PMID: 31788471）。BCL6表达增加与实体和血液系统恶性肿瘤相关，包括DLBCL，神经母细胞瘤，乳腺癌（PMID: 24917186）和B细胞急性淋巴细胞白血病（PMID: 31395741）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 493rd amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Alanine to Threonine.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: BCL6, BCL6 transcription repressor, functions as a transcriptional repressor in germinal center B cells, playing a role in B-lymphocyte development, and is critical for cell survival and proliferation (PMID: 20498019, PMID: 31788471). Increased expression of BCL6 has been associated with both solid and hematological malignancies including DLBCL, neuroblastoma, breast cancer (PMID: 24917186), and B-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia (PMID: 31395741).

snvindel.gene_function: FGFR3基因属于原癌基因，编码的蛋白为成纤维细胞生长因子受体（FGFR）家族成员之一，成熟的FGFR3蛋白包括几个主要的结构域，胞外的免疫球蛋白结构域，跨膜区域、胞内的蛋白激酶区域，FGFR蛋白的胞外段可与成纤维细胞生长因子结合，并启动下游的MAP、JAK/STAT和PI3K/AKT信号通路，最终影响细胞的增殖、生长、迁移与分化。FGFR3基因的激活性突变其原理主要是导致蛋白二聚化而组成性激活蛋白激酶区域，或是导致蛋白激酶区域发生结构性转变。该基因突变在多种肿瘤中均有报道，包括乳腺癌、结直肠癌、肺癌、胰腺癌、肾细胞癌、膀胱癌等等。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第682位氨基酸由缬氨酸突变为异亮氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: FGFR3, fibroblast growth factor receptor 3, is a receptor tyrosine kinase activated upon binding of the FGF ligand, which activates RAS-MAPK and PI3K-AKT pathways (PMID: 22508544). Altered function of FGFR3 in cancer may lead to increased cell proliferation and decreased apoptosis (PMID: 22508544) and mutations and fusions are commonly observed in bladder cancer (PMID: 30975452, PMID: 23175443).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.000001368（2/1461868）、0.000006574（1/152114），1000G、ExAC、iJGVD数据库无记录；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: PDGFRA基因属于原癌基因。基因编码血小板衍生生长因子，是一种表面受体酪氨酸激酶，与其相应的配体PDGF结合后活化，再激活磷脂酰肌醇、cAMP及多种蛋白质的磷酸化途径，调控细胞的分裂和增殖。当基因激活异常时，会导致肿瘤的发生并促进肿瘤血管生成（PMID: 21605429）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 79th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Glycine to Serine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.000001368(2/1461868), 0.000006574(1/152114) in the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G, ExAC or iJGVD databases; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: PDGFRA, platelet-derived growth factor receptor alpha, is a receptor tyrosine kinase that activates PI3K/Akt, RAS/MAPK, and JAK/STAT pathways to promote cell proliferation and survival (PMID: 21605429). PDGFRA mutations have been detected in melanoma, AML, peripheral nerve sheath tumors, sarcoma, and neuroendocrine carcinomas (PMID: 23752188, PMID: 20685895), several fusions have also been reported (PMID: 22432087, PMID: 26276769), and amplification has been observed in glioblastoma (PMID: 23438035).

snvindel.gene_function_en: PDGFRA, platelet-derived growth factor receptor alpha, is a receptor tyrosine kinase that activates PI3K/Akt, RAS/MAPK, and JAK/STAT pathways to promote cell proliferation and survival (PMID: 21605429). PDGFRA mutations have been detected in melanoma, AML, peripheral nerve sheath tumors, sarcoma, and neuroendocrine carcinomas (PMID: 23752188, PMID: 20685895), several fusions have also been reported (PMID: 22432087, PMID: 26276769), and amplification has been observed in glioblastoma (PMID: 23438035).

snvindel.gene_function: KDR基因属于原癌基因，是一种内皮细胞表面受体酪氨酸激酶，是血管内皮生长因子蛋白家族的成员，通过激活RAF-MEK-MAP和PI3K通路在血管生成和细胞增殖中发挥作用 （PMID: 25568876; PMID: 29093528; PMID: 26578684）。KDR基因突变在肿瘤中很少见，在肉瘤和头颈部鳞状细胞癌中均有报道。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第789位氨基酸由缬氨酸突变为异亮氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: KDR (VEGFR2), vascular endothelial growth factor receptor 2, is an endothelial cell surface receptor tyrosine kinase and member of the vascular endothelial growth factor family of proteins that plays a role in angiogenesis and cell proliferation through activation of RAF-MEK-MAP and PI3K-AKT pathways (PMID: 25568876, PMID: 29093528, PMID: 26578684). KDR amplification and overexpression have been reported in a variety of tumor types (PMID: 21382095, PMID: 27218826, PMID: 25231439, PMID: 20606037) and somatic mutations have been reported in sarcomas and head and neck squamous cell carcinomas (PMID: 22314185, PMID: 11801954).

snvindel.gene_function: TET2，甲基胞嘧啶双加氧酶TET2，是10 - 11易位基因家族的成员，在DNA甲基化和造血过程中起作用（PMID: 26099018;PMID: 25510268;PMID: 27848178）。TET2已被确认为血液系统恶性肿瘤中的肿瘤抑制因子，TET2突变在包括骨髓增生异常综合征、慢性粒细胞白血病和非典型慢性粒细胞白血病（PMID: 26099018;PMID: 22240200;PMID: 30138727）中常见，在胶质母细胞瘤中观察到表观遗传失调（PMID: 29899831）。

snvindel.gene_function_en: TET2, methylcytosine dioxygenase TET2, is a member of the ten-eleven-translocation family of genes that plays a role in DNA methylation and is involved in hematopoesis (PMID: 26099018, PMID: 25510268, PMID: 27848178). TET2 has been identified as a tumor suppressor in hematological malignancies, and mutations in TET2 are common in hematological cancers including myelodysplastic syndrome, chronic myelomoncytic leukemia, and atypical CML (PMID: 26099018, PMID: 22240200, PMID: 30138727) and epigenetic dysregulation has been observed in glioblastoma (PMID: 29899831).

snvindel.gene_function: TET2，甲基胞嘧啶双加氧酶TET2，是10 - 11易位基因家族的成员，在DNA甲基化和造血过程中起作用（PMID: 26099018;PMID: 25510268;PMID: 27848178）。TET2已被确认为血液系统恶性肿瘤中的肿瘤抑制因子，TET2突变在包括骨髓增生异常综合征、慢性粒细胞白血病和非典型慢性粒细胞白血病（PMID: 26099018;PMID: 22240200;PMID: 30138727）中常见，在胶质母细胞瘤中观察到表观遗传失调（PMID: 29899831）。

snvindel.gene_function: FAT1，FAT非典型钙粘着蛋白1，是一种跨膜非典型钙粘着蛋白，可通过抑制Yap1途径调节细胞生长，并参与细胞迁移和侵袭（PMID: 23076869;PMID: 29565465）。 已在胶质母细胞瘤，星形细胞瘤和口腔癌中鉴定出FAT1纯合缺失（PMID: 23076869;PMID: 23354438），并且已在包括胶质母细胞瘤，头颈部鳞状细胞癌，结直肠癌和食道癌（PMID:  23354438;PMID: 23076869;PMID: 29565465）和T细胞急性淋巴细胞白血病（PMID: 24972153）发现该基因变异。

snvindel.gene_function_en: FAT1, FAT atypical cadherin 1, is a transmembrane atypical cadherin that regulates cell growth via inhibition of the Yap1 pathway, and is involved in cell migration and invasion (PMID: 23076869, PMID: 29565465). FAT1 homozygous deletions have been identified in glioblastoma, astrocytoma and oral cancers (PMID: 23076869, PMID: 23354438), and mutations have been observed in several tumor types including glioblastoma, head and neck squamous cell carcinoma, colorectal, and esophageal cancer (PMID: 23354438, PMID: 23076869, PMID: 29565465), and T-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia (PMID: 24972153).

FAT1 homozygous deletions have been identified in glioblastoma, astrocytoma and oral cancers (PMID: 23076869, PMID: 23354438), and mutations have been observed in several tumor types including glioblastoma, head and neck squamous cell carcinoma, colorectal, and esophageal cancer (PMID: 23354438, PMID: 23076869, PMID: 29565465), and T-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia (PMID: 24972153).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.399（1998/5008）、0.5576（67325/120744）、0.6117（894094/1461626）、0.5175（78673/152018）、0.2187（26860/122818）；COSMIC数据库记录8次FAT1蛋白第404位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型R记录6次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: FAT1，FAT非典型钙粘着蛋白1，是一种跨膜非典型钙粘着蛋白，可通过抑制Yap1途径调节细胞生长，并参与细胞迁移和侵袭（PMID: 23076869;PMID: 29565465）。 已在胶质母细胞瘤，星形细胞瘤和口腔癌中鉴定出FAT1纯合缺失（PMID: 23076869;PMID: 23354438），并且已在包括胶质母细胞瘤，头颈部鳞状细胞癌，结直肠癌和食道癌（PMID:  23354438;PMID: 23076869;PMID: 29565465）和T细胞急性淋巴细胞白血病（PMID: 24972153）发现该基因变异。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 404th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Serine to Arginine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.399(1998/5008), 0.5576(67325/120744), 0.6117(894094/1461626), 0.5175(78673/152018), 0.2187(26860/122818) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 17 times of amino acid change at the FAT1 protein position 404, of which the mutant S404R is recorded 13 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
