snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.01378(69/5008), 0.01074(1300/121024), 0.04086(5017/122772) in the 1000G, ExAC, iJGVD databases, 0.03723(3209/86186), 0.03257(157/4820) in the SAS population of the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 11 times of amino acid change at the IL7R protein position 414, of which the mutant T414M is recorded 7 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.01378(69/5008), 0.01074(1300/121024), 0.04086(5017/122772) in the 1000G, ExAC, iJGVD databases, 0.03723(3209/86186), 0.03257(157/4820) in the SAS population of the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 11 times of amino acid change at the IL7R protein position 414, of which the mutant T414M is recorded 7 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.01378（69/5008）、0.01074（1300/121024）、0.04086（5017/122772），gnomADe、gnomADg数据库SAS人群等位基因频率分别为0.03723（3209/86186）、0.03257（157/4820）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，COSMIC数据库记录10次IL7R蛋白第414位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型M记录7次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第414位氨基酸由苏氨酸突变为蛋氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: IL7R, interleukin 7 receptor, functions as part of the receptor complex for interleukin 7 and thymic stromal lymphopoietin, and is involved in development of T-cells (PMID: 21892159, PMID: 21536738). Mutations in IL7R are associated with acute leukemias (PMID: 21892159, PMID: 21536738).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异可能形成功能损伤或失活的蛋白。该变异在ExAC、gnomADe数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.0001422（17/119576）、0.000002742（4/1458888），1000G、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库无记录（ExAC数据未通过过滤标准）；COSMIC数据库记录38次PLK2蛋白第335位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型L335Cfs*68记录26次。
snvindel.gene_function: PLK2编码polo样激酶2，一种控制细胞周期进程的丝氨酸/苏氨酸激酶（PMID:16627997）。PLK2参与多种途径的调控，包括血管生成、骨骼发育、神经元分化、突触形成、中心体复制和线粒体呼吸反应（PMID:19700763）。PLK2还磷酸化α-突触核蛋白，可能在帕金森病中起作用（PMID:2398326）。在癌细胞中，PLK2介导化疗敏感性和耐药性、凋亡和增殖（PMID:23703673）。polo样激酶抑制剂正在开发中（主要针对PLK1），尽管它们对每个家族成员的影响可能会带来不同的反应（PMID:25263688）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a frameshift mutation, which induces a substitution of Leucine with Cysteine at position 335 and causes termination of the protein at codon 402.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: This variant is expected to form functionally impaired or inactive proteins. The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.0001422(17/119576), 0.000002742(4/1458888) in the ExAC, gnomADe databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G, gnomADg or iJGVD databases (data in the ExAC database fails the filter); the COSMIC database records 38 times of amino acid change at the PLK2 protein position 335, of which the mutant L335Cfs*68 is recorded 26 times.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: This variant is expected to form functionally impaired or inactive proteins. The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.0001422(17/119576), 0.000002742(4/1458888) in the ExAC, gnomADe databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G, gnomADg or iJGVD databases (data in the ExAC database fails the filter); the COSMIC database records 38 times of amino acid change at the PLK2 protein position 335, of which the mutant L335Cfs*68 is recorded 26 times.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异可能形成功能损伤或失活的蛋白。该变异在ExAC、gnomADe数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.0001422（17/119576）、0.000002742（4/1458888），1000G、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库无记录（ExAC数据未通过过滤标准）；COSMIC数据库记录38次PLK2蛋白第335位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型L335Cfs*68记录26次。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为移码突变，导致基因编码蛋白第335位氨基酸由亮氨酸突变为半胱氨酸并于402位发生终止。
snvindel.gene_function_en: PLK2 encodes polo-like kinase 2 a serine/threonine kinase that controls cell cycle progression (PMID:16627997). PLK2 is involved in regulating many pathways including angiogenesis, skeletal development, neuronal differentiation, synapse formation, centrosome duplication, and mitochondrial respiration response (PMID:26004360, 12972611, 25590559, 19706541,18498738, 19700763). PLK2 also phosphorylates alpha-synuclein that may have a role in Parkinsons disease (PMID:19004816, 23983262). In cancer cells PLK2 mediates chemotherapy sensitivity and resistance, apoptosis, and proliferation (PMID:21402713,19764992,25501818,16160013, 12897130, 26640387, 23703673). Inhibitors of polo-like kinases are in development (mainly against PLK1) although their effects on each family member may bring varying responses (PMID:25263688).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2204（1104/5008）、0.1742（21145/121388）、0.1665（242830/1458710）、0.2189（33291/152084）、0.1494（18257/122184）；CKB数据库报道为no effect，COSMIC数据库记录41次PIK3R1蛋白第326位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型I记录39次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: PIK3R1，磷酸肌醇-3-激酶调节亚基1，是PI3K的亚基，稳定并抑制催化亚基（Pik3ca），直到配体刺激激活PI3K （PMID: 26807692），进而激活AKT和mTOR信号，促进细胞生长和存活（PMID: 19629070）。PIK3R1的突变在子宫内膜、胶质瘤和结肠癌中很常见，在肾、卵巢、尿路上皮、乳腺和前列腺肿瘤中也有发现（PMID: 24367658; PMID: 26807692;PMID: 26501081; PMID: 17932254）。

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2204(1104/5008), 0.1742(21145/121388), 0.1665(242830/1458710), 0.2189(33291/152084), 0.1494(18257/122184) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 26 times of amino acid change at the PIK3R1 protein position 326, of which the mutant M326I is recorded 24 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: PIK3R1, phosphoinositide-3-kinase regulatory subunit 1, is the alpha subunit of PI3K that stabilizes and inhibits the catalytic subunit (Pik3ca) until ligand stimulation activates PI3K (PMID: 26807692) for subsequent AKT and mTOR signaling to promote cell growth and survival (PMID: 19629070). PIK3R1 alterations are common in endometrial, glioma, and colon cancers and have also been detected in renal, ovarian, urothelial, breast, and prostate tumors (PMID: 24367658, PMID: 26807692, PMID: 26501081, PMID: 17932254).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.8628（104635/121270）、0.9056（1323071/1461054）、0.9089（138251/152104）、0.5114（62235/121704），1000G数据库无记录；COSMIC数据库记录12次AP3B1蛋白第585位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型V585E记录12次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: AP3B1（与适配器相关的蛋白质复合物3亚基Beta 1）是一种蛋白质编码基因。 该蛋白可能在与黑素体，血小板致密颗粒和溶酶体相关的细胞器生物发生中起作用。与AP3B1相关的疾病包括赫曼斯基-普德拉克综合症2和赫曼斯基-普德拉克综合症。 其相关途径包括溶酶体和网格蛋白衍生的囊泡出芽。 与该基因相关的基因本体论（GO）注释包括结合和GTP依赖性蛋白结合。 该基因的重要旁系同源物是AP3B2。

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: AP3B1 (Adaptor Related Protein Complex 3 Subunit Beta 1) is a Protein Coding gene. This protein that may play a role in organelle biogenesis associated with melanosomes, platelet dense granules, and lysosomes.Diseases associated with AP3B1 include Hermansky-Pudlak Syndrome 2 and Hermansky-Pudlak Syndrome. Among its related pathways are Lysosome and Clathrin derived vesicle budding. Gene Ontology (GO) annotations related to this gene include binding and GTP-dependent protein binding. An important paralog of this gene is AP3B2.

snvindel.gene_function: AP3B1（与适配器相关的蛋白质复合物3亚基Beta 1）是一种蛋白质编码基因。 该蛋白可能在与黑素体，血小板致密颗粒和溶酶体相关的细胞器生物发生中起作用。与AP3B1相关的疾病包括赫曼斯基-普德拉克综合症2和赫曼斯基-普德拉克综合症。 其相关途径包括溶酶体和网格蛋白衍生的囊泡出芽。 与该基因相关的基因本体论（GO）注释包括结合和GTP依赖性蛋白结合。 该基因的重要旁系同源物是AP3B2。

This protein that may play a role in organelle biogenesis associated with melanosomes, platelet dense granules, and lysosomes.Diseases associated with AP3B1 include Hermansky-Pudlak Syndrome 2 and Hermansky-Pudlak Syndrome. Among its related pathways are Lysosome and Clathrin derived vesicle budding. Gene Ontology (GO) annotations related to this gene include binding and GTP-dependent protein binding. snvindel.gene_function: MSH3基因属于抑癌基因，编码蛋白质MutS同源物3（MSH3），是细菌MutS蛋白的人类同源物，在DNA的错配修复（MMR）途径中起作用。MSH3与MSH2结合形成异二聚体MutS-β，对于识别和修复错配的碱基对非常重要，形成DNA-MutS复合物，向MMR机制的其他组件发出信号以切除异常的核苷酸（PMID: 9679053）。MSH3的缺失或功能缺失突变可导致MMR缺陷，与MSH6的缺失共同导致突变率的增加和肿瘤发生的增加（PMID: 10706084）。

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: MSH3, mutS homolog 3, encodes for one of the DNA mismatch repair proteins, which forms a stable heterodimer with MSH2 in order to recognize and repair mismatched DNA (PMID: 8942985). Somatic MSH3 mutations have been identified in colon, lung, and breast cancers, and oral squamous cell carcinoma while MSH3 polymorphisms, which may be associated with increased risk, have been observed in ovarian and prostate cancers, and non-small cell lung carcinoma (PMID: 25966119).

snvindel.gene_function: RASA1基因属于抑癌基因，它是一种RAS-GTP激活蛋白（RasGAP），它促进RAS-GTP水解以调节RAS通路信号，并在细胞增殖、迁移、凋亡和血管生成中发挥作用（PMID: 19022332;PMID: 29127119）。在非小细胞肺癌（PMID: 29127119）中发现RASA1与NF1共突变，在转移性黑色素瘤中发现RASA1表达降低和RASA1突变（PMID: 26993606）。

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: RASA1 (Ras p21 protein activator 1) encodes a RAS GAP also known as p120RasGAP (PMID: 3201259). It accelerates the conversion of Ras-GTP to Ras-GDP to terminate Ras signaling (PMID: 17540168, 18568040). The absence of RASA1 activity leads to accumulation of GTP-bound RAS and persistent MAP kinase signaling following growth factor stimulation (PMID: 9121432). Somatic alterations in RASA1 map to all regions of the gene, including the C-terminal GAP catalytic domain and the N-terminal tandem SH2-SH3-SH2-PH-C2 domains. The SH2 and SH3 domains have been shown to interact with signaling proteins, including RhoGaps. Statistical analysis of mutational profiles of more than 8,200 tumor data sets identified RASA1 as a candidate driver and a putative tumor-suppressor gene based on a high ratio of inactivating to benign mutations (PMID: 24183448). RASA1 has also been implicated as a potential tumor suppressor in aggressive cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma and several subtypes of breast cancer (PMID: 25303977, 16570289, 19372580). The highest rates of RASA1 mutations have been reported for prostate adenocarcinoma (13.1%) and cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma (13%) (PMID: 22722839, 25303977). In most cancers somatic alterations in RASA1 are infrequent (e.g. 1.6% across 21 tumor types) (PMID: 24390350). RASA1 plays an essential role in vascular system development, as loss-of-function mutations cause capillary ‘malformation-arteriovenous’ malformation syndrome (CM-AVM) (PMID: 24038909, 22913934).

snvindel.gene_function: FGFR4（成纤维细胞生长因子受体4）是一种与配体FGF19结合后激活的受体酪氨酸激酶，其激活后可激活RAS-MAPK、PI3K-AKT和STAT信号通路，并在胚胎发育和组织修复中发挥作用（PMID: 22508544, PMID: 32154250）。 在结直肠癌（PMID: 32236572）、肝细胞癌、乳腺癌、口咽鳞癌和胰腺癌（PMID: 32154250）中报道过Fgfr4过表达。FGFR4突变在胃癌中有报道（PMID: 31601997），某些突变可能导致对FGFR抑制剂耐药（PMID: 31575540）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 388th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Glycine to Arginine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2995(1500/5008), 0.321(38017/118440), 0.3062(447158/1460408), 0.2682(40785/152054), 0.4235(51780/122273) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; this variant is reported as gain of function  in the CKB database, the COSMIC database records 57 times of amino acid change at the FGFR4 protein position 388, of which the mutant G388R is recorded 56 times. This mutation can lead to enhanced receptor stability and sustained activation, increased ERK signaling and Stat3 phosphorylation, and promote tumor formation and growth in mouse models (PMID: 26675719, PMID: 29402970). Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: FGFR4, fibroblast growth factor receptor 4, is a receptor tyrosine kinase activated upon binding of the FGF19 ligand, which then activates RAS-MAPK, PI3K-AKT, and STAT pathways, and functions in embryonic development and tissue repair (PMID: 22508544, PMID: 32154250). Overexpression of Fgfr4 has been observed in colorectal cancer (PMID: 32236572), hepatocellular carcinoma, breast cancer, oropharyngeal squamous cell carcinoma, and pancreatic cancer (PMID: 32154250) and FGFR4 mutations have been reported in gastric cancer (PMID: 31601997) and may also confer resistance to FGFR inhibitors (PMID: 31575540).

snvindel.gene_function: NSD1编码一种组蛋白甲基转移酶，通过组蛋白H3赖氨酸36和赖氨酸37的甲基化来调节基因表达(PMID: 21196496;PMID: 31727171) ，并且也是一个类固醇受体的共调节因子 (PMID: 11733144;PMID: 11509567)。Nsd1蛋白过表达在转移性胰腺导管腺癌和肝细胞癌中有报道，并被认为是与肝细胞癌预后较差有关(PMID: 29636367;PMID: 31727171)，而NSD1功能失活突变可提高HPV阴性的头颈部鳞状细胞癌对顺铂的敏感性(PMID: 29636367)。

snvindel.gene_function_en: NSD1, nuclear receptor binding SET domain protein 1, is a histone methyltransferase that regulates gene expression through methylation of histone H3 lysine 36 (PMID: 21196496) and lysine 37 (H3K27me3) (PMID: 31727171) and is also a coregulator of steroid receptors (PMID: 11733144, PMID: 11509567). Overexpression of Nsd1 has been observed in metastatic pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PMID: 31060750) and in hepatocellular carcinoma patients with poor prognosis (PMID: 31727171), while loss of function Nsd1 mutations may increase sensitivity to cisplatin in HPV-negative head and neck squamous cell carcinoma (PMID: 29636367).

snvindel.gene_function_en: HLA-A, HLA class I histocompatibility antigen, plays a role in the presentation of foreign antigens to the immune system (PMID: 17326240). A fusion of HLA-A with ROS1 has been observed in spitzoid neoplasms (PMID: 24445538), and HLA-A mutations have been associated with chronic myelogenous leukemia (PMID: 20388056), chronic lymphocytic leukemia (PMID: 22814293), and nasopharyngeal carcinoma (PMID: 22880099).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.3027（1516/5008）、0.3476（34978/100640）、0.2584（160584/621420）、0.1713（8584/50122）、0.6456（9575/14832）（gnomADe、iJGVD数据未通过过滤标准）；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。
snvindel.gene_function: HLA-A基因属于抑癌基因，编码的蛋白是HLA-I类组织相容性抗原，在向免疫系统呈递外来抗原方面发挥作用（PMID:17326240）。HLA-A基因与ROS1基因的融合在痰盂样肿瘤中被观察到（PMID: 24445538），HLA-A基因突变与慢性粒细胞白血病、慢性淋巴细胞白血病和鼻咽癌有关（PMID: 20388056;PMID: 22814293;PMID: 22880099）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 129th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Serine to Proline.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.3027(1516/5008), 0.3476(34978/100640), 0.2584(160584/621420), 0.1713(8584/50122), 0.6456(9575/14832) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively (data in the gnomADe, iJGVD databases fail the filter); the COSMIC database records 5 times of amino acid change at the HLA-A protein position 129, of which the mutant S129P is recorded 3 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.3027(1516/5008), 0.3476(34978/100640), 0.2584(160584/621420), 0.1713(8584/50122), 0.6456(9575/14832) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively (data in the gnomADe, iJGVD databases fail the filter); the COSMIC database records 5 times of amino acid change at the HLA-A protein position 129, of which the mutant S129P is recorded 3 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.3027（1516/5008）、0.3476（34978/100640）、0.2584（160584/621420）、0.1713（8584/50122）、0.6456（9575/14832）（gnomADe、iJGVD数据未通过过滤标准）；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第129位氨基酸由丝氨酸突变为脯氨酸。

snvindel.gene_function_en: MDC1, mediator of DNA damage checkpoint 1, is an adaptor protein that regulates the assembly of DNA damage foci in response to DNA damage (PMID: 21326949). Mutations of MDC1 have been associated with poor prognosis in breast cancer patients (PMID: 28513990).

snvindel.gene_function_en: HLA-C is a heavy chain subunit of the major histocompatibility class I (MHC I) complex. HLA-C is one of the three MHC I surface receptors that function as a heterodimer in collaboration with β-microglobulin to regulate immune responses (PMID: 15719024). A critical component of the immune system is the presentation of foreign antigens on the cell surface by the MHC molecules (PMID: 10974135, 15719024). Immune recognition leads to the stimulation of a signaling cascade that results in apoptosis of MHC-presenting target cells (PMID: 15719024). Tumor cells are vulnerable to such an immune response due to the presentation of tumor-specific antigens such as mutated oncoproteins on the cell surface (PMID: 24782321, 24244023, 23157435). HLA-C molecules are highly polymorphic and the breadth of these repertoires can predispose to autoimmune diseases such as psoriasis (PMID: 28855257, 16642438). Several types of tumors are known to evade an immunological response by downregulating the levels of MHC I-presenting antigens on the tumor cell surface (PMID: 24782321, 24244023, 23157435, 11665717). A reduction in HLA-C levels in cancer could occur due to many factors including mutation, transcriptional downregulation, epigenetic silencing and protein stability, among others (PMID: 26796069, 26372948, 31564637). HLA-C downregulation may result in reduced efficacy of immunotherapy in patients whose cancers display an evasion of the immune system (PMID: 9057360, 24782321, 23157435, 26796069).

snvindel.gene_function_en: HLA-C is a heavy chain subunit of the major histocompatibility class I (MHC I) complex. HLA-C is one of the three MHC I surface receptors that function as a heterodimer in collaboration with β-microglobulin to regulate immune responses (PMID: 15719024). A critical component of the immune system is the presentation of foreign antigens on the cell surface by the MHC molecules (PMID: 10974135, 15719024). Immune recognition leads to the stimulation of a signaling cascade that results in apoptosis of MHC-presenting target cells (PMID: 15719024). Tumor cells are vulnerable to such an immune response due to the presentation of tumor-specific antigens such as mutated oncoproteins on the cell surface (PMID: 24782321, 24244023, 23157435). HLA-C molecules are highly polymorphic and the breadth of these repertoires can predispose to autoimmune diseases such as psoriasis (PMID: 28855257, 16642438). Several types of tumors are known to evade an immunological response by downregulating the levels of MHC I-presenting antigens on the tumor cell surface (PMID: 24782321, 24244023, 23157435, 11665717). A reduction in HLA-C levels in cancer could occur due to many factors including mutation, transcriptional downregulation, epigenetic silencing and protein stability, among others (PMID: 26796069, 26372948, 31564637). HLA-C downregulation may result in reduced efficacy of immunotherapy in patients whose cancers display an evasion of the immune system (PMID: 9057360, 24782321, 23157435, 26796069).

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2967(1486/5008), 0.2731(29277/107194), 0.0005738(32/55768), 0.02605(647/24834) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, 0.0302(491/16260) in the EAS population of the gnomADe database, respectively (data in the iJGVD database fails the filter); the COSMIC database records 28 times of amino acid change at the HLA-C protein position 176, of which the mutant A176V is recorded 18 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2967（1486/5008）、0.2731（29277/107194）、0.0005738（32/55768）、0.02605（647/24834），gnomADe数据库EAS人群等位基因频率为0.0302（491/16260）（iJGVD数据未通过过滤标准）；COSMIC数据库记录28次HLA-C蛋白第176位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型V记录18次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。

snvindel.gene_function_en: HLA-C is a heavy chain subunit of the major histocompatibility class I (MHC I) complex. HLA-C is one of the three MHC I surface receptors that function as a heterodimer in collaboration with β-microglobulin to regulate immune responses (PMID: 15719024). A critical component of the immune system is the presentation of foreign antigens on the cell surface by the MHC molecules (PMID: 10974135, 15719024). Immune recognition leads to the stimulation of a signaling cascade that results in apoptosis of MHC-presenting target cells (PMID: 15719024). Tumor cells are vulnerable to such an immune response due to the presentation of tumor-specific antigens such as mutated oncoproteins on the cell surface (PMID: 24782321, 24244023, 23157435). HLA-C molecules are highly polymorphic and the breadth of these repertoires can predispose to autoimmune diseases such as psoriasis (PMID: 28855257, 16642438). Several types of tumors are known to evade an immunological response by downregulating the levels of MHC I-presenting antigens on the tumor cell surface (PMID: 24782321, 24244023, 23157435, 11665717). A reduction in HLA-C levels in cancer could occur due to many factors including mutation, transcriptional downregulation, epigenetic silencing and protein stability, among others (PMID: 26796069, 26372948, 31564637). HLA-C downregulation may result in reduced efficacy of immunotherapy in patients whose cancers display an evasion of the immune system (PMID: 9057360, 24782321, 23157435, 26796069).

snvindel.gene_function_en: HLA-C is a heavy chain subunit of the major histocompatibility class I (MHC I) complex. HLA-C is one of the three MHC I surface receptors that function as a heterodimer in collaboration with β-microglobulin to regulate immune responses (PMID: 15719024). A critical component of the immune system is the presentation of foreign antigens on the cell surface by the MHC molecules (PMID: 10974135, 15719024). Immune recognition leads to the stimulation of a signaling cascade that results in apoptosis of MHC-presenting target cells (PMID: 15719024). Tumor cells are vulnerable to such an immune response due to the presentation of tumor-specific antigens such as mutated oncoproteins on the cell surface (PMID: 24782321, 24244023, 23157435). HLA-C molecules are highly polymorphic and the breadth of these repertoires can predispose to autoimmune diseases such as psoriasis (PMID: 28855257, 16642438). Several types of tumors are known to evade an immunological response by downregulating the levels of MHC I-presenting antigens on the tumor cell surface (PMID: 24782321, 24244023, 23157435, 11665717). A reduction in HLA-C levels in cancer could occur due to many factors including mutation, transcriptional downregulation, epigenetic silencing and protein stability, among others (PMID: 26796069, 26372948, 31564637). HLA-C downregulation may result in reduced efficacy of immunotherapy in patients whose cancers display an evasion of the immune system (PMID: 9057360, 24782321, 23157435, 26796069).

snvindel.gene_function_en: HLA-B is a heavy chain subunit of the major histocompatibility class I (MHC I) complex. snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.485(2429/5008), 0.3765(38137/101294), 0.2308(209131/905958), 0.1113(3501/31466), 0.3711(24939/67206) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively (data in the gnomADe, iJGVD databases fail the filter); the COSMIC database records 36 times of amino acid change at the HLA-B protein position 187, of which the mutant E187V is recorded 8 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.485(2429/5008), 0.3765(38137/101294), 0.2308(209131/905958), 0.1113(3501/31466), 0.3711(24939/67206) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively (data in the gnomADe, iJGVD databases fail the filter); the COSMIC database records 36 times of amino acid change at the HLA-B protein position 187, of which the mutant E187V is recorded 8 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.485（2429/5008）、0.3765（38137/101294）、0.2308（209131/905958）、0.1113（3501/31466）、0.3711（24939/67206）（gnomADe、iJGVD数据未通过过滤标准）；COSMIC数据库记录36次HLA-B蛋白第187位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型V记录8次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。

snvindel.gene_function_en: HLA-B is a heavy chain subunit of the major histocompatibility class I (MHC I) complex. This protein is involved in the presentation of foreign antigens to the immune system.  A critical component of the immune system is the presentation of foreign antigens on the cell surface by the MHC molecules (PMID: 10974135, 15719024). Immune recognition leads to the stimulation of a signaling cascade that results in apoptosis of MHC-presenting target cells (PMID: 15719024). Tumor cells are vulnerable to such an immune response due to the presentation of tumor-specific antigens such as mutated oncoproteins on the cell surface (PMID: 24782321, 24244023, 23157435). HLA-B is anchored in the membrane of most cells, and it has a highly polymorphic region that facilitates a wide binding specificity for a variety of antigens that need to be presented to cytotoxic immune T cells (PMID: 25493333). Germline polymorphisms and haplotypes in HLA-B have been linked with various autoimmune syndromes and hypersensitivity to certain medications (PMID: 22188278, 25877443).

snvindel.gene_function_en: HLA-B is a heavy chain subunit of the major histocompatibility class I (MHC I) complex. This protein is involved in the presentation of foreign antigens to the immune system.  A critical component of the immune system is the presentation of foreign antigens on the cell surface by the MHC molecules (PMID: 10974135, 15719024). Immune recognition leads to the stimulation of a signaling cascade that results in apoptosis of MHC-presenting target cells (PMID: 15719024). Tumor cells are vulnerable to such an immune response due to the presentation of tumor-specific antigens such as mutated oncoproteins on the cell surface (PMID: 24782321, 24244023, 23157435). HLA-B is anchored in the membrane of most cells, and it has a highly polymorphic region that facilitates a wide binding specificity for a variety of antigens that need to be presented to cytotoxic immune T cells (PMID: 25493333). Germline polymorphisms and haplotypes in HLA-B have been linked with various autoimmune syndromes and hypersensitivity to certain medications (PMID: 22188278, 25877443).

snvindel.gene_function: NOTCH4，是一种跨膜受体，在细胞增殖和存活中发挥作用 (PMID: 24403446)。 TNBC 中NOTCH4 过表达与肿瘤增殖和侵袭性有关（PMID: 24403446，PMID: 29805613）。此外，NOTCH4过表达已在他莫昔芬耐药性乳腺癌（PMID: 28108315）和口腔鳞状细胞癌（PMID: 27197026）中发现，在结直肠癌中可能具有预后意义（PMID: 30026833，PMID: 29693251）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第1600位氨基酸由缬氨酸突变为谷氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: NOTCH4, notch receptor 4, is a transmembrane receptor, which plays a role in cell fate regulation, proliferation, and survival (PMID: 24403446). NOTCH4 overexpression in TNBC plays a role in proliferation and invasiveness (PMID: 24403446, PMID: 29805613), has been observed in tamoxifen-resistant breast cancer (PMID: 28108315) and oral squamous cell carcinoma (PMID: 27197026), and may be prognostic for progression in colorectal cancer (PMID: 30026833, PMID: 29693251).

snvindel.gene_function_en: FANCE, Fanconi anemia, complementation group E, is a member of the Fanconi anemia core complex, which plays a role in DNA repair (PMID: 27145721, PMID: 17308347). Germline FANCE mutations are associated with Fanconi anemia, which involves predisposition to various cancers including colorectal cancer (PMID: 25237197, PMID: 27165003).

snvindel.gene_function_en: CCND3, cyclin D3, encodes for the D3-type cyclin protein, which regulates the CDK kinases in order to promote the transition phases of the cell cycle (PMID: 23079656). CCND3 over expression and amplification have been linked to B-cell lymphomas (PMID: 16402392, PMID: 16322284).

snvindel.gene_function: VEGFA（也是VEGF）是一种生长因子，是血管内皮生长因子（VEGFs）和血小板衍生生长因子（PDGFs）家族的成员。VEGFA结合受体酪氨酸激酶VEGFR1和VEGFR2介导下游信号传导，几乎所有已知的细胞应答均由VEGFR2介导（PMID: 16951216 ）。其他类型的受体也有助于VEGFA信号传导，包括血小板衍生的生长因子受体（PMID: 17470632 ）和神经纤毛蛋白（PMID: 23116416 ）。VEGFA的表达对于介导血管生成和血管通透性，刺激血管内皮细胞的迁移和增殖至关重要（PMID: 24263190 ）。自分泌VEGF信号传导有助于血管生成和细胞增殖（PMID: 22693250 ）。VEGFA的过表达与家族性疾病乌鸦-福尔塞综合征相关，其特征在于血管通透性降低（PMID: 9771661 ）。VEGFA在人类癌症中主要起癌基因的作用，并且在许多实体瘤类型中通常过表达，可能介导增强的肿瘤血管生成（PMID: 24263190）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为5'UTR区突变。
snvindel.gene_function_en: VEGFA, vascular endothelial growth factor A, is a growth factor, which binds Vegf receptors to promote cell proliferation and angiogenesis. Vegfa may stimulate tumor angiogenesis in several tumor types (PMID: 23216836).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1212（607/5008）、0.1576（17511/111092）、0.1668（242512/1454136）、0.1437（21848/152066）、0.1753（21304/121502）；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。

snvindel.gene_function: REV3L基因所编码的蛋白是DNA聚合酶zeta的催化亚单位，在转录DNA的合成中发挥作用。可以在线粒体中找到REV3L蛋白，其可保护DNA免受损害。REV3Ld 缺陷是莫比乌斯综合征的原因之一。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第3029位氨基酸由精氨酸突变为谷氨酰胺。
snvindel.gene_function_en: The protein encoded by this gene represents the catalytic subunit of DNA polymerase zeta, which functions in translesion DNA synthesis. The encoded protein can be found in mitochondria, where it protects DNA from damage. Defects in this gene are a cause of Mobius syndrome.

snvindel.gene_function: CCN6（细胞通信网络因子6）编码一种分泌的基质相关蛋白，该蛋白与多个受体结合并调节控制发育和上皮-间质转化的信号通路（PMID: 29357008）。 已在肝细胞癌（PMID: 30793395），胃癌（PMID: 26997449），结肠癌（PMID: 9843955）和乳腺癌（PMID: 10499627）中鉴定出CCN6突变和Ccn6表达降低。

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2989(1497/5008), 0.2606(31631/121370), 0.2698(394417/1461874), 0.3134(47628/151990), 0.2657(32628/122780) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 13 times of amino acid change at the CCN6 protein position 56, of which the mutant Q56H is recorded 12 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: CCN6, cellular communication network factor 6, encodes a secreted matrix-associated protein that binds to multiple receptors and regulates signaling pathways governing development and epithelial-mesenchymal transition (PMID: 29357008). CCN6 mutations and decreased Ccn6 expression has been identified in hepatocellular carcinoma (PMID: 30793395), gastric (PMID: 26997449), colon (PMID: 9843955), and breast cancer (PMID: 10499627).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1394（698/5008）、0.208（25198/121170）、0.2401（346296/1442440）、0.1884（28632/151964）、0.1451（17801/122714）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，COSMIC数据库记录18次ROS1蛋白第2229位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型C记录18次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: ROS1基因属于原癌基因，编码具有胞内酪氨酸激酶活性的跨膜蛋白(PMID: 18778756)，可激活参与细胞存活和转化的多种途径（PMID: 23719267）。ROS1融合蛋白经常导致ROS1信号传导的组成性激活，并已在胶质母细胞瘤、非小细胞肺癌、胆管癌、卵巢癌、胃腺癌、结肠直肠癌、炎性肌纤维母细胞瘤、血管肉瘤和上皮样血管内皮瘤中被发现（PMID: 23719267）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 2229th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Serine to Cysteine.

snvindel.gene_function: TNFAIP3基因属于抑癌基因，它编码一种抗炎蛋白作为泛素修饰酶在多种信号通路的调节中发挥作用，包括NF-κB、Wnt和干扰素调节因子（IRF）（PMID: 24246475）。迄今已在多种类型的淋巴瘤中发现了TNFAIP3的功能缺失突变（PMID: 23134590）。

snvindel.gene_function_en: TNFAIP3, TNF alpha induced protein 3, encodes an anti-inflammatory protein, acting as a ubiquitin-modifying enzyme, which plays a role in the regulation of multiple signaling pathways including NF-kappaB, Wnt, and interferon regulatory factor (IRF) (PMID: 24246475). Loss of function mutations in TNFAIP3 have been identified in multiple types of lymphomas (PMID: 23134590).

snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第127位氨基酸由苯丙氨酸突变为半胱氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: TNFAIP3, TNF alpha induced protein 3, encodes an anti-inflammatory protein, acting as a ubiquitin-modifying enzyme, which plays a role in the regulation of multiple signaling pathways including NF-kappaB, Wnt, and interferon regulatory factor (IRF) (PMID: 24246475). Loss of function mutations in TNFAIP3 have been identified in multiple types of lymphomas (PMID: 23134590).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: ARID1B, AT-rich interactive domain-containing protein 1B, is a member of the SWI/SNF chromatin remodeling complex and is involved in cell-cycle activation (PMID: 15170388). ARID1B mutations have been identified in several tumor types including, melanoma, gastric, colorectal, liver, neuroblastoma, and pancreatic (PMID: 27737960).

snvindel.gene_function: SOD2基因是铁/锰超氧化物歧化酶家族的一个成员。它编码一种线粒体蛋白，形成一个同源四聚体，每个亚单位结合一个锰离子。该蛋白与氧化性磷酸化的超氧化物副产物结合，并将其转化为过氧化氢和2价氧。SOD2基因的突变与特发性心肌病（IDC）、早衰、散发性运动神经元疾病和癌症有关。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 16th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Valine to Alanine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.4107(2057/5008), 0.5024(55710/110890), 0.4921(717843/1458702), 0.4704(71475/151942), 0.1227(14981/122054) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 15 times of amino acid change at the SOD2 protein position 16, of which the mutant V16A is recorded 15 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: This gene is a member of the iron/manganese superoxide dismutase family. It encodes a mitochondrial protein that forms a homotetramer and binds one manganese ion per subunit. This protein binds to the superoxide byproducts of oxidative phosphorylation and converts them to hydrogen peroxide and diatomic oxygen. Mutations in this gene have been associated with idiopathic cardiomyopathy (IDC), premature aging, sporadic motor neuron disease, and cancer. Alternative splicing of this gene results in multiple transcript variants. A related pseudogene has been identified on chromosome 1.

snvindel.gene_function: PRKN，帕金丁RBR E3泛素蛋白连接酶，PRKN的减少与线粒体吞噬有关，PRKN的突变会导致帕金森氏病的风险（PMID: 30252570）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 380th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Valine to Leucine.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第231位氨基酸由缬氨酸突变为亮氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: PRKN encodes the parkin protein, which is a component of an E3-ubiquitin ligase complex that serves to mark proteins for proteasomal degradation (PMID: 19946270, 24793136). The PRKN protein functions through physical interaction with ubiquitin-conjugating enzymes, including UBCH7 and UBCH7 (PMID:19946270). Through regulation of protein stability, PRKN plays a role in several molecular processes which contribute to oncogenesis, including but not limited to cell cycle progression (PMID:24793136), mitochondrial homeostasis (PMID: 25815004, 24149988) and apoptosis (PMID: 19679562). PRKN is frequently deleted across a variety of cancer types (PMID: 24793136, 24297497, 19946270); however, other forms of PRKN inactivation, including somatic mutation and promoter hypermethylation/down-regulation of expression, have also been observed (PMID: 24297497; cBioPortal, MSKCC, Nov. 2015). Recently, germline mutation in PRKN has been associated with familial lung cancer (PMID: 25640678).

snvindel.gene_function: CARD11（caspase recruitment domain 11）是一种细胞质支架蛋白，其功能是通过CARD11/BCL10/MALT1（CBM）复合物介导细胞凋亡和NF-ĸB信号传导（PMID:11278692）。蛋白激酶C（PKC）对CARD11的上调导致该蛋白的构象变化和CBM复合物的形成，从而通过IĸB激酶激活NF-ĸB（PMID: 26260210, PMID: 26212909）。在小鼠B细胞中，CARD11是一个分子开关，定义了激活诱导的细胞死亡或增殖和浆细胞分化的发生（PMID: 23027925）。CARD11是一个致癌基因，CBM复合体的构成性激活是B细胞和T细胞恶性肿瘤的一个共同特征，特别是弥漫性大B细胞淋巴瘤，在那里CARD11的功能增益突变已被发现（PMID: 18323416）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第380位氨基酸由天冬氨酸突变为甘氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: CARD11, caspase recruitment domain family, member 11, is a component of a scaffold complex that regulates NFKB activity (PMID: 23149938). Activating mutations in the CARD11 coiled-coil domain activate NFKB and have been identified in hematological cancers, including diffuse large B cell lymphoma and may confer resistance to ibrutinib (PMID: 23149938, PMID: 18323416, PMID: 27224912).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2866（250808/874968）、0.3103（29718/95774）；OncoKB数据库报道为Likely Neutral，COSMIC数据库记录19次PMS2蛋白第857位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型G857A记录19次。基于该变异的MAPP/PP2致病性先验概率认为该变异为neutral。
snvindel.gene_function: PMS2基因属于抑癌基因，编码一种核酸内切酶。编码蛋白在错配修复（MMR）途径中起重要作用，并与微卫星不稳定性（MSI）（PMID: 30121009）和基因组稳定性（PMID: 31747945）有关。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 857th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Glycine to Alanine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2866(250808/874968), 0.3103(29718/95774) in the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=36691) is Benign in germline classification (review status: three stars). Based on MAPP/PP2 prior probability of pathogenicity, the variant is considered neural.

Based on MAPP/PP2 prior probability of pathogenicity, the variant is considered neural.

snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第857位氨基酸由甘氨酸突变为丙氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: PMS2, PMS1 homolog 2, mismatch repair system component, interacts with MLH1 to form the MutL-alpha complex, which functions in DNA mismatch repair (PMID: 18157157, PMID: 24333356) and is associated with microsatellite instability (MSI) (PMID: 30121009) and genomic stability (PMID: 31747945). Germline PMS2 mutations are associated with Lynch syndrome (PMID: 15528792), mutations in PMS2 are associated with susceptibility to colon cancer and endometrial cancer (PMID: 24978665), and overexpression has been reported in prostate cancer (PMID: 27803051).

Germline PMS2 mutations are associated with Lynch syndrome (PMID: 15528792), mutations in PMS2 are associated with susceptibility to colon cancer and endometrial cancer (PMID: 24978665), and overexpression has been reported in prostate cancer (PMID: 27803051).

snvindel.gene_function: ETV1，ETS 变体转录因子 1，编码 ETS 转录因子家族的成员，该家族在多个细胞过程中发挥作用，包括细胞生长、迁移、分化和血管生成 (PMID: 21298110, PMID: 30629294)。 在前列腺癌、尤文氏肉瘤 (PMID: 17390040, PMID: 10523827) 和神经胶质瘤 (PMID: 31381204) 中观察到 ETV1 融合，并且在尤文肉瘤、前列腺癌和胃肠道间质瘤 (PMID: 31381204) 中报告了 ETV1 过表达 。

snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第84位氨基酸由丝氨酸突变为甘氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: ETV1, ETS variant transcription factor 1, encodes a member of the ETS family of transcription factors, which plays a role in multiple cellular processes including cell growth, migration, differentiation, and angiogenesis (PMID: 21298110, PMID: 30629294). ETV1 fusions have been observed in prostate cancer, Ewing's sarcoma (PMID: 17390040, PMID: 10523827), and glioma (PMID: 31381204), and ETV1 overexpression has been reported in Ewing sarcoma, prostate cancer, and gastrointestinal stromal tumors (PMID: 31381204).

snvindel.gene_function: EGFR基因属于原癌基因，其编码蛋白是表皮生长因子受体家族的一员，同时也隶属于受体酪氨酸激酶家族，为跨膜蛋白。该受体被激活后，可启动下游信号通路，包括RAS-RAF-MEK-ERK通路与PI3K-AKT-mTOR通路，进而促进细胞增殖与生长（PMID: 24312144）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第1190位氨基酸由丝氨酸突变为丙氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: EGFR (HER1), epidermal growth factor receptor, is a tyrosine kinase receptor, which activates RAS/RAF/MEK and PI3K/AKT/mTOR pathways, leading to increased cell proliferation and growth (PMID: 24312144). EGFR activating mutations, amplification, and overexpression are found in a variety of tumors, including non-small cell lung cancer (PMID: 26609494, PMID: 30284706) and colorectal cancer (PMID: 30243897), and the EGFRvIII variant is commonly found in glioblastoma (PMID: 30201736).

snvindel.gene_function: ABCB1是ATP结合盒B亚家族成员1，是一种膜结合的ABC药物转运蛋白，参与多种化合物出细胞的运动（PMID: 27449595， PMID: 27180306）。Abcb1活性与癌症多药耐药相关（PMID: 27449595， PMID: 27180306， PMID: 30176891），并可能预测毒性（PMID: 30213564）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第1279位氨基酸由精氨酸突变为组氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: ABCB1, ATP binding cassette subfamily B member 1, is a membrane-bound ABC drug transport protein involved in movement of various compounds out of the cell (PMID: 27449595, PMID: 27180306). Abcb1 activity is associated with multidrug resistance in cancer (PMID: 27449595, PMID: 27180306, PMID: 30176891) and may predict toxicity (PMID: 30213564).

snvindel.gene_function: TRRAP（转化/转录域相关蛋白）是一种蛋白质编码基因。 与TRRAP相关的疾病包括发育迟缓，伴有或不伴有畸形相和自闭症和耳聋，常染色体显性遗传75。其相关途径包括Wnt介导的β连环蛋白信号传导的调控以及靶基因的转录和染色质的组织。 与该基因相关的基因本体论（GO）注释包括转移酶活性，转移含磷基团和转录共激活因子活性。 该基因的重要旁系同源物是PRKDC。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第3699位氨基酸由缬氨酸突变为异亮氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: TRRAP (Transformation/Transcription Domain Associated Protein) is a Protein Coding gene. Diseases associated with TRRAP include Developmental Delay With Or Without Dysmorphic Facies And Autism and Deafness, Autosomal Dominant 75. Among its related pathways are Regulation of Wnt-mediated beta catenin signaling and target gene transcription and Chromatin organization. Gene Ontology (GO) annotations related to this gene include transferase activity, transferring phosphorus-containing groups and transcription coactivator activity. An important paralog of this gene is PRKDC.

snvindel.gene_function: PIK3CG，又称p110-γ，是PI3激酶的I类催化单位，可作为一种脂质和蛋白激酶磷酸化磷酸肌醇（PMID: 17290298）。PIK3CG可参与细胞外信号传导，并将细胞表面受体与细胞内信号传导网络联系起来，如PI3-激酶/AKT途径（PMID：12040186）。一旦被激活，AKT-mTOR下游信号会促进细胞生存、增殖、生长和运动（PMID: 16341083）。PIK3CG主要在白细胞中表达，其与RAS和G-蛋白偶联受体（GPCRs）的直接相互作用（PMID:12507995）在免疫细胞反应和炎症刺激中非常重要（PMID: 10669418）。虽然在骨髓性恶性肿瘤中经常发现PIK3CG的缺失与广泛的7q22缺失同时存在，但PIK3CG在这些情况下可能不是肿瘤抑制因子（PMID: 11756194）。

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en:
PIK3CG, phosphatidylinositol 4,5-bisphosphate 3-kinase catalytic subunit gamma isoform, is predominantly expressed in leukocytes and regulates leukocyte proliferation and differentiation (PMID: 23330955).
PIK3CG (phosphatidelinositol-4,5-bisphophsphate3-kinase catalytic subunit gamma), also known as p110-gamma, is a class I catalytic subunit of PI3-kinase and acts as a lipid and protein kinase that phosphorylates phosphoinositides (PMID: 17290298). PIK3CG is involved in extracellular signaling and linking cell-surface receptors to intracellular signaling networks, such as the PI3-kinase/AKT pathway (PMID:12040186). Once activated, AKT-mTOR downstream signaling promotes cell survival, proliferation, growth and motility (PMID: 16341083). PIK3CG is primarily expressed in white blood cells, and through its direct interactions with RAS and G-protein coupled receptors (GPCRs) (PMID:12507995) is important in immune cell responses and inflammatory stimuli (PMID:10669418). While deletions of PIK3CG are often found in myeloid malignancies in conjunction with broad 7q22 deletion, PIK3CG is not likely a tumor suppressor in these settings (PMID: 11756194).

snvindel.gene_function: 一氧化氮是一种活性自由基，在多个过程中充当生物媒介，包括神经传递、抗菌和抗肿瘤活动。一氧化氮是由一氧化氮合成酶从L-精氨酸合成的。NOS3基因的变异与冠状动脉痉挛的易感性有关。

snvindel.gene_function_en: Nitric oxide is a reactive free radical which acts as a biologic mediator in several processes, including neurotransmission and antimicrobial and antitumoral activities. Nitric oxide is synthesized from L-arginine by nitric oxide synthases. Variations in this gene are associated with susceptibility to coronary spasm. Alternative splicing and the use of alternative promoters results in multiple transcript variants.

snvindel.gene_function_en: KMT2C, lysine methyltransferase 2C, is a H3K4 histone methyltransferase (PMID: 31128216) that is involved in transcriptional coactivation and functions in chromatin modification (PMID: 31337554) and epigenetic gene regulation (PMID: 31128216). KMT2C mutations are associated with various tumor types (PMID: 24965397; PMID: 23429989; PMID: 24670651), including breast cancer (PMID: 31128216), diffuse-type gastric adenocarcinoma (PMID: 30108106), and urothelial carcinoma (PMID: 30665945).

snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.09986(11416/114316), 0.001317(160/121486) in the ExAC, iJGVD databases, 0.0007151(24/33562), 0.0004106(6/14612) in the AMR population of the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G database (data in the gnomADe, iJGVD databases fail the filter); the COSMIC database records 164 times of amino acid change at the KMT2C protein position 348, of which the mutant D348N is recorded 163 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.09986(11416/114316), 0.001317(160/121486) in the ExAC, iJGVD databases, 0.0007151(24/33562), 0.0004106(6/14612) in the AMR population of the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G database (data in the gnomADe, iJGVD databases fail the filter); the COSMIC database records 164 times of amino acid change at the KMT2C protein position 348, of which the mutant D348N is recorded 163 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在ExAC、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.09986（11416/114316）、0.001317（160/121486），gnomADe、gnomADg数据库AMR人群等位基因频率分别为0.0007151（24/33562）、0.0004106（6/14612），1000G数据库无记录（gnomADe、iJGVD数据未通过过滤标准）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，COSMIC数据库记录161次KMT2C蛋白第348位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型N记录160次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第348位氨基酸由天冬氨酸突变为天冬酰胺。
snvindel.gene_function_en: KMT2C, lysine methyltransferase 2C, is a H3K4 histone methyltransferase (PMID: 31128216) that is involved in transcriptional coactivation and functions in chromatin modification (PMID: 31337554) and epigenetic gene regulation (PMID: 31128216). KMT2C mutations are associated with various tumor types (PMID: 24965397; PMID: 23429989; PMID: 24670651), including breast cancer (PMID: 31128216), diffuse-type gastric adenocarcinoma (PMID: 30108106), and urothelial carcinoma (PMID: 30665945).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异可能形成功能损伤或失活的蛋白。该变异在gnomADe数据库人群等位基因频率为0.00002400（33/1374836），1000G、ExAC、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库无记录；OncoKB数据库报道为Likely Oncogenic，COSMIC数据库记录6次KMT2C蛋白第20位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型E20Rfs*85记录1次。

snvindel.gene_function_en: WRN, Werner syndrome RecQ helicase-like, possesses both DNA helicase and exonuclease activities, thus plays important roles in maintaining genomic stability (PMID: 27902925).

snvindel.gene_function: NRG1（神经调节蛋白1）编码一个能与Erbb3（Her3）和Erbb4结合的配体，结合后与其他ERBB (HER)家族受体形成二聚体，激活下游信号通路（PMID: 10880430）。NRG1可与多个基因形成融合（PMID: 30988082），并已在多种肿瘤类型中被发现，如肺癌（PMID: 25501131, PMID: 31382039）和胰腺癌（PMID: 31068372）。

snvindel.gene_function_en: NRG1, neuregulin 1, encodes for a ligand that can bind to Erbb3 (Her3) and Erbb4, which upon binding forms dimers with other ERBB (HER) family receptors, which may result in activation of downstream signaling pathways (PMID: 10880430). NRG1 forms fusions with multiple gene partners (PMID: 30988082) and have been identified in a variety of tumor types, including lung cancer (PMID: 25501131, PMID: 31382039) and pancreatic cancer (PMID: 31068372).

snvindel.gene_function: PRKDC，蛋白激酶，DNA活化的催化多肽，是DNA- pk复合体的催化成分，通过非同源末端连接参与DNA修复（PMID: 14726021; PMID: 24680878）。在肺癌和结直肠癌细胞系和模型中敲除PRKDC会诱导DNA损伤和恶性转化增加，这表明PRKDC在这些情况下主要作为肿瘤抑制基因发挥作用（PMID：31055244, PMID: 26175416）。相反，PRKDC在乳腺癌和胃癌细胞系和模型中的过表达诱导细胞周期进程以及细胞增殖和迁移，表明PRKDC在这种情况下主要作为癌基因发挥作用（PMID: 31513357, PMID: 31255330）。PRKDC的突变已在多种癌症中被发现，包括肺癌、乳腺癌、肝癌、结直肠癌和皮肤癌（PMID：32238472, PMID: 35801800）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第3287位氨基酸由丝氨酸突变为甘氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: PRKDC, protein kinase, DNA-activated, catalytic polypeptide, is the catalytic component of the DNA-PK complex, which functions in DNA repair by non-homologous end-joining (PMID: 14726021, PMID: 24680878). Knockdown of PRKDC in lung cancer and colorectal cancer cell lines and models induces increased DNA damage and malignant transformation, suggesting that PRKDC functions predominantly as a tumor suppressor gene in these contexts (PMID: 31055244, PMID: 26175416). Conversely, overexpression of PRKDC in breast cancer and gastric cancer cell lines and models induces cell cycle progression and cellular proliferation and migration, suggesting that PRKDC functions predominantly as an oncogene in this context (PMID: 31513357, PMID: 31255330). Mutations of PRKDC have been identified in various cancers, including lung cancer, breast cancer, liver cancer, colorectal cancer and skin cancer (PMID: 32238472, PMID: 35801800).

snvindel.gene_function: SOX17编码SRY相关的HMG-box（SOX）转录因子家族的成员，作为经典Wnt/β-catenin信号通路的一个重要拮抗剂，可通过与GSK3β无关的机制促进β-catenin/TCF的降解。Wnt信号通路参与了许多生物过程，包括胚胎发育到干细胞维持。例如，小鼠子宫组织中SOX17的条件性消减导致子宫内膜腺体生成的抑制和生殖能力的丧失（PMID：27102016）。小鼠造血干细胞（HSCs）中SOX17的条件性缺失导致了胎儿和新生小鼠造血干细胞的丧失，而不是成年小鼠造血干细胞的丧失，证明了其在维持胎儿和新生小鼠造血干细胞而不是成年造血干细胞中的重要性（PMID: 17655922）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 270th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Methionine to Leucine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.009177(1114/121386) in the iJGVD database, 0.02688(5/186), 0.01092(388/35520), 0.009884(51/5160) in the EAS population of the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, 0.01456(3/206) in the EAS_CHB population of the 1000G database, respectively; the COSMIC database records twice of amino acid change at the SOX17 protein position 270, of which the mutant M270L is recorded twice. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: SOX17 encodes a member of the SRY-related HMG-box (SOX) family of transcription factors and acts as an important antagonist of the canonical Wnt/beta-catenin signaling pathway by promoting the degradation of β-catenin/TCF via a GSK3β-independent mechanism. The Wnt signaling pathway is involved in many biological processes including embryonic development to stem cell maintenance. For example, conditional ablation of SOX17 in mouse uterine tissue resulted in inhibition of endometrial adenogenesis and a loss of reproductive capacity (PMID:27102016). Interestingly, conditional deletion of SOX17 from mouse hematopoietic stem cells (HSCs) led to the loss of fetal and neonatal but not adult HSCs, proving its importance in the maintenance of fetal and neonatal HSCs but not adult HSCs (PMID: 17655922).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.00001659（2/120548）、0.000009584（14/1460716）、0.00001315（2/152108）、0.000008157（1/122588），1000G数据库无记录（ExAC数据未通过过滤标准）；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: PREX2，磷脂酰肌醇-3,4,5-三磷酸依赖性Rac交换因子2，是一种Rho/Rac鸟嘌呤核苷酸交换因子，可激活Rac1，导致细胞迁移和侵袭，并以独立于Rac的方式通过抑制Pten促进PI3K/AKT通路信号传导，从而促进细胞增殖（PMID: 23753921, PMID: 21925199）。 已在黑色素瘤 (PMID: 22622578)、肝细胞癌 (PMID: 30796242) 和胰腺导管腺癌 (PMID: 25719666) 中鉴定出PREX2突变。

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: PREX2, phosphatidylinositol-3,4,5-trisphosphate dependent Rac exchange factor 2, is a Rho/Rac guanine-nucleotide exchange factor that activates Rac1, resulting in cell migration and invasion, and facilitates PI3K/AKT pathway signaling in a Rac independent manner by inhibiting Pten, thereby promoting cell proliferation (PMID: 23753921, PMID: 21925199). PREX2 mutations have been identified in melanoma (PMID: 22622578), hepatocellular carcinoma (PMID: 30796242), and pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PMID: 25719666).

snvindel.gene_function_en: PREX2, phosphatidylinositol-3,4,5-trisphosphate dependent Rac exchange factor 2, is a Rho/Rac guanine-nucleotide exchange factor that activates Rac1, resulting in cell migration and invasion, and facilitates PI3K/AKT pathway signaling in a Rac independent manner by inhibiting Pten, thereby promoting cell proliferation (PMID: 23753921, PMID: 21925199). PREX2 mutations have been identified in melanoma (PMID: 22622578), hepatocellular carcinoma (PMID: 30796242), and pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PMID: 25719666).

snvindel.gene_function: PREX2，磷脂酰肌醇-3,4,5-三磷酸依赖性Rac交换因子2，是一种Rho/Rac鸟嘌呤核苷酸交换因子，可激活Rac1，导致细胞迁移和侵袭，并以独立于Rac的方式通过抑制Pten促进PI3K/AKT通路信号传导，从而促进细胞增殖（PMID: 23753921, PMID: 21925199）。 已在黑色素瘤 (PMID: 22622578)、肝细胞癌 (PMID: 30796242) 和胰腺导管腺癌 (PMID: 25719666) 中鉴定出PREX2突变。

Naturally occurring mutations in this gene are associated with an increased risk for severe toxicities, such as diarrhea and neutropenia, in patients undergoing chemotherapeutic treatment.

snvindel.gene_function: NCOA2，核受体共激活因子 2，与核受体相互作用以共激活下游转录，并在调节多种生物过程中发挥作用 (PMID: 12805412, PMID: 24953190)。 在前列腺癌中发现NCOA2 扩增和过表达(PMID: 25295534)，在横纹肌肉瘤和间充质软骨肉瘤中发现 NCOA2 融合(PMID: 23463663,  PMID: 22034177)。

snvindel.gene_function_en: NCOA2, nuclear receptor coactivator 2, interacts with nuclear receptors to coactivate downstream transcription, and plays a role in regulation of multiple biological processes including reproduction and homeostasis (PMID: 12805412, PMID: 24953190). NCOA2 amplification and overexpression has been demonstrated in prostate cancer (PMID: 25295534), and NCOA2 fusions have been observed in several tumor types, including rhabdomyosarcoma and mesenchymal chondrosarcoma (PMID: 23463663, PMID: 22034177).

snvindel.gene_function: RECQL4（类似于解旋酶4的RecQ）是一种RecQ家族解旋酶，可展开双链DNA，并参与DNA修复和复制起始（PMID: 24606147, PMID: 31276497）。 RECQL4突变与发生淋巴瘤和骨肉瘤的风险增加有关（PMID: 29080750, PMID: 31604778），并且在浸润性乳腺癌中已报道RECQL4扩增（PMID: 32152520）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 1005th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Arginine to Glutamine.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.3844(1925/5008), 0.4612(53204/115360), 0.4597(669553/1456462), 0.3775(57456/152194), 0.3699(45346/122580) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=94891) is Benign in germline classification (review status: two stars). The COSMIC database records 15 times of amino acid change at the RECQL4 protein position 1005, of which the mutant R1005Q is recorded 14 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool BayesDel, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The allele frequency of this variant is 0.3844(1925/5008), 0.4612(53204/115360), 0.4671(113725/243454), 0.3732(11700/31348), 0.3694(40119/108600) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD database, respectively; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool BayesDel, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
snvindel.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.3844（1925/5008）、0.4612（53204/115360）、0.4597（669553/1456462）、0.3775（57456/152194）、0.3699（45346/122580）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=94891）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为两颗星）。COSMIC数据库记录15次RECQL4蛋白第1005位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型R1005Q记录14次。基于整合预测工具BayesDel认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第1005位氨基酸由精氨酸突变为谷氨酰胺。
snvindel.gene_function_en: RECQL4, RecQ like helicase 4, is a RecQ family helicase that unwinds double-stranded DNA, therefore is involved in DNA repair and replication initiation (PMID: 24606147). RECQL4 mutations are associated with increased risk of developing lymphoma and osteosarcoma (PMID: 29080750).

snvindel.gene_function: PTPRD，受体型酪氨酸蛋白磷酸酶delta，是一种肿瘤抑制因子，在细胞生长、粘附、迁移和存活中发挥作用（PMID: 25113440）。PTPRD在多种实体肿瘤中失活（PMID: 19478061）。

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered intermediate, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: PTPRD, receptor-type tyrosine-protein phosphatase delta, is a tumor suppressor, which plays a role in cell growth, adhesion, migration and survival (PMID: 25113440). PTPRD is inactivated in a variety of solid tumors (PMID: 19478061).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.002396（12/5008）、0.001588（123/77444），ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库EAS人群等位基因频率分别为0.01063（92/8654）、0.01267（233/18394）、0.01538（24/1560）；CKB数据库报道为unknown，COSMIC数据库记录1次PTCH1蛋白第827位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型G记录1次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为intermediate，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: PTCH1基因属于抑癌基因，编码蛋白是分泌型hedgehog配体的受体，编码蛋白参与胚胎发育和肿瘤的发生（PMID: 29274272, PMID: 30166346）。

snvindel.gene_function_en: PTCH1, patched 1, is the receptor for secreted hedgehog ligands, which is involved in embryonic development and tumorigenesis (PMID: 29274272, PMID: 30166346).

snvindel.gene_function: NR4A3，核受体亚家族 4 A 组成员 3，是一种不依赖配体的核受体，它在涉及炎症、增殖、分化和存活的基因的转录激活中发挥作用 (PMID: 20631354)。 NR4A3 表达水平和 NR4A3 融合在多种癌症有关(PMID: 22566377)。

snvindel.gene_function_en: NR4A3, nuclear receptor subfamily 4 group A member 3, is a ligand-independent nuclear receptor that plays a role in the transcriptional activation of genes involved in inflammation, proliferation, differentiation, and survival (PMID: 20631354). Alterations in NR4A3 expression levels and NR4A3 fusions have been linked to a variety of cancer types (PMID: 22566377).

snvindel.gene_function: ABL1基因属于原癌基因，其编码蛋白为非受体酪氨酸激酶，在ERK5，Rac/JNK和 Stat1/3 通路通过调节细胞生长发挥作用（PMID: 10373409）。目前已在多种肿瘤中报道了组成型激酶活性的BCR-ABL1融合蛋白（PMID: 18851712, PMID: 30125955），并有相关研究证明了在BCR-ABL1突变的前提下，许多ABL1突变具有耐药性（PMID: 24456693）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第724位氨基酸由组氨酸突变为精氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: ABL1, ABL proto-oncogene 1, non-receptor tyrosine kinase, plays a role in regulation of cell growth through ERK5, Rac/JNK, and Stat1/3 pathways (PMID: 10373409). Fusion proteins of BCR-ABL1 resulting in constitutive kinase activity have been reported in various cancers (PMID: 18851712, PMID: 30125955) and a number of Abl1 mutations in the context of BCR-ABL1 have been demonstrated to confer drug resistance (PMID: 24456693).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率为0.00001842（2/108604），1000G、ExAC、gnomAD数据库无记录；COSMIC数据库记录2次TSC1蛋白第1037位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型S记录1次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。

snvindel.gene_function_en: TSC1, TSC complex subunit 1, is a tumor suppressor (PMID: 30562755) that forms a complex with Tsc2 and inhibits mTOR pathway signaling, thus regulating cell growth and metabolism (PMID: 27226234). Germline TSC1 inactivating mutations cause tuberous sclerosis complex and somatic TSC1 mutations have been identified in various cancers, including renal cell carcinoma, mucosal melanoma, and breast cancer (PMID: 27226234, PMID: 30327302, PMID: 29185092, PMID: 28027327).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；OncoKB数据库报道为Unknown，Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: RET基因属于原癌基因，是一种受体酪氨酸激酶，可以激活MAPK和PI3K/AKT途径并调节细胞生长和分化（PMID: 24561444, PMID: 29134959）。在癌症中，RET基因可以通过点突变或与多种易位基因重排而被激活，从而构成活性的癌蛋白（PMID: 24561444）。RET基因的遗传突变导致MEN2A综合征（如甲状腺髓样癌、嗜铬细胞瘤、甲状旁腺功能亢进）、MEN2B（如甲状腺髓样癌、嗜铬细胞瘤、多发性肠粘膜神经瘤、星形胶质细胞瘤和Marfan综合征）和家族性甲状腺髓样癌（FMTC）（PMID: 15322516）；RET基因的体细胞突变包括点突变和RET基因座的基因组重排，导致逆转或易位；目前，已经在各种癌症中被确定，包括乳头状甲状腺癌、肺腺癌和慢性粒细胞白血病（CMML）。此外，野生型RET的异常表达或激活与胰腺癌的肿瘤侵袭和转移以及乳腺癌的内分泌治疗耐药相关（PMID: 24561444）。

snvindel.gene_function_en: RET, ret proto-oncogene, is a receptor tyrosine kinase that activates MAPK and PI3K/AKT pathways and regulates cell growth and differentiation (PMID: 24561444, PMID: 29134959). RET germline mutations result in MEN2 syndromes and familial medullary thyroid carcinoma (PMID: 20930041, PMID: 24561444) and somatic RET activating mutations, fusions, and Ret overexpression has been associated with a variety of cancers including lung (PMID: 30257958) and colorectal (PMID: 30210625, PMID: 30038711).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2586（1295/5008）、0.3291（39906/121240）、0.3734（545797/1461758）、0.2857（43445/152060）、0.3397（41681/122706）；COSMIC数据库记录16次TET1蛋白第162位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型G记录16次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: TET1是一种依赖铁和α-酮谷氨酸的酶，参与将5-甲基胞嘧啶转化为5-羟甲基胞嘧啶（5hmC）的过程（PMID: 19372391）。这种DNA碱基向5hmC的转化是活化DNA甲基化的初始步骤，这一过程在基因调控、细胞重编程和哺乳动物发育中很重要（PMID: 20639862）。TET酶的活性被由IDH1和IDH2的特定突变产生的抑制性代谢物2-羟基戊二酸（2-HG）抑制，其产生导致高度特异性的DNA甲基化特征，并经常在某些胶质母细胞瘤和白血病中发现（PMID: 21383741）。TET1首先被确认为MLL基因的易位伙伴，是急性骨髓性白血病的关键致癌驱动因素（PMID: 23818607）。在各种人类癌症中也观察到TET1的表达减少。在乳腺癌中，TET1水平的降低被证明与肿瘤生长和转移的增加有关（PMID: 23716660），在结肠癌细胞系中，TET1表达的降低与异常的CpG甲基化谱和WNT途径的激活有关（PMID: 27977763, 25362856）。TET1表达的减少也与KRAS诱导的细胞转化有关（PMID: 25466250）。

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: TET1, tet methylcytosine dioxygenase 1, plays a critical role in DNA demethylation, supports DNA repair, and is involved in regulation of gene expression (PMID: 29556496, PMID: 28555658). TET1 mutations have been identified in colon cancer (PMID: 22895193), fusions between TET1 and KMT2A have been identified in acute myeloid leukemia (PMID: 12124344, PMID: 23100278), and TET1 promoter methylation and downregulation has been identified in multiple tumor types including lung, gastric, colorectal, breast, and renal cancers (PMID: 27225590).

snvindel.gene_function: FGFR2基因属于原癌基因，编码的蛋白为成纤维细胞生长因子受体（FGFR）家族成员之一。FGFR蛋白的胞外段可与成纤维细胞生长因子结合，并启动下游的信号通路，最终影响细胞的分裂与分化。FGFR2扩增或突变在乳腺癌、胃癌、子宫内膜癌等肿瘤中均有报道。

snvindel.gene_function_en: FGFR2, fibroblast growth factor receptor 2, is a receptor tyrosine kinase activated upon binding of the FGF ligand, which activates RAS-MAPK and PI3K-AKT pathways (PMID: 22508544). Altered function of FGFR2 through activating mutations, fusions, and amplification increases cell proliferation and tumorigenesis (PMID: 22508544) and is observed in prostate (PMID: 30761180), breast, lung, uterine, and ovarian cancers (PMID: 29104507), while FGFR2 amplification (PMID: 31076567) and overexpression (PMID: 30662521) is commonly observed in gastric cancer.

snvindel.gene_function: MUC5B，粘液蛋白5B，低聚物粘液/凝胶形成，是一种大型凝胶形成的糖蛋白，是唾液、呼吸道和宫颈中粘液的主要成分（PMID: 9729478, PMID: 19783639）。MUC5B的异常表达与乳腺癌（PMID: 23056409, PMID: 22269464）和肺癌（PMID: 25733373）有关。

snvindel.gene_function_en: MUC5B, mucin 5B, oligomeric mucus/gel-forming, is a large gel-forming glycoprotein that is a major component of mucus in the saliva, respiratory tract, and cervix (PMID: 9729478, PMID: 19783639). Abnormal expression of MUC5B is associated with breast cancer (PMID: 23056409, PMID: 22269464) and lung cancer (PMID: 25733373).

snvindel.gene_function_en: GSTP1 (Glutathione S-Transferase Pi 1) is a Protein Coding gene. Glutathione S-transferases (GSTs) are a family of enzymes that play an important role in detoxification by catalyzing the conjugation of many hydrophobic and electrophilic compounds with reduced glutathione. Diseases associated with GSTP1 include Barrett Esophagus and Oligoasthenoteratozoospermia.

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.1242（622/5008）、0.1927（23358/121240）、0.2234（326590/1461648）、0.1723（26212/152098）、0.04242（5187/122280）；COSMIC数据库记录2次RSF1蛋白第475位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型P记录1次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
snvindel.gene_function: 该基因编码一种与乙型肝炎病毒X蛋白（HBX）相互作用的核蛋白，并通过HBX转录激活剂促进乙型肝炎病毒基因的转录，这表明这种相互作用在病毒生命周期中起着重要作用。该蛋白还与SNF2H蛋白相互作用形成RSF染色质重构复合物，其中SNF2H亚单位作为核小体依赖的atp酶发挥作用，该蛋白作为组蛋白伴侣。RSF染色质重构复合物组装规则核小体阵列所必需的（PMID: 12972596）. 通过pX转录激活剂促进乙型肝炎病毒（HBV）基因的转录。在HBV感染的情况下，与pX一起抑制TNF-α诱导的NF-κB转录激活。当一个融合的异质的DNA结合域被人工整合到染色质中时，抑制转录（PMID: 11944984; PMID:11788598）.
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 475th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Serine to Proline.

Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: This gene encodes a nuclear protein that interacts with hepatitis B virus X protein （HBX) and facilitates transcription of hepatitis B virus genes by the HBX transcription activator, suggesting a role for this interaction in the virus life cycle. This protein also interacts with SNF2H protein to form the RSF chromatin-remodeling complex, where the SNF2H subunit functions as the nucleosome-dependent ATPase, and this protein as the histone chaperone. Required for assembly of regular nucleosome arrays by the RSF chromatin-remodeling complex （PMID:12972596). Facilitates transcription of hepatitis B virus （HBV) genes by the pX transcription activator. In case of infection by HBV, together with pX, it represses TNF-alpha induced NF-kappa-B transcription activation. Represses transcription when artificially recruited to chromatin by fusion to a heterogeneous DNA binding domain （PMID:11944984, PMID:11788598).

snvindel.gene_function: 该基因编码基质金属蛋白酶M10家族的一个成员。该家族的蛋白质参与正常生理过程中的细胞外基质分解，如胚胎发育、繁殖和组织重塑，以及疾病过程中的细胞外基质分解，如关节炎和转移。该基因的突变与慢性阻塞性肺疾病(COPD)有关。

snvindel.gene_function_en: This gene encodes a member of the peptidase M10 family of matrix metalloproteinases (MMPs). Proteins in this family are involved in the breakdown of extracellular matrix in normal physiological processes, such as embryonic development, reproduction, and tissue remodeling, as well as in disease processes, such as arthritis and metastasis. The encoded preproprotein is proteolytically processed to generate the mature protease. This secreted protease breaks down proteoglycans, fibronectin, elastin and casein and differs from most MMP family members in that it lacks a conserved C-terminal hemopexin domain. The enzyme is involved in wound healing, and studies in mice suggest that it regulates the activity of defensins in intestinal mucosa. The gene is part of a cluster of MMP genes on chromosome 11. This gene exhibits elevated expression levels in multiple human cancers.

snvindel.gene_function_en: This gene encodes a large cytoplasmic dynein protein that is involved in retrograde transport in the cilium and has a role in intraflagellar transport, a process required for ciliary/flagellar assembly. Mutations in this gene cause a heterogeneous spectrum of conditions related to altered primary cilium function and often involve polydactyly, abnormal skeletogenesis, and polycystic kidneys. Alternative splicing results in multiple transcript variants encoding distinct proteins.

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: 该变异为发生在功能未知重复区域的框内缺失突变。该变异在ExAC、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.002215（44/19864）、0.000006586（1/151838），gnomADe数据库FIN人群等位基因频率为0.0007409（35/47238），1000G、iJGVD数据库无记录；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。
snvindel.gene_function: CBL，Cbl原癌基因C，是一种E3泛素蛋白连接酶，参与酪氨酸激酶的细胞信号传导和泛素化（PMID: 23085373）。 CBL突变通常导致功能丧失，主要在髓样肿瘤中被发现，包括骨髓增生异常综合症，急性髓样白血病，慢性髓样白血病，骨髓纤维化和少年骨髓单核细胞白血病（PMID: 25477533）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a deletion mutation, which deletes the 42nd amino acid in the gene-encoded protein.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: This variant is an in-frame deletion that occurs in a functionally unknown repeat region. The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.002215(44/19864), 0.000006586(1/151838) in the ExAC, gnomADg databases, 0.0007409(35/47238) in the FIN population of the gnomADe database, respectively, with no record in the 1000G or iJGVD databases; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant.

snvindel.gene_function_en: CBL, Cbl proto-oncogene C, is an E3 ubiquitin-protein ligase involved in cell signaling and ubiquitination of tyrosine kinases (PMID: 23085373). CBL mutations, often resulting in a loss of function, have been identified primarily in myeloid neoplasms, including myelodysplastic syndrome, acute myeloid leukemia, chronic myeloid leukemia, myelofibrosis, and juvenile myelomonocytic leukemia (PMID: 25477533).

snvindel.gene_function: KDM5A基因属于原癌基因，是Jumonji结构域组蛋白去甲基化酶、转录抑制因子和表观遗传修饰物（PMID: 29602065），通过染色质重塑调节基因转录，以促进细胞生长和分化（PMID: 30650517）。KDM5A在包括乳腺癌在内的许多癌症中存在过表达现象（PMID: 22937203），而表达降低可能是胶质瘤的预后（PMID: 29324315）。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a frameshift mutation, which induces a substitution of Glycine with Aspartic acid at position 1200 and causes termination of the protein at codon 1208.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The KDM5A gene is an oncogene, this variant causes a change in protein length. The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.00004159(5/120228), 0.0000006841(1/1461700) in the ExAC, gnomADe databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G, gnomADg or iJGVD databases (data in the ExAC database fails the filter); the COSMIC database records 49 times of amino acid change at the KDM5A protein position 1200, of which the mutant G1200Dfs*9 is recorded 45 times.
snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_en: The KDM5A gene is an oncogene, this variant causes a change in protein length. snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为移码突变，导致基因编码蛋白第1200位氨基酸由甘氨酸突变为天冬氨酸并于1208位发生终止。
snvindel.gene_function_en: KDM5A, lysine demethylase 5A, is a Jumonji domain histone demethylase, transcriptional repressor, and epigenetic modifier (PMID: 29602065), that regulates gene transcription through chromatin remodeling to promote cell growth and differentiation (PMID: 30650517). KDM5A overexpression has been reported in a number of cancers including breast cancer (PMID: 22937203) and decreased expression may be prognostic for glioma (PMID: 29324315).

snvindel.gene_function: CHD4是染色体域解旋酶DNA结合蛋白4，是核小体重构和组蛋白脱乙酰基酶（NuRD）复合体的一个亚基，既作为转录调节剂，又促进DNA双链断裂修复（PMID: 23697937, PMID: 23954449）。 在子宫内膜癌（PMID: 29888111）中已鉴定出CHD4突变，在结直肠癌（PMID: 28486105）和胶质母细胞瘤（PMID: 30872624）中已观察到CHD4表达增加。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第529位氨基酸由苏氨酸突变为蛋氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: CHD4, chromodomain helicase DNA binding protein 4, is a subunit of the nucleosome remodeling and histone deacetylase (NuRD) complex, acting as a transcriptional regulator as well as promoting DNA double strand break repair (PMID: 23697937, PMID: 23954449). CHD4 mutations have been identified in endometrial cancer (PMID: 29888111), and increased CHD4 expression has been observed in colorectal cancer (PMID: 28486105) and glioblastoma (PMID: 30872624).

snvindel.gene_function: 该基因编码有机阴离子转运蛋白家族的肝脏特异性成员。编码蛋白是一种跨膜受体，介导多种内源性化合物（包括胆红素、17β-葡萄糖醛酸雌二醇和白三烯C4）的钠非依赖性摄取。这种蛋白质也参与了药物化合物的清除，如他汀类药物、溴磺酚类化合物和利福平从血液进入肝细胞。编码该蛋白的基因多态性与转运蛋白功能受损有关。

snvindel.gene_function_en: This gene encodes a liver-specific member of the organic anion transporter family. The encoded protein is a transmembrane receptor that mediates the sodium-independent uptake of numerous endogenous compounds including bilirubin, 17-beta-glucuronosyl estradiol and leukotriene C4. This protein is also involved in the removal of drug compounds such as statins, bromosulfophthalein and rifampin from the blood into the hepatocytes. Polymorphisms in the gene encoding this protein are associated with impaired transporter function.

snvindel.gene_function: ARID2编码富含AT相互作用结构域的DNA结合蛋白家族成员，是SWI/SNF染色质重塑复合体PBAF的成员（PMID: 32303701），并参与细胞周期激活（PMID: 29072391）。ARID2功能失活已在肝细胞癌（PMID: 22095441, PMID: 28238438）、NSCLC（PMID: 23047306）、乳头状肾细胞癌（PMID: 25790038）、黑色素瘤（PMID: 32303701）等肿瘤中有报道。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 810th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Alanine to Proline.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.000363(44/121208), 0.02677(3286/122768) in the ExAC, iJGVD databases, 0.01484(589/39690), 0.005789(30/5182) in the EAS population of the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, 0.02404(5/208) in the EAS_JPT population of the 1000G database, respectively; the COSMIC database records 4 times of amino acid change at the ARID2 protein position 810, of which the mutant A810P is recorded 3 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

snvindel.gene_function_en: ARID2, AT-rich interactive domain-containing protein 2, is a member of the SWI/SNF chromatin remodeling complex and is involved in cell-cycle activation. Arid2 loss of function has been identified in hepatoceullar carcinoma (PMID: 22095441, PMID: 28238438), NSCLC (PMID: 23047306), and papillary renal cell carcinoma (PMID: 25790038).

snvindel.gene_function: KMT2D（组蛋白赖氨酸N-甲基转移酶2D）是一种组蛋白甲基转移酶，可将H3K4me甲基化，并参与转录激活，主要在发育和细胞分化过程中发生（PMID: 28666924;PMID: 24240169）。 KMT2D突变与各种肿瘤类型相关，包括ESCC（PMID: 25151357），滤泡性淋巴瘤（PMID: 24362818）和肺部（PMID: 28007623;PMID: 27873319）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第3723位氨基酸由亮氨酸突变为谷氨酰胺。
snvindel.gene_function_en: KMT2D, histone-lysine N-methyltransferase 2D, is a histone methyltransferase which methylates H3K4me and is involved in transcriptional activation, mostly during development and cell differentiation (PMID: 28669924, PMID: 24240169). KMT2D mutations are associated with various tumor types, including ESCC (PMID: 25151357), follicular lymphoma (PMID: 24362818), and lung (PMID: 28007623, PMID: 27873319).

snvindel.gene_function: ERBB3编码EGFR受体酪氨酸激酶HER3，可激活PI3K-AKT-mTOR和RAS-RAF-MEK-ERK途径来促进细胞存活和增殖（PMID: 17471238）。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第262位氨基酸由脯氨酸突变为组氨酸。
snvindel.gene_function_en: ERBB3 encodes HER3, an EGFR receptor tyrosine kinase, which activates PI3K-AKT-mTOR and RAS-RAF-MEK-ERK pathways to promote cell survival and proliferation (PMID: 17471238).

snvindel.gene_function: STAT6，信号转导和转录激活因子 6，是一种 STAT 家族转录因子，可介导 IL-4/13 信号传导和 Th2 免疫细胞分化 (PMID: 24470978)。与野生型小鼠相比，结肠炎相关结肠癌小鼠模型中 STAT6 的缺失导致结肠中的肿瘤形成、炎症、核 β-连环蛋白和增殖减少 (PMID: 28385737)。NAB2-STAT6常见于孤立性纤维性肿瘤(PMID: 35303277,PMID: 34818026)。
snvindel.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为移码突变，导致基因编码蛋白第281位氨基酸由谷氨酰胺突变为精氨酸并于283位发生终止。
snvindel.gene_function_en: STAT6, signal transducer and activator of transcription 6, is a STAT family transcription factor that mediates IL-4/13 signaling and differentiation of Th2 immune cells (PMID: 24470978). Loss of STAT6 in mouse models of colitis-associated colon cancer resulted in reduced tumor formation, inflammation, nuclear beta-catenin, and proliferation in the colon relative to wild-type mice (PMID: 28385737).

snvindel.carcinogenicity_variant_interpret_cn: GLI1基因具有原癌基因属性，该变异为蛋白长度改变的变异。该变异在ExAC、gnomADe数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.000008298（1/120516）、0.000008895（13/1461492），1000G、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库无记录；COSMIC数据库记录64次GLI1蛋白第274位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型G274Afs*6记录61次。
snvindel.gene_function: GLI1，GLI 家族锌指蛋白 1，是一种转录因子，在Sonic Hedgehog 信号通路发挥调控作用 (PMID: 11001584)。目前已在神经胶质瘤发现GLI1 扩增(PMID: 3563490) 。GLI1融合常见于恶性上皮样肿瘤(PMID: 29309307)。
snvindel.variant_desc_en: This variant is a frameshift mutation, which induces a substitution of Glycine with Alanine at position 274 and causes termination of the protein at codon 279.
snvindel.variant_interpret_en: The GLI1 gene has oncogenic properties, this variant causes a change in protein length. The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.000008298(1/120516), 0.000008895(13/1461492) in the ExAC, gnomADe databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G, gnomADg or iJGVD databases; the COSMIC database records 64 times of amino acid change at the GLI1 protein position 274, of which the mutant G274Afs*6 is recorded 61 times.

snvindel.gene_function_en: GLI1, GLI family zinc finger 1, is a transcription factor acting in the Sonic Hedgehog signaling pathway of developmental regulation (PMID: 11001584). GLI1 amplification has been identified in glioma (PMID: 3563490), and is able to transform cells when coexpressed with adenovirus E1A (PMID: 1825351).
