drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An inhibitor of ataxia telangiectasia and rad3-related (ATR) kinase, a DNA damage response kinase, with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon administration, berzosertib selectively binds to and inhibits ATR kinase activity and prevents ATR-mediated signaling in the ATR-checkpoint kinase 1 (Chk1) signaling pathway. This prevents DNA damage checkpoint activation, disrupts DNA damage repair, and induces tumor cell apoptosis. ATR, a serine/threonine protein kinase upregulated in a variety of cancer cell types, plays a key role in DNA repair, cell cycle progression, and survival; it is activated by DNA damage caused during DNA replication-associated stress.

An orally bioavailable imidazoquinoline targeting the phosphatidylinositol 3 kinase (PI3K) and the mammalian target of rapamycin (mTOR), with potential antineoplastic activity. Dactolisib inhibits PI3K kinase and mTOR kinase in the PI3K/AKT/mTOR kinase signaling pathway, which may result in tumor cell apoptosis and growth inhibition in PI3K/mTOR-overexpressing tumor cells. Activation of the PI3K/mTOR pathway promotes cell growth, survival, and resistance to chemotherapy and radiotherapy; mTOR, a serine/threonine kinase downstream of PI3K, may also be activated independent of PI3K.

An inhibitor of embryonic ectoderm development protein (EED) and allosteric inhibitor of polycomb repressive complex 2 (PRC2), with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon administration, MAK683 selectively binds to the domain of EED that interacts with trimethylated lysine 27 on histone 3 (H3K27me3), which leads to a conformational change in the EED H3K27me3-binding pocket and prevents the interaction of EED with the histone methyltransferase enhancer zeste homolog 2 (EZH2). Disruption of the EED-EZH2 protein-protein interaction (PPI) results in a loss of H3K27me3-stimulated PRC2 activity and prevents H3K27 trimethylation. This decrease in histone methylation alters gene expression patterns associated with cancer pathways and results in decreased tumor cell proliferation in EZH2-mutated and PRC2-dependent cancer cells. PRC2, a histone H3 lysine 27 methyltransferase and multi-protein complex comprised of EZH2, EED and suppressor of zeste 12 (SUZ12), plays a key role in gene regulation, especially during embryonic development. EZH2, the catalytic subunit of PRC2, is overexpressed or mutated in a variety of cancer cells. EED is essential for the histone methyltransferase activity of PRC2 because EED directly binds to H3K27me3.

An orally available selective inhibitor of the histone lysine methyltransferase (HMT) enhancer of zeste homolog 2 (EZH2), with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon oral administration, EZH2 inhibitor CPI-0209 selectively targets, binds to and inhibits the activity of EZH2. Inhibition of EZH2 specifically prevents the methylation of histone H3 on lysine 27 (H3K27). This decrease in histone methylation alters gene expression patterns associated with cancer pathways and results in decreased proliferation of EZH2-expressing cancer cells. EZH2, an HMT class enzyme and the catalytic subunit of the polycomb repressive complex 2 (PRC2), is overexpressed or mutated in a variety of cancer cells and plays a key role in tumor cell proliferation; its expression is correlated with tumor initiation, progression, stem cell self-renewal, migration and angiogenesis.

An orally available selective inhibitor of the histone lysine methyltransferase EZH2, with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon oral administration, CPI-1205 selectively inhibits the activity of both wild-type and mutated forms of EZH2. Inhibition of EZH2 specifically prevents the methylation of histone H3 on lysine 27 (H3K27). This decrease in histone methylation alters gene expression patterns associated with cancer pathways and results in decreased proliferation of EZH2-expressing cancer cells. EZH2, a histone lysine methyltransferase (HMT) class enzyme and the catalytic subunit of the polycomb repressive complex 2 (PRC2), is overexpressed or mutated in a variety of cancer cells and plays a key role in tumor cell proliferation; its expression is correlated with tumor initiation, progression, stem cell self-renewal, migration and angiogenesis.

A small molecule inhibitor of class I phosphatidylinositol 3 kinase (PI3K), with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon administration, pictilisib selectively binds to PI3K in an ATP-competitive manner, inhibiting the production of the secondary messenger phosphatidylinositol-3,4,5-trisphosphate (PIP3) and activation of the PI3K/Akt signaling pathway. This may result in inhibition of tumor cell growth, motility and survival in susceptible tumor cell populations. Activation of the PI3K/Akt signaling pathway is frequently associated with tumorigenesis; dysregulated PI3K/Akt signaling may contribute to tumor resistance to a variety of antineoplastic agents.

An orally available inhibitor of porcupine (PORCN), with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon oral administration, RXC004 binds to and inhibits PORCN in the endoplasmic reticulum (ER), which blocks post-translational acylation of Wnt ligands and inhibits their secretion. This prevents the activation of Wnt ligands, interferes with Wnt-mediated signaling, and inhibits cell growth in Wnt-driven tumors. Porcupine, a membrane-bound O-acyltransferase (MBOAT), is required for the palmitoylation of Wnt ligands, and plays a key role in Wnt ligand secretion and activity. Wnt signaling is dysregulated in a variety of cancers.

A poly(ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) -1 and -2 inhibitor with chemosensitizing and antitumor activities. With no antiproliferative effects as a single agent at therapeutic concentrations, ABT-888 inhibits PARPs, thereby inhibiting DNA repair and potentiating the cytotoxicity of DNA-damaging agents. PARP nuclear enzymes are activated by DNA single or double strand breaks, resulting in the poly(ADP-ribosyl)ation of other nuclear DNA binding proteins involved in DNA repair; poly(ADP-ribosyl)ation contributes to efficient DNA repair and to survival of proliferating cells exposed to mild genotoxic stresses as induced by as oxidants, alkylating agents or ionizing radiation.

A methylated derivative and structural analog of PRIMA-1 (p53 re-activation and induction of massive apoptosis), with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon administration, PRIMA-1 analog APR-246 covalently modifies the core domain of mutated forms of cellular tumor antigen p53 (p53) through the alkylation of thiol groups. These modifications restore both the wild-type conformation and function to mutant p53, which reconstitutes endogenous p53 activity, leading to cell cycle arrest and apoptosis in tumor cells. This agent may work synergistically with other antineoplastic agents. p53, a tumor suppressor and transcription factor normally activated upon DNA damage, is frequently mutated and overexpressed in cancer cells; it plays a key role in both DNA repair and the induction of apoptosis.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 阿扎胞苷为胞苷的嘧啶核苷类似物，具有抗肿瘤活性。 阿扎胞苷被掺入 DNA 中，它可逆地抑制 DNA 甲基转移酶，从而阻断 DNA 甲基化。 阿扎胞苷对 DNA 的低甲基化可能会激活因高甲基化而沉默的肿瘤抑制基因，从而产生抗肿瘤作用。 该试剂还掺入 RNA，从而破坏正常的 RNA 功能并削弱 tRNA 胞嘧啶-5-甲基转移酶活性。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A pyrimidine nucleoside analogue of cytidine with antineoplastic activity. Azacitidine is incorporated into DNA, where it reversibly inhibits DNA methyltransferase, thereby blocking DNA methylation.  Hypomethylation of DNA by azacitidine may activate tumor suppressor genes silenced by hypermethylation, resulting in an antitumor effect. This agent is also incorporated into RNA, thereby disrupting normal RNA function and impairing tRNA cytosine-5-methyltransferase activity. (NCI04)

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 依维莫司是PI3K / AKT通路下游的雷帕霉素（sTOR-s苏氨酸激酶）哺乳动物靶标的抑制剂。该mTOR通路在几种人类癌症和结节性硬化复合物（TSC）中失调。细胞内蛋白FKBP-12，与mTOR复合物1（mTORC1）形成抑制性复合物，从而抑制mTOR激酶活性。依维莫司降低S6核糖体蛋白激酶（S6K1）和真核起始因子4E结合蛋白（4E -BP1），mTOR的下游效应子，参与蛋白质合成，S6K1是mTORC1的底物，磷酸化雌激素受体的激活结构域1，导致受体的配体非依赖性激活；依维莫司抑制缺氧的表达。诱导因子（例如HIF-1）并降低血管内皮生长因子（VEGF）的表达，依维莫司对mTOR的抑制作用可降低细胞增殖体外和/或体内研究中的血管生成，血管生成和葡萄糖摄取。 PI3K / Akt / mTOR途径的组成性激活可以促进乳腺癌的内分泌抵抗力。体外研究表明，雌激素依赖性和HER2 +乳腺癌细胞对依维莫司的抑制作用敏感，并且依维莫司和Akt，HER2或芳香酶抑制剂的联合治疗以协同方式增强了依维莫司的抗肿瘤活性.2 mTORC1信号的调节剂是癌基因抑制物结核菌硬化复合物1和2（TSC1，TSC2）。 TSC1或TSC2的丢失或失活导致下游信号传导的激活。在TSC中，一种遗传性疾病会导致TSC1或TSC2基因的失活突变导致错构瘤在全身的形成以及癫痫发作和癫痫发生。 mTOR的过度激活会导致神经元发育异常，轴突发生异常和树突形成，兴奋性突触电流增加，髓鞘减少以及皮质层状结构破坏。导致神经元发育和功能异常。在大脑中mTOR失调的动物模型中用mTOR抑制剂治疗可抑制癫痫发作，预防新发癫痫发作的发生并防止过早死亡。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A derivative of the natural macrocyclic lactone sirolimus with immunosuppressant and anti-angiogenic properties. In cells, everolimus binds to the immunophilin FK Binding Protein-12 (FKBP-12) to generate an immunosuppressive complex that binds to and inhibits the activation of the mammalian Target of Rapamycin (mTOR), a key regulatory kinase. Inhibition of mTOR activation results in the inhibition of T lymphocyte activation and proliferation associated with antigen and cytokine (IL-2, IL-4, and IL-15) stimulation and the inhibition of antibody production. (NCI05)

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 贝伐珠单抗结合VEGF并阻止VEGF与其在内皮细胞表面的受体（Flt-1和KDR）相互作用。 在血管生成的体外模型中，VEGF与其受体的相互作用导致内皮细胞增殖和新血管形成。 在裸鼠结肠癌异种移植模型中应用贝伐珠单抗可降低微血管生长和抑制转移性疾病的进展。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A recombinant humanized monoclonal antibody directed against the vascular endothelial growth factor (VEGF), a pro-angiogenic cytokine.  Bevacizumab binds to VEGF and inhibits VEGF receptor binding, thereby preventing the growth and maintenance of tumor blood vessels.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准奥拉帕利用于携带有害或疑似有害BRCA胚系变异（gBRCAm）的前线经3线及以上化疗的晚期卵巢癌成人患者的治疗。
FDA批准奥拉帕利用于携带BRCA胚系突变（gBRCAm）的HER2阴性的转移性乳腺癌成人患者，这些患者既往接受过新辅助、辅助或转移性治疗中接受过化疗；HR阳性的乳腺癌患者应接受过内分泌治疗或被认为不适合进行内分泌治疗。
FDA批准奥拉帕利用于携带胚系或体细胞 BRCA 突变、一线基于铂类化疗完全缓解或部分缓解的晚期上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者的维持治疗。
FDA批准奥拉帕利用于携带有害或疑似有害BRCA胚系突变的（gBRCAm）、接受一线铂类化疗至少16周无进展的转移性胰腺腺癌成人患者的治疗。
FDA批准奥拉帕利用于携带有害或疑似有害的HRR基因胚系或体细胞突变的（ATMm、BRCA1m、BRCA2m、BARD1m、BRIP1m、CDK12m、CHEK1m、CHEK2m、FANCLm、PALB2m、RAD51Bm、 RAD51Cm、RAD51Dm、RAD54Lm）、前线经恩杂鲁胺或阿比特龙治疗的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌成人患者（mCRPC）的治疗。
NMPA批准奥拉帕利适用于携带胚系或体细胞BRCA突变的（gBRCAm或sBRCAm）晚期上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌初治成人患者在一线含铂化疗达到完全缓解或部分缓解后的维持治疗。
FDA批准奥拉帕利适用于携带有害或疑似有害胚系变异（gBRCAm）的、HER2阴性、高风险早期乳腺癌成人患者的辅助治疗，这些患者既往接受过新辅助或辅助化疗。
NMPA批准奥拉帕利用于铂敏感的复发性上皮性卵巢癌或输卵管癌、原发性腹膜癌成人患者在含铂化疗达到完全缓解或部分缓解后的维持治疗。
FDA批准奥拉帕利用于携带胚系或体细胞 BRCA 突变、基于铂类化疗完全缓解或部分缓解的晚期上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者的维持治疗。
NMPA附条件批准奥拉帕利单药用于携带胚系或体细胞BRCA突变（gBRCAm或sBRCAm）且既往治疗（包括一种新型内分泌药物）失败的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌成人患者的治疗。
adaptation_disease_en: FDA approved Olaparib for the treatment of adult patients with deleterious or suspected deleterious germline BRCA-mutated (gBRCAm) advanced ovarian cancer who have been treated with three or more prior lines of chemotherapy.

FDA approved Olaparib for the treatment of adult patients with deleterious or suspected deleterious gBRCAm, HER2-negative metastatic breast cancer who have 
been treated with chemotherapy in the neoadjuvant, adjuvant or metastatic setting. Patients with hormone receptor (HR)-positive breast cancer should have been treated with a prior endocrine therapy or be considered inappropriate for endocrine therapy.

FDA approved Olaparib for the maintenance treatment of adult patients with deleterious or suspected deleterious germline or somatic BRCA-mutated advanced epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube or primary peritoneal cancer who are in complete or partial response to first-line platinum-based chemotherapy.

FDA approved Olaparib for the maintenance treatment of adult patients with deleterious or suspected deleterious gBRCAm metastatic pancreatic adenocarcinoma whose disease has not progressed on at least 16 weeks of a first-line platinum-based chemotherapy regimen.

FDA approved Olaparib for the treatment of adult patients with deleterious or suspected deleterious germline or somatic homologous recombination repair (HRR) gene-mutated metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer (mCRPC) who have progressed following prior treatment with enzalutamide or abiraterone.

FDA approved Olaparib for the adjuvant treatment of adult patients with deleterious or suspected deleterious gBRCAm human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 (HER2)-negative high risk early breast cancer who have been treated with neoadjuvant or adjuvant chemotherapy.

FDA approved Olaparib for the maintenance treatment of adult patients with deleterious or suspected deleterious germline or somatic BRCA-mutated recurrent epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube or primary peritoneal cancer, who are in complete or partial response to platinum-based chemotherapy.
approval_tumour: 卵巢/输卵管癌;Ovarian/Fallopian Tube Cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Olaparib（Lynparza）是聚（ADP-核糖）聚合酶（PARP）酶的抑制剂，包括PARP1，PARP2和PARP3。 PARP酶参与正常的细胞功能，例如DNA转录和DNA修复。 已经证明Olaparib在体外抑制人类肿瘤小鼠异种移植模型中特定肿瘤细胞系的生长，无论是单一疗法还是铂类化学疗法。 在细胞株和小鼠肿瘤模型中发现，用olaparib治疗后细胞毒性和抗肿瘤活性增加，而BRCA和非BRCA蛋白的缺陷与DNA损伤的同源重组修复（HRR）有关，并与铂反应相关。 体外研究表明，Olaparib诱导的细胞毒性可能涉及抑制PARP酶活性和增加PARP-DNA复合物的形成，从而导致细胞稳态的破坏和细胞死亡。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A small molecule inhibitor of the nuclear enzyme poly(ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) with potential chemosensitizing, radiosensitizing, and antineoplastic activities. Olaparib selectively binds to and inhibits PARP, inhibiting PARP-mediated repair of single strand DNA breaks; PARP inhibition may enhance the cytotoxicity of DNA-damaging agents and may reverse tumor cell chemoresistance and radioresistance. PARP catalyzes post-translational ADP-ribosylation of nuclear proteins and can be activated by single-stranded DNA breaks.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准纳武利尤单抗±伊匹木单抗用于经过氟尿嘧啶、奥沙利铂和伊立替康治疗后进展的MSI-H/dMMR转移性结直肠癌患者的治疗。
NMPA批准纳武利尤单抗（Nivolumab）联合伊匹木单抗（Ipilimumab）用于治疗初治的不可切除的非上皮样恶性胸膜间皮瘤成人患者的治疗。

FDA批准纳武利尤单抗+伊匹木单抗用于不可切除的恶性腹膜间皮瘤成人患者的一线治疗。
FDA批准纳武利尤单抗+伊匹木单抗用于中等或较差风险的晚期肾细胞癌患者的一线治疗。
FDA批准纳武利尤单抗+伊匹木单抗用于前线接受过索拉菲尼治疗的肝细胞癌患者。
FDA批准纳武利尤单抗+伊匹木单抗用于不可切除的晚期或转移性食管鳞状细胞癌患者的一线治疗。
FDA批准纳武利尤单抗+伊匹木单抗用于PD-L1表达阳性（≥1%）且无EGFR或ALK基因变异的转移性非小细胞肺癌成人患者的一线治疗。
FDA批准纳武利尤单抗单药或与伊匹木单抗联用用于不可切除的或转移性黑色素瘤患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: PD-1配体PD-L1和PD-L2与T细胞上的PD-1受体的结合会抑制T细胞增殖和细胞因子的产生。 PD-1配体的上调发生在某些肿瘤中，通过该途径的信号传导可能有助于抑制肿瘤的主动T细胞免疫监视。 Nivolumab是一种人类免疫球蛋白G4（IgG4）单克隆抗体，与PD-1受体结合并阻断其与PD-L1和PD-L2的相互作用，从而释放PD-1途径介导的免疫应答抑制作用，包括抗肿瘤作用免疫反应。在同系小鼠肿瘤模型中，阻断PD-1活性导致肿瘤生长减少。结合的nivolumab（抗PD-1）和ipilimumab（抗CTLA-4）介导的抑制作用导致增强的T细胞功能，其作用大于单独使用任一抗体的作用，并提高了转移性黑素瘤和高级RCC的抗肿瘤反应。在鼠类同系肿瘤模型中，PD-1和CTLA-4的双重阻断导致抗肿瘤活性增加。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A fully human immunoglobulin (Ig) G4 monoclonal antibody directed against the negative immunoregulatory human cell surface receptor programmed death-1 (PD-1, PCD-1) with immune checkpoint inhibitory and antineoplastic activities. Upon administration, nivolumab binds to and blocks the activation of PD-1, an immunoglobulin superfamily (IgSF) transmembrane protein, by its ligands programmed cell death ligand 1 (PD-L1), which is overexpressed on certain cancer cells, and programmed cell death ligand 2 (PD-L2), which is primarily expressed on antigen-presenting cells (APCs). This results in the activation of T-cells and cell-mediated immune responses against tumor cells. Activated PD-1 negatively regulates T-cell activation and plays a key role in tumor evasion from host immunity.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: CTLA-4是T细胞活性的负调节剂。 伊匹木单抗是一种单克隆抗体，可与CTLA-4结合并阻断CTLA-4与其配体CD80 / CD86的相互作用。 已显示对CTLA-4的阻断可增强T细胞的活化和增殖，包括肿瘤浸润性T效应细胞的活化和增殖。 抑制CTLA-4信号传导还可以降低T调节细胞功能，这可能有助于T细胞反应性的普遍提高，包括抗肿瘤免疫反应。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A recombinant human immunoglobulin (Ig) G1 monoclonal antibody directed against the human T-cell receptor cytotoxic T-lymphocyte-associated antigen 4 (CTLA4), with immune checkpoint inhibitory and antineoplastic activities. Ipilimumab binds to CTLA4 expressed on T-cells and inhibits the CTLA4-mediated downregulation of T-cell activation. This leads to a cytotoxic T-lymphocyte (CTL)-mediated immune response against cancer cells. CTLA4, an inhibitory receptor and member of the immunoglobulin superfamily, plays a key role in the downregulation of the immune system.

therapeutic_regimen.regimen_cn: 纳武利尤单抗+伊匹木单抗

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗用于一线铂类为基础的化疗完全或部分缓解的、HRD阳性的晚期卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者的治疗，其中HRD阳性定义为携带BRCA有害或疑似有害突变或基因组不稳定。
NMPA批准奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗用于同源重组修复缺陷（HRD）阳性的晚期上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者在一线含铂化疗联合贝伐珠单抗治疗达到完全缓解或部分缓解后的维持治疗。
adaptation_disease_en:
FDA approved Olaparib in combination with bevacizumab for the maintenance treatment of adult patients with advanced epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube or primary 
peritoneal cancer who are in complete or partial response to first-line platinum-based chemotherapy and whose cancer is associated with homologous recombination deficiency (HRD)-positive status defined by either: a deleterious or suspected deleterious BRCA mutation, and/or genomic instability.
approval_tumour: 卵巢/输卵管癌;Ovarian/Fallopian Tube Cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Olaparib（Lynparza）是聚（ADP-核糖）聚合酶（PARP）酶的抑制剂，包括PARP1，PARP2和PARP3。 PARP酶参与正常的细胞功能，例如DNA转录和DNA修复。 已经证明Olaparib在体外抑制人类肿瘤小鼠异种移植模型中特定肿瘤细胞系的生长，无论是单一疗法还是铂类化学疗法。 在细胞株和小鼠肿瘤模型中发现，用olaparib治疗后细胞毒性和抗肿瘤活性增加，而BRCA和非BRCA蛋白的缺陷与DNA损伤的同源重组修复（HRR）有关，并与铂反应相关。 体外研究表明，Olaparib诱导的细胞毒性可能涉及抑制PARP酶活性和增加PARP-DNA复合物的形成，从而导致细胞稳态的破坏和细胞死亡。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A small molecule inhibitor of the nuclear enzyme poly(ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) with potential chemosensitizing, radiosensitizing, and antineoplastic activities. Olaparib selectively binds to and inhibits PARP, inhibiting PARP-mediated repair of single strand DNA breaks; PARP inhibition may enhance the cytotoxicity of DNA-damaging agents and may reverse tumor cell chemoresistance and radioresistance. PARP catalyzes post-translational ADP-ribosylation of nuclear proteins and can be activated by single-stranded DNA breaks.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 贝伐珠单抗结合VEGF并阻止VEGF与其在内皮细胞表面的受体（Flt-1和KDR）相互作用。 在血管生成的体外模型中，VEGF与其受体的相互作用导致内皮细胞增殖和新血管形成。 在裸鼠结肠癌异种移植模型中应用贝伐珠单抗可降低微血管生长和抑制转移性疾病的进展。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A recombinant humanized monoclonal antibody directed against the vascular endothelial growth factor (VEGF), a pro-angiogenic cytokine.  Bevacizumab binds to VEGF and inhibits VEGF receptor binding, thereby preventing the growth and maintenance of tumor blood vessels.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准鲁卡帕尼用于携带BRCA胚系或体系有害突变的、接受过雄激素受体的治疗及基于紫杉醇的方案化疗的转移性去势抵抗前列腺癌（mCRPC）成人患者的治疗。
FDA批准鲁卡帕尼用于对铂类化疗完全或部分反应的复发性上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成年患者的维持治疗。
FDA批准鲁卡帕尼用于携带有害BRCA突变（胚系和/或体细胞）、对铂类化疗完全或部分缓解的复发性上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成年患者的维持治疗。
adaptation_disease_en: FDA approved Rucaparib for the treatment of adult patients with a deleterious BRCA mutation (germline and/or somatic)-associated metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer (mCRPC) who have been treated with androgen receptor-directed therapy and a taxane-based chemotherapy.

FDA approved RUBRACA for the maintenance treatment of adult patients with a deleterious BRCA mutation (germline and/or somatic)- associated recurrent epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube, or primary peritoneal cancer who are in a complete or partial response to platinum-based chemotherapy.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Rucaparib是一种多聚(adp -核糖)聚合酶(PARP)的抑制剂，包括PARP-1, PARP-2和PARP-3，在DNA修复中发挥作用。体外研究表明，rucaparib诱导的细胞毒性可能会抑制PARP酶活性和促进PARP-DNA复合物的形成，从而导致DNA损伤、细胞凋亡和癌细胞死亡。在BRCA1/2和其他DNA修复基因缺失的肿瘤细胞系中观察到rucaparib诱导的细胞毒性和抗肿瘤活性增加。Rucaparib已被证明在人类癌症的小鼠异种移植模型中降低肿瘤生长，无论是否存在BRCA缺失。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable tricyclic indole and inhibitor of poly(ADP-ribose) polymerases (PARPs) 1 (PARP1), 2 (PARP2) and 3 (PARP3), with potential chemo/radiosensitizing and antineoplastic activities. Upon administration, rucaparib selectively binds to PARP1, 2 and 3 and inhibits PARP-mediated DNA repair. This enhances the accumulation of DNA strand breaks, promotes genomic instability and induces cell cycle arrest and apoptosis. This may enhance the cytotoxicity of DNA-damaging agents and reverse tumor cell resistance to chemotherapy and radiation therapy. PARPs are enzymes activated by single-strand DNA breaks that catalyze the post-translational ADP-ribosylation of nuclear proteins, which induces signaling and the recruitment of other proteins to repair damaged DNA. The PARP-mediated repair pathway plays a key role in DNA repair and is dysregulated in a variety of cancer cell types.

adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准氟唑帕利用于既往经过二线及以上化疗的伴有胚系BRCA突变(gBRCAm)的铂敏感复发性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌患者的治疗。
NMPA批准氟唑帕利单药或联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼用于新辅助、辅助或转移阶段接受过化疗治疗的伴有胚系BRCA突变（gBRCAm）的人表皮生长因子受体（HER2）阴性转移性乳腺癌成年患者。激素受体（HR）阳性乳腺癌患者既往需接受过内分泌治疗或被认为不适合接受内分泌治疗。
approval_tumour: 卵巢/输卵管癌;Ovarian/Fallopian Tube Cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 氟唑帕利为小分子PARP抑制剂，可抑制BRCA1/2功能异常细胞中的DNA修复过程，诱导细胞周期阻滞，进而抑制肿瘤细胞增殖。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally available inhibitor of poly (ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) types 1 and 2, with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon oral administration, fluzoparib inhibits PARP 1 and 2 activity, which inhibits PARP-mediated repair of damaged DNA via the base excision repair (BER) pathway, enhances the accumulation of DNA strand breaks, promotes genomic instability, and leads to an induction of apoptosis. The PARP family of proteins catalyze post-translational ADP-ribosylation of nuclear proteins, which then transduce signals to recruit other proteins to repair damaged DNA. PARP inhibition may enhance the cytotoxicity of DNA-damaging agents and may reverse tumor cell chemoresistance and radioresistance.

adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准帕米帕利用于既往经过二线及以上化疗的伴有胚系BRCA（gBRCA）突变的复发性晚期卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌患者的治疗。
approval_tumour: 卵巢/输卵管癌;Ovarian/Fallopian Tube Cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 帕米帕利是一种PARP1 和 PARP2 的强效、选择性抑制剂。它通过抑制肿瘤细胞DNA单链损伤的修复和同源重组修复缺陷，对肿瘤细胞起到合成致死的作用，尤其对携带BRCA基因突变的DNA修复缺陷型肿瘤细胞敏感度高。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: Pamiparib is a potent and selective inhibitor of PARP1 and PARP2. It exerts synthetic lethality on tumor cells by inhibiting the repair of DNA single-strand breaks and taking advantage of homologous recombination repair deficiencies. In particular, it shows high sensitivity towards DNA repair-deficient tumor cells carrying BRCA gene mutations.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA已批准帕博利珠单抗（pembrolizumab）单药用于不可切除或转移性的高肿瘤突变负荷(TMB-H)[≥10mut/Mb]的成人和儿童实体瘤，这些患者经既往治疗后进展，且没有令人满意的替代治疗方案。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗用于MSI-H/dMMR的不可切除或转移性结直肠患者的治疗。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗用于不可切除或转移性的MSI-H/dMMR的前线治疗后进展且没有令人满意的替代治疗方案的实体瘤患者。
NMPA批准帕博利珠单抗用于一线治疗进展后的局部晚期或转移性黑色素瘤。
NMPA批准帕博利珠单抗用于PD-L1 CPS≥10、既往一线全身治疗失败的、局部晚期或转移性食管鳞状细胞癌(ESCC)患者的治疗。
NMPA批准帕博利珠单抗用于肿瘤表达 PD-L1 CPS≥20的转移性或不可切除的复发性头颈部鳞状细胞癌（HNSCC）患者的一线单药治疗。
NMPA批准帕博利珠单抗用于KRAS、NRAS和BRAF基因均为野生型的，转移性或不可切除高微卫星不稳定性或错配修复基因缺陷型（MSI-H/dMMR）结直肠癌患者的一线治疗。
NMPA批准帕博利珠单抗用于由国家药品监督管理局批准的检测评估为PD-L1肿痛比例分数(TPS)≥1%的表皮生长因子受体(EGFR)基因突变阴性和间变性淋巴瘤激酶(ALK)阴性的局部晚期或转移性非小细胞肺癌一线单药治疗。

FDA批准帕博利珠单抗用于：1.不能切除或转移性黑色素瘤的患者的治疗；2.完全切除的IIB、IIC或III期的成人或儿童（12岁及以上）黑色素瘤患者的辅助治疗。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗单药用于含铂化疗时或之后病情进展的复发性或转移性的头颈鳞状细胞癌（HNSCC）患者。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗可用于：1、单药治疗复发性或难治性经典型霍奇金淋巴瘤（cHL）成人患者；2、难治性cHL，或经二线及二线以上治疗后复发的霍奇金淋巴瘤（cHL）儿童患者。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗可用于经过2线及以上治疗后复发的难治性原发性纵隔大B细胞淋巴瘤（PMBCL）成人和儿童患者的治疗。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗用于具有以下情形的局部晚期或转移性尿路上皮癌患者：1.不适合含顺铂的化疗；2.在含铂化疗期间或之后，或在含铂化疗的新辅助或辅助治疗后12个月内病情进展。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗用于不适合或已选择不接受膀胱切除术，对卡介苗（BCG）治疗无反应、高风险、无肌肉浸润性膀胱癌（NMIBC）患者。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗用于前线接受过索拉非尼治疗的肝细胞癌（HCC）患者。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗用于复发的局部晚期或转移性默克尔细胞癌成人或儿童患者。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗用于肾切除术后或肾及转移灶切除术后复发风险为中高危或高危的肾细胞癌患者的辅助治疗。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗用于不能通过手术或放疗治愈的复发或转移性皮肤鳞状细胞癌（cSCC）患者的治疗。

FDA批准帕博利珠单抗单药用于包含以下情况的PD-L1表达阳性（TPS≥1%）且EGFR或ALK无变异的NSCLC患者的一线治疗：1）不适合手术切除或放化疗的III期疾病；2）转移性。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗单药用于PD-L1表达阳性（TPS≥1%）的铂类化疗期间或之后发生疾病进展的转移性NSCLC患者；其中携带EGFR或ALK基因变异的患者应在靶向其相应基因变异的治疗发生进展后再使用帕博利珠单抗。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗单药用于PD-L1表达阳性（CPS≥1）的转移性或无法手术的复发性的头颈部鳞状细胞癌患者的一线治疗。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗用于无法手术或放化疗的局部晚期或转移性食管癌或胃食管交界癌（肿瘤中心位于胃食管交界处上方1至5厘米）患者，包括：1）与基于铂类和氟尿嘧啶的化疗联用；2）单药用于PD-L1表达阳性（CPS≥10）的接受过一线及以上系统性治疗的鳞状细胞癌患者。

FDA批准帕博利珠单抗+化疗用于高危早期三阴性乳腺癌患者的新辅助治疗，术后单药作为辅助治疗。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗+化疗用于PD-L1表达阳性（CPS≥10）的不可切除的或转移性的三阴性乳腺癌患者。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗单药用于治疗MSI-H或dMMR的晚期子宫内膜癌患者，这些患者经既往任何系统治疗后疾病进展，且不适合进行治疗性手术或放疗。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗单药用于PD-L1表达阳性（CPS≥1）的化疗治疗期间或之后发生疾病进展的复发或转移性宫颈癌患者。
FDA批准帕博利珠单抗用于完全切除并经铂类化疗后的IB期（T2a≥4 cm）、II期或IIIA期非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC）患者的辅助治疗。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: PD-1配体PD-L1和PD-L2与T细胞上的PD-1受体的结合可抑制T细胞增殖和细胞因子的产生。 PD-1配体的上调发生在某些肿瘤中，通过该途径的信号传导可能有助于抑制肿瘤的主动T细胞免疫监视。 Pembrolizumab是与PD-1受体结合并阻断其与PD-L1和PD-L2相互作用的单克隆抗体，可释放PD-1途径介导的免疫应答抑制作用，包括抗肿瘤免疫应答。 在同系小鼠肿瘤模型中，阻断PD-1活性导致肿瘤生长减少。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A humanized monoclonal immunoglobulin (Ig) G4 antibody directed against human cell surface receptor PD-1 (programmed death-1 or programmed cell death-1) with potential immune checkpoint inhibitory and antineoplastic activities. Upon administration, pembrolizumab binds to PD-1, an inhibitory signaling receptor expressed on the surface of activated T cells, and blocks the binding to and activation of PD-1 by its ligands, which results in the activation of T-cell-mediated immune responses against tumor cells. The ligands for PD-1 include programmed cell death ligand 1 (PD-L1), overexpressed on certain cancer cells, and programmed cell death ligand 2 (PD-L2), which is primarily expressed on APCs. Activated PD-1 negatively regulates T-cell activation and plays a key role in in tumor evasion from host immunity.

A small molecule inhibitor of the tyrosine kinase WEE1 with potential antineoplastic sensitizing activity. Adavosertib selectively targets and inhibits WEE1, a tyrosine kinase that phosphorylates cyclin-dependent kinase 1 (CDK1, CDC2) to inactivate the CDC2/cyclin B complex. Inhibition of WEE1 activity prevents the phosphorylation of CDC2 and impairs the G2 DNA damage checkpoint. This may lead to apoptosis upon treatment with DNA damaging chemotherapeutic agents. Unlike normal cells, most p53 deficient or mutated human cancers lack the G1 checkpoint as p53 is the key regulator of the G1 checkpoint and these cells rely on the G2 checkpoint for DNA repair to damaged cells. Annulment of the G2 checkpoint may therefore make p53 deficient tumor cells more vulnerable to antineoplastic agents and enhance their cytotoxic effect.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 卡铂的主要作用是将烷基连接到核苷酸上，导致单加合物的形成，以及当修复酶试图纠正错误时 DNA 片段化。 2% 的卡铂活性来自 DNA 从一条链上的碱基到另一条上碱基的交联，从而防止 DNA 链分离以进行合成或转录。卡铂可以诱导许多不同的突变。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: Carboplatin is an organoplatinum antineoplastic alkylating agent used in the treatment of advanced ovarian carcinoma.Early clinical studies of carboplatin were performed in 1982. Carboplatin was developed as an analog of cisplatin with reduced nephrotoxicity and vomiting.Carboplatin was granted FDA approval on 3 March 1989.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 紫杉醇是一种抗微管类的化疗药物。 紫杉醇常用于多种癌症治疗中，它是一种有丝分裂抑制剂，是于 1971 年从太平洋紫杉树的树皮中首次分离出来，并于1993年批准用于医学用途，并被列于世界卫生组织的基本药物清单。 紫杉醇的作用机理主要是去影响微管的正常功能，透过稳定与GDP结合的微管蛋白，从而致使快速分裂的肿瘤细胞在有丝分裂阶段被限制而无法分离，将细胞阻断于细胞周期之G2与M期间，使癌细胞复制受阻断而死亡。因此紫杉醇在抗癌药物当中，被视为有丝分裂中的微管抑制剂。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: Paclitaxel is a chemotherapeutic agent marketed under the brand name Taxol among others. Used as a treatment for various cancers, paclitaxel is a mitotic inhibitor that was first isolated in 1971 from the bark of the Pacific yew tree which contains endophytic fungi that synthesize paclitaxel. It is available as an intravenous solution for injection and the newer formulation contains albumin-bound paclitaxel marketed under the brand name Abraxane.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准奥拉帕利与阿比特龙和泼尼松（或泼尼松龙）联合用于有害或疑似有害BRCA突变（BRCAm）转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）成人患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Olaparib（Lynparza）是聚（ADP-核糖）聚合酶（PARP）酶的抑制剂，包括PARP1，PARP2和PARP3。 PARP酶参与正常的细胞功能，例如DNA转录和DNA修复。 已经证明Olaparib在体外抑制人类肿瘤小鼠异种移植模型中特定肿瘤细胞系的生长，无论是单一疗法还是铂类化学疗法。 在细胞株和小鼠肿瘤模型中发现，用olaparib治疗后细胞毒性和抗肿瘤活性增加，而BRCA和非BRCA蛋白的缺陷与DNA损伤的同源重组修复（HRR）有关，并与铂反应相关。 体外研究表明，Olaparib诱导的细胞毒性可能涉及抑制PARP酶活性和增加PARP-DNA复合物的形成，从而导致细胞稳态的破坏和细胞死亡。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A small molecule inhibitor of the nuclear enzyme poly(ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) with potential chemosensitizing, radiosensitizing, and antineoplastic activities. Olaparib selectively binds to and inhibits PARP, inhibiting PARP-mediated repair of single strand DNA breaks; PARP inhibition may enhance the cytotoxicity of DNA-damaging agents and may reverse tumor cell chemoresistance and radioresistance. PARP catalyzes post-translational ADP-ribosylation of nuclear proteins and can be activated by single-stranded DNA breaks.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 阿比特龙是一种具有抗雄激素活性的口服醋酸酯甾体化合物，阿比特龙抑制类固醇17a-单加氧酶的酶活性，它是细胞色素p450家族的一员，催化参与睾酮合成的类固醇中间体的17a-羟基化。这种药剂可能会抑制睾丸和肾上腺产生睾酮，从而达到阉割范围水平。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally active acetate ester form of the steroidal compound abiraterone with antiandrogen activity. Abiraterone inhibits the enzymatic activity of steroid 17alpha-monooxygenase (17alpha-hydrolase/C17,20 lyase complex), a member of the cytochrome p450 family that catalyzes the 17alpha-hydroxylation of steroid intermediates involved in testosterone synthesis. Administration of this agent may suppress testosterone production by both the testes and the adrenals to castrate-range levels.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 泼尼松是一种具有抗炎和免疫调节作用的合成糖皮质激素。在细胞表面受体附着进入细胞后，泼尼松进入核内，与特定的核受体结合并激活，导致基因表达改变和抑制促炎性细胞因子的产生。该药物还能减少循环淋巴细胞的数量，诱导细胞分化，并刺激敏感肿瘤细胞群的凋亡。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A synthetic glucocorticoid with anti-inflammatory and immunomodulating properties.  After cell surface receptor attachment and cell entry, prednisone enters the nucleus where it binds to and activates specific nuclear receptors, resulting in an altered gene expression and inhibition of proinflammatory cytokine production.  This agent also decreases the number of circulating lymphocytes, induces cell differentiation, and stimulates apoptosis in sensitive tumor cell populations.

therapeutic_regimen.regimen_cn: 奥拉帕利+醋酸阿比特龙+泼尼松

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准奥拉帕利与阿比特龙和泼尼松（或泼尼松龙）联合用于有害或疑似有害BRCA突变（BRCAm）转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）成人患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Olaparib（Lynparza）是聚（ADP-核糖）聚合酶（PARP）酶的抑制剂，包括PARP1，PARP2和PARP3。 PARP酶参与正常的细胞功能，例如DNA转录和DNA修复。 已经证明Olaparib在体外抑制人类肿瘤小鼠异种移植模型中特定肿瘤细胞系的生长，无论是单一疗法还是铂类化学疗法。 在细胞株和小鼠肿瘤模型中发现，用olaparib治疗后细胞毒性和抗肿瘤活性增加，而BRCA和非BRCA蛋白的缺陷与DNA损伤的同源重组修复（HRR）有关，并与铂反应相关。 体外研究表明，Olaparib诱导的细胞毒性可能涉及抑制PARP酶活性和增加PARP-DNA复合物的形成，从而导致细胞稳态的破坏和细胞死亡。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A small molecule inhibitor of the nuclear enzyme poly(ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) with potential chemosensitizing, radiosensitizing, and antineoplastic activities. Olaparib selectively binds to and inhibits PARP, inhibiting PARP-mediated repair of single strand DNA breaks; PARP inhibition may enhance the cytotoxicity of DNA-damaging agents and may reverse tumor cell chemoresistance and radioresistance. PARP catalyzes post-translational ADP-ribosylation of nuclear proteins and can be activated by single-stranded DNA breaks.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 阿比特龙是一种具有抗雄激素活性的口服醋酸酯甾体化合物，阿比特龙抑制类固醇17a-单加氧酶的酶活性，它是细胞色素p450家族的一员，催化参与睾酮合成的类固醇中间体的17a-羟基化。这种药剂可能会抑制睾丸和肾上腺产生睾酮，从而达到阉割范围水平。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally active acetate ester form of the steroidal compound abiraterone with antiandrogen activity. Abiraterone inhibits the enzymatic activity of steroid 17alpha-monooxygenase (17alpha-hydrolase/C17,20 lyase complex), a member of the cytochrome p450 family that catalyzes the 17alpha-hydroxylation of steroid intermediates involved in testosterone synthesis. Administration of this agent may suppress testosterone production by both the testes and the adrenals to castrate-range levels.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 泼尼松龙是一种具有抗炎和免疫调节特性的合成糖皮质激素。在细胞表面受体附着并进入细胞后，泼尼松龙进入细胞核，与特定的核受体结合并激活，导致基因表达改变，并抑制促炎细胞因子的产生。这种药剂还减少循环淋巴细胞的数量，诱导细胞分化，并刺激敏感肿瘤细胞群的凋亡。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A synthetic glucocorticoid with anti-inflammatory and immunomodulating properties.  After cell surface receptor attachment and cell entry, prednisolone enters the nucleus where it binds to and activates specific nuclear receptors, resulting in an altered gene expression and inhibition of proinflammatory cytokine production.  This agent also decreases the number of circulating lymphocytes, induces cell differentiation, and stimulates apoptosis in sensitive tumor cells populations. (NCI04)

therapeutic_regimen.regimen_cn: 奥拉帕利+醋酸阿比特龙+泼尼松龙

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: NXP800是一种口服生物可以利用的HSF1通路抑制剂。口服后，NXP800可靶向并抑制HSF1调节通路的活性，阻止HSF1介导的转录，可抑制肿瘤细胞的增殖、迁移、存活和转移，特别是存在ARID1A突变的肿瘤细胞。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable fluorobisamide and heat shock factor 1 (HSF1) pathway inhibitor, with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon oral administration, HSF1 pathway inhibitor NXP800 targets and inhibits the activity of the HSF1-regulated pathway, thereby preventing HSF1-mediated transcription. This inhibits proliferation, migration, survival, and metastasis in susceptible tumor cells, especially in AT-rich interaction domain 1A (ARID1A)-mutated cancer cells. HSF1, a stress-inducible transcription factor that plays a key role in the transcriptional activation of the eukaryotic heat shock response; its activation leads to expression of many heat shock proteins (HSPs). Overexpressed, amplified and/or overactivated in many cancer cells, HSF1 activates a set of genes that play a key role in tumor initiation, progression and metastasis.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 卡铂的主要作用是将烷基连接到核苷酸上，导致单加合物的形成，以及当修复酶试图纠正错误时 DNA 片段化。 2% 的卡铂活性来自 DNA 从一条链上的碱基到另一条上碱基的交联，从而防止 DNA 链分离以进行合成或转录。卡铂可以诱导许多不同的突变。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: Carboplatin is an organoplatinum antineoplastic alkylating agent used in the treatment of advanced ovarian carcinoma.Early clinical studies of carboplatin were performed in 1982. Carboplatin was developed as an analog of cisplatin with reduced nephrotoxicity and vomiting.Carboplatin was granted FDA approval on 3 March 1989.

A small molecule inhibitor of the tyrosine kinase WEE1 with potential antineoplastic sensitizing activity. Adavosertib selectively targets and inhibits WEE1, a tyrosine kinase that phosphorylates cyclin-dependent kinase 1 (CDK1, CDC2) to inactivate the CDC2/cyclin B complex. Inhibition of WEE1 activity prevents the phosphorylation of CDC2 and impairs the G2 DNA damage checkpoint. This may lead to apoptosis upon treatment with DNA damaging chemotherapeutic agents. Unlike normal cells, most p53 deficient or mutated human cancers lack the G1 checkpoint as p53 is the key regulator of the G1 checkpoint and these cells rely on the G2 checkpoint for DNA repair to damaged cells. Annulment of the G2 checkpoint may therefore make p53 deficient tumor cells more vulnerable to antineoplastic agents and enhance their cytotoxic effect.

A small molecule inhibitor of class I phosphatidylinositol 3 kinase (PI3K), with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon administration, pictilisib selectively binds to PI3K in an ATP-competitive manner, inhibiting the production of the secondary messenger phosphatidylinositol-3,4,5-trisphosphate (PIP3) and activation of the PI3K/Akt signaling pathway. This may result in inhibition of tumor cell growth, motility and survival in susceptible tumor cell populations. Activation of the PI3K/Akt signaling pathway is frequently associated with tumorigenesis; dysregulated PI3K/Akt signaling may contribute to tumor resistance to a variety of antineoplastic agents.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Olaparib（Lynparza）是聚（ADP-核糖）聚合酶（PARP）酶的抑制剂，包括PARP1，PARP2和PARP3。 PARP酶参与正常的细胞功能，例如DNA转录和DNA修复。 已经证明Olaparib在体外抑制人类肿瘤小鼠异种移植模型中特定肿瘤细胞系的生长，无论是单一疗法还是铂类化学疗法。 在细胞株和小鼠肿瘤模型中发现，用olaparib治疗后细胞毒性和抗肿瘤活性增加，而BRCA和非BRCA蛋白的缺陷与DNA损伤的同源重组修复（HRR）有关，并与铂反应相关。 体外研究表明，Olaparib诱导的细胞毒性可能涉及抑制PARP酶活性和增加PARP-DNA复合物的形成，从而导致细胞稳态的破坏和细胞死亡。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A small molecule inhibitor of the nuclear enzyme poly(ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) with potential chemosensitizing, radiosensitizing, and antineoplastic activities. Olaparib selectively binds to and inhibits PARP, inhibiting PARP-mediated repair of single strand DNA breaks; PARP inhibition may enhance the cytotoxicity of DNA-damaging agents and may reverse tumor cell chemoresistance and radioresistance. PARP catalyzes post-translational ADP-ribosylation of nuclear proteins and can be activated by single-stranded DNA breaks.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准他拉唑帕利用于携带BRCA胚系有害或疑似有害突变（gBRCAm）的HER2阴性的局部晚期或转移性乳腺癌成人患者的治疗。
adaptation_disease_en: FDA approved Talazoparib for the treatment of adult patients with deleterious or suspected deleterious germline BRCA-mutated (gBRCAm) HER2-negative locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 他拉唑帕利是一种聚腺苷二磷酸核糖聚合酶（PARP，包括PARP1和PARP2）抑制剂，该酶在 DNA 修复中发挥作用。携带DNA修复基因（包括BRCA1和BRCA2）缺陷的癌细胞系的体外试验显示，他拉唑帕利诱导的细胞毒性可能涉及抑制PARP酶活性和增加PARP-DNA复合物的形成，从而导致DNA损伤、细胞增殖减少和细胞凋亡。他拉唑帕利在携带突变型BRCA1和BRCA2或野生型BRCA1和BRCA2的患者来源的乳腺癌异种移植瘤模型中可见抗肿瘤活性。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable inhibitor of the nuclear enzyme poly(ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) with potential antineoplastic activity. Talazoparib selectively binds to PARP and prevents PARP-mediated DNA repair of single strand DNA breaks via the base-excision repair pathway. This enhances the accumulation of DNA strand breaks, promotes genomic instability and eventually leads to apoptosis. PARP catalyzes post-translational ADP-ribosylation of nuclear proteins that signal and recruit other proteins to repair damaged DNA and is activated by single-strand DNA breaks.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准贝伐珠单抗联合阿替利珠单抗用于疗既往未接受全身治疗的不可切除或转移性HCC患者。
NMPA批准贝伐珠单抗联合阿替利珠单抗治疗既往未接受过全身系统性治疗的不可切除肝细胞癌患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 贝伐珠单抗结合VEGF并阻止VEGF与其在内皮细胞表面的受体（Flt-1和KDR）相互作用。 在血管生成的体外模型中，VEGF与其受体的相互作用导致内皮细胞增殖和新血管形成。 在裸鼠结肠癌异种移植模型中应用贝伐珠单抗可降低微血管生长和抑制转移性疾病的进展。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A recombinant humanized monoclonal antibody directed against the vascular endothelial growth factor (VEGF), a pro-angiogenic cytokine.  Bevacizumab binds to VEGF and inhibits VEGF receptor binding, thereby preventing the growth and maintenance of tumor blood vessels.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn:
PD-L1可以在肿瘤细胞和/或肿瘤浸润性免疫细胞上表达，并且可以在肿瘤微环境中有助于抑制抗肿瘤免疫反应。PD-L1与T细胞和抗原呈递细胞上的PD-1和B7.1受体结合，抑制细胞毒性T细胞活性、T细胞增殖和细胞因子的产生。
Atezolizumab是与PD-L1结合并阻断其与PD-1和B7.1受体相互作用的单克隆抗体。这释放了PD-L1 / PD-1介导的免疫反应抑制作用，包括抗肿瘤免疫反应的激活，而不会引起抗体依赖性细胞毒性。在同系小鼠肿瘤模型中，阻断PD-L1活性可导致肿瘤生长减少。
在癌症的小鼠模型中，与单独的靶向治疗相比，PD-1 / PD-L1和MAPK途径的双重抑制可通过增加抗原呈递，T细胞浸润和激活来抑制肿瘤生长并提高肿瘤免疫原性。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A humanized, Fc optimized, monoclonal antibody directed against the protein ligand PD-L1 (programmed cell death-1 ligand 1), with potential immune checkpoint inhibitory and antineoplastic activities. Atezolizumab binds to PD-L1, blocking its binding to and activation of its receptor programmed death 1 (PD-1) expressed on activated T-cells, which may enhance the T-cell-mediated immune response to neoplasms and reverse T-cell inactivation. In addition, by binding to PD-L1, MPDL3280A also prevents binding of this ligand to B7.1 expressed on activated T cells, which further enhances the T-cell-mediated immune response. PD-L1 is overexpressed on many human cancer cell types and on various tumor-infiltrating immune cells. PD-L1 binding to PD-1 on T-cells suppresses the immune system and results in increased immune evasion. PD-1, a transmembrane protein, is a negative regulator of the immune system that limits the expansion and survival of CD8+ T cells. The Fc region of MPDL3280A is modified in such a way that it does not induce either antibody-dependent cytotoxicity (ADCC) or complement-dependent cytotoxicity (CDC).

therapeutic_regimen.regimen_cn: 贝伐珠单抗+阿替利珠单抗

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准他拉唑帕利联合恩扎卢胺治疗同源重组修复(HRR)基因突变的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌(mCRPC)成人患者。
NMPA批准他拉唑帕利联合恩扎卢胺治疗同源重组修复(HRR)基因突变的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌(mCRPC)成人患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 他拉唑帕利是一种聚腺苷二磷酸核糖聚合酶（PARP，包括PARP1和PARP2）抑制剂，该酶在 DNA 修复中发挥作用。携带DNA修复基因（包括BRCA1和BRCA2）缺陷的癌细胞系的体外试验显示，他拉唑帕利诱导的细胞毒性可能涉及抑制PARP酶活性和增加PARP-DNA复合物的形成，从而导致DNA损伤、细胞增殖减少和细胞凋亡。他拉唑帕利在携带突变型BRCA1和BRCA2或野生型BRCA1和BRCA2的患者来源的乳腺癌异种移植瘤模型中可见抗肿瘤活性。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable inhibitor of the nuclear enzyme poly(ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) with potential antineoplastic activity. Talazoparib selectively binds to PARP and prevents PARP-mediated DNA repair of single strand DNA breaks via the base-excision repair pathway. This enhances the accumulation of DNA strand breaks, promotes genomic instability and eventually leads to apoptosis. PARP catalyzes post-translational ADP-ribosylation of nuclear proteins that signal and recruit other proteins to repair damaged DNA and is activated by single-strand DNA breaks.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Enzalutamide是一种雄激素受体抑制剂，可在雄激素受体信号传导途径的不同步骤上起作用。 恩杂鲁胺已被证明具有竞争性抑制雄激素与雄激素受体结合的能力。 因此，抑制雄激素受体的核易位及其与DNA的相互作用。 主要代谢物N-去甲基enzalutamide具有与enzalutamide相似的体外活性。 在小鼠前列腺癌异种移植模型中，Enzalutamide降低了体外前列腺癌细胞的增殖并诱导了细胞死亡，并降低了小鼠前列腺癌异种移植模型的肿瘤体积。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable, organic, non-steroidal small molecule targeting the androgen receptor (AR) with potential antineoplastic activity. Through a mechanism that is reported to be different from other approved AR antagonists, enzalutamide inhibits the activity of prostate cancer cell ARs, which may result in a reduction in prostate cancer cell proliferation and, correspondingly, a reduction in the serum prostate specific antigen (PSA) level. AR over-expression in prostate cancer represents a key mechanism associated with prostate cancer hormone resistance.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准达沙替尼(dasatinib)用于治疗新确诊的费城染色体阳性（Ph+）慢性粒细胞白血病（CML）成年患者。

FDA批准达沙替尼(dasatinib)联合化疗用于治疗1岁及以上新确诊为费城染色体阳性（Ph+）的急性淋巴细胞白血病（ALL）的儿科患者。
FDA批准达沙替尼(dasatinib)用于治疗对其他疗法无效或不能耐受的费城染色体阳性（Ph+）的急性淋巴细胞白血病（ALL）成年患者。

FDA批准达沙替尼(dasatinib)用于治疗1岁及以上慢性期费城染色体阳性（Ph+）慢性粒细胞白血病（CML）的儿科患者。
FDA批准达沙替尼(dasatinib)用于治疗对伊马替尼等一线药物化疗不敏感的各期费城染色体阳性（Ph+）慢性粒细胞白血病（CML）成年患者。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 根据建模研究，预测达沙替尼可与ABL激酶的多种构象结合。 在甲磺酸伊马替尼敏感和耐药型的白血病细胞系中，达沙替尼均表现出体外活性。 达沙替尼可抑制过表达BCR-ABL的慢性粒细胞白血病（CML）和急性淋巴细胞白血病（ALL）细胞的生长。 达沙替尼可克服因BCR-ABL激酶结构域突变、SRC家族激酶（LYN，HCK）的旁信号通路的激活以及多药耐药基因过表达而引起的伊马替尼耐药性。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable synthetic small molecule-inhibitor of SRC-family protein-tyrosine kinases.  Dasatinib binds to and inhibits the growth-promoting activities of these kinases. Apparently because of its less stringent binding affinity for the BCR-ABL kinase, dasatinib has been shown to overcome the resistance to imatinib of chronic myeloid leukemia (CML) cells harboring BCR-ABL kinase domain point mutations. SRC-family protein-tyrosine kinases interact with a variety of cell-surface receptors and participate in intracellular signal transduction pathways; tumorigenic forms can occur through altered regulation or expression of the endogenous protein and by way of virally-encoded kinase genes.

adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准尼拉帕利用于经3线及以上化疗的、HRD阳性（携带BRCA基因的致病或疑似致病性突变或基因组存在不稳定性并在对最后一次铂类化疗反应后6个月以上出现疾病进展）的晚期卵巢癌、输卵管癌及原发性腹膜癌成人患者的治疗。
FDA批准尼拉帕利用于经含铂化疗后达到完全缓解或部分缓解的复发性上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者的维持治疗。
FDA批准尼拉帕利用于一线含铂化疗后达到完全缓解或部分缓解的晚期上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者的维持治疗。

NMPA批准尼拉帕利用于晚期上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者对一线含铂化疗达到完全缓解或部分缓解后的维持治疗。
NMPA批准尼拉帕利用于铂敏感的复发性上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者在含铂化疗达到完全缓解或部分缓解后的维持治疗。
FDA批准尼拉帕利用于经含铂化疗后达到完全缓解或部分缓解的、携带有害或疑似有害胚系BRCA突变的复发性上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌的成年患者的维持治疗。
adaptation_disease_en:
FDA approved Niraparib for the treatment of adult patients with advanced ovarian, fallopian tube or primary peritoneal cancer who have been treated with 3 or more prior chemotherapy regimens and whose cancer is associated with homologous recombination deficiency (HRD) positive status defined by either:
1）a deleterious or suspected deleterious BRCA mutation, or
2）genomic instability and who have progressed more than 6 months after response to the last platinum-based chemotherapy.

FDA approved Niraparib for the maintenance treatment of adult patients with recurrent epithelial 
ovarian, fallopian tube, or primary peritoneal cancer who are in a complete or partial response to 
platinum-based chemotherapy.

FDA approved Niraparib for the maintenance treatment of adult patients with advanced epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube, or primary peritoneal cancer who are in a complete or partial response to first-line platinum-based chemotherapy.
approval_tumour: 卵巢/输卵管癌;Ovarian/Fallopian Tube Cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Niraparib（尼拉帕利）是聚（ADP-核糖）聚合酶（PARP）酶PARP-1和PARP-2的抑制剂，它们在DNA修复中起作用。 体外研究表明，Niraparib诱导的细胞毒性可能涉及抑制PARP酶活性和增加PARP-DNA复合物的形成，从而导致DNA损伤，细胞凋亡和细胞死亡。 在具有或不具有BRCA1 / 2缺陷的肿瘤细胞系中观察到了Niraparib诱导的细胞毒性增加。 在具有BRCA1 / 2缺陷的人类癌细胞系的小鼠异种移植模型中，以及在具有突变或野生型BRCA1 / 2的同源重组缺陷的人类患者源性异种移植肿瘤模型中，Niraparib降低了肿瘤的生长。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable inhibitor of poly (ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) types 1 and 2 (PARP-1 and -2), with antineoplastic activity. Upon administration, niraparib binds to and inhibits the activity of PARP-1 and -2, thereby inhibiting PARP-1 and -2-mediated DNA repair, enhancing the accumulation of DNA strand breaks, promoting genomic instability and resulting in apoptosis. The PARP family of proteins catalyzes post-translational ADP-ribosylation of nuclear proteins and is activated by single-strand DNA (ssDNA) breaks.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: Pazopanib（帕唑帕尼）是一种多酪氨酸激酶抑制剂，包括血管内皮生长因子受体（VEGFR）-1，VEGFR-2，VEGFR-3，血小板衍生生长因子受体（PDGFR）-α和-β，成纤维细胞生长因子受体（FGFR） -1和-3，细胞因子受体（Kit），白介素2受体诱导的T细胞激酶（Itk），淋巴细胞特异性蛋白酪氨酸激酶（Lck）和跨膜糖蛋白受体酪氨酸激酶（c-Fms）。 在体外，Pazopanib抑制配体诱导的VEGFR-2，Kit和PDGFR-β受体的自磷酸化。 在体内，Pazopanib抑制小鼠肺中VEGF诱导的VEGFR-2磷酸化，小鼠模型中的血管生成以及小鼠中某些人肿瘤异种移植物的生长。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A small molecule inhibitor of multiple protein tyrosine kinases with potential antineoplastic activity. Pazopanib selectively inhibits vascular endothelial growth factor receptors (VEGFR)-1, -2 and -3, c-kit and platelet derived growth factor receptor (PDGF-R), which may result in inhibition of angiogenesis in tumors in which these receptors are upregulated.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 伏立诺他可通过nM级别的浓度（IC50＜86nM）抑制I型组蛋白去乙酰酶IHDAC1/HDAC2/HDAC3和II型的HDAC6的酶活。这些酶能够去除包括组蛋白和转录因子等蛋白中赖氨酸残疾上的乙酰基团。在一些肿瘤中，过表达HDAC或招募至转录因子的HDAC水平异常可导致核小体组蛋白低乙酰化，组蛋白低乙酰化与染色质结构压缩和基因转录受抑制相关。抑制HDAC活性可使乙酰基团在组蛋白赖氨酸残基中积累以便有开放的染色质结构和正常的转录活性。在体外实验中，伏立诺地证实可导致一些转化细胞中的乙酰化的组蛋白积累并诱导细胞周期阻滞和/或凋亡。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A synthetic hydroxamic acid derivative with antineoplastic activity. Vorinostat, a second generation polar-planar compound, binds to the catalytic domain of the histone deacetylases (HDACs). This allows the hydroxamic moiety to chelate zinc ion located in the catalytic pockets of HDAC, thereby inhibiting deacetylation and leading to an accumulation of both hyperacetylated histones and transcription factors. Hyperacetylation of histone proteins results in the upregulation of the cyclin-dependant kinase p21, followed by G1 arrest. Hyperacetylation of non-histone proteins such as tumor suppressor p53, alpha tubulin, and heat-shock protein 90 produces additional anti-proliferative effects. This agent also induces apoptosis and sensitizes tumor cells to cell death processes. Vorinostat crosses the blood-brain barrier.

adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准氟唑帕利单药或联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼用于新辅助、辅助或转移阶段接受过化疗治疗的伴有胚系BRCA突变（gBRCAm）的人表皮生长因子受体（HER2）阴性转移性乳腺癌成年患者。激素受体（HR）阳性乳腺癌患者既往需接受过内分泌治疗或被认为不适合接受内分泌治疗。

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 氟唑帕利为小分子PARP抑制剂，可抑制BRCA1/2功能异常细胞中的DNA修复过程，诱导细胞周期阻滞，进而抑制肿瘤细胞增殖。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally available inhibitor of poly (ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) types 1 and 2, with potential antineoplastic activity. Upon oral administration, fluzoparib inhibits PARP 1 and 2 activity, which inhibits PARP-mediated repair of damaged DNA via the base excision repair (BER) pathway, enhances the accumulation of DNA strand breaks, promotes genomic instability, and leads to an induction of apoptosis. The PARP family of proteins catalyze post-translational ADP-ribosylation of nuclear proteins, which then transduce signals to recruit other proteins to repair damaged DNA. PARP inhibition may enhance the cytotoxicity of DNA-damaging agents and may reverse tumor cell chemoresistance and radioresistance.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 阿帕替尼为一种小分子血管内皮生长因子受体2(VEGFR2）酪氨酸激酶抑制剂，可抑制肿瘤血管生成。动物研究表明其可明显抑制多种小鼠肿瘤模型的肿瘤生长。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable, small-molecule receptor tyrosine kinase inhibitor with potential antiangiogenic and antineoplastic activities. Upon administration, rivoceranib selectively binds to and inhibits vascular endothelial growth factor receptor 2, which may inhibit VEGF-stimulated endothelial cell migration and proliferation and decrease tumor microvessel density. In addition, this agent mildly inhibits c-Kit and c-SRC tyrosine kinases.

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn:
Alpelisib是磷脂酰肌醇3-激酶（PI3K）的抑制剂，主要具有针对PI3Kα的抑制活性。在体外和体内模型中，编码PI3K的催化性α-亚基（PIK3CA）的基因中的功能获得性突变导致PI3Kα的激活和Akt信号转导，细胞转化以及肿瘤的产生。
在乳腺癌细胞系中，alpelisib抑制PI3K下游靶标（包括Akt）的磷酸化，并在具有PIK3CA突变的细胞系中显示活性。在体内，alpelisib在异种移植模型（包括乳腺癌模型）中抑制PI3K / Akt信号传导途径并减少肿瘤生长。
通过alpelisib治疗抑制PI3K已显示可诱导乳腺癌细胞中雌激素受体（ER）转录增加。与单独的两种治疗方法相比，alpelisib和fulvestrant的组合具有增强的抗肿瘤活性，而这两种方法均来自ER阳性，PIK3CA突变的乳腺癌细胞系。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable phosphatidylinositol 3-kinase (PI3K) inhibitor with potential antineoplastic activity. Alpelisib specifically inhibits PI3K in the PI3K/AKT kinase (or protein kinase B) signaling pathway, thereby inhibiting the activation of the PI3K signaling pathway. This may result in inhibition of tumor cell growth and survival in susceptible tumor cell populations. Activation of the PI3K signaling pathway is frequently associated with tumorigenesis. Dysregulated PI3K signaling may contribute to tumor resistance to a variety of antineoplastic agents.

adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准尼拉帕利阿比特龙片联合泼尼松或泼尼松龙用于携带胚系和/或体系 BRCA基因突变的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌成人患者（mCRPC）。
adaptation_disease_en: The NMPA has approved Niraparib and Abiraterone Acetate Tablets in combination with prednisone or prednisolone for adult patients with metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer (mCRPC) who harbor germline and/or somatic BRCA gene mutations.
approval_tumour: 转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌;metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 尼拉帕利阿比特龙片是尼拉帕利和醋酸阿比特龙的复方制剂。尼拉帕利是一种多聚ADP-核糖聚合酶（PARP）PARP-1和PARP-2的抑制剂。PARP在DNA修复中起作用。体外研究显示，尼拉帕利诱发的细胞毒性可能涉及抑制PARP酶活性和增加PARP-DNA复合物的形成，从而导致DNA损伤、细胞凋亡和细胞死亡。在具有或不具有BRCA1/2缺陷的肿瘤细胞株中均可见尼拉帕利诱发的细胞毒性增加。在BRCA1/2缺陷的人肿瘤细胞株的小鼠异种移植瘤模型和来源于患者的同源重组BRCA1/2缺陷（突变或野生型）的异种移植瘤模型中，尼拉帕利均延缓肿瘤生长。醋酸阿比特龙在体内转化成阿比特龙，阿比特龙是一种雄激素生物合成抑制剂，可抑制17α-羟化酶/C17,20-裂解酶（CYP17），后者在睾丸、肾上腺和前列腺肿瘤组织中表达并且是雄激素生物合成所必需的。雄激素敏感性前列腺癌可对雄激素水平降低治疗法产生应答。雄激素阻断疗法如GnRHa或睾丸切除术可降低睾丸中雄激素生成，但不能影响肾上腺或肿瘤中雄激素生成。在前列腺癌小鼠移植瘤模型中，与单药相比，尼拉帕利和醋酸阿比特龙联合用药可见抗肿瘤活性增强。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable fixed dose combination agent containing the acetate ester prodrug of the steroidal compound abiraterone, an inhibitor of the cytochrome p450 (CYP) family member 17 alpha-hydroxylase/C17,20-lyase (CYP17; CYP17A1), and the tosylate monohydrate salt form of niraparib, an inhibitor of poly (ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) types 1 and 2 (PARP-1 and -2), with anti-androgen and antineoplastic activities. Upon administration of abiraterone acetate/niraparib, abiraterone acetate is converted to its active form abiraterone, which, in turn, targets, binds to and inhibits the enzymatic activity of CYP17, thereby preventing the formation of steroid intermediates and androgens involved in androgen synthesis. This suppresses testosterone production by testes, adrenals and testosterone-dependent prostate tumor cells in order to decrease testosterone to castrate-range levels, which inhibits proliferation of testosterone-dependent cancer cells. In addition, niraparib binds to and inhibits the activity of PARP-1 and -2, thereby inhibiting PARP-1 and -2-mediated DNA repair, enhancing the accumulation of DNA strand breaks, and promoting genomic instability, which results in cancer cell apoptosis. PARP family proteins are often overexpressed in cancer cells and are activated by single-strand DNA (ssDNA) breaks to catalyze post-translational ADP-ribosylation of nuclear proteins, which promotes DNA repair and cancer cell survival.
drug_details.drug_name: 尼拉帕利阿比特龙片;Abiraterone Acetate/Niraparib

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 泼尼松龙是一种具有抗炎和免疫调节特性的合成糖皮质激素。在细胞表面受体附着并进入细胞后，泼尼松龙进入细胞核，与特定的核受体结合并激活，导致基因表达改变，并抑制促炎细胞因子的产生。这种药剂还减少循环淋巴细胞的数量，诱导细胞分化，并刺激敏感肿瘤细胞群的凋亡。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A synthetic glucocorticoid with anti-inflammatory and immunomodulating properties.  After cell surface receptor attachment and cell entry, prednisolone enters the nucleus where it binds to and activates specific nuclear receptors, resulting in an altered gene expression and inhibition of proinflammatory cytokine production.  This agent also decreases the number of circulating lymphocytes, induces cell differentiation, and stimulates apoptosis in sensitive tumor cells populations. (NCI04)

therapeutic_regimen.regimen_cn: 尼拉帕利阿比特龙片+泼尼松龙

adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准尼拉帕利阿比特龙片联合泼尼松或泼尼松龙用于携带胚系和/或体系 BRCA基因突变的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌成人患者（mCRPC）。
FDA批准AKEEGA（尼拉帕利和醋酸阿比特龙）双重作用片剂联合泼尼松用于治疗携带有害或疑似有害BRCA突变（BRCAm）转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）的成年患者。
adaptation_disease_en: The NMPA has approved Niraparib and Abiraterone Acetate Tablets in combination with prednisone or prednisolone for adult patients with metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer (mCRPC) who harbor germline and/or somatic BRCA gene mutations.
approval_tumour: 转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌;metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer

drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: An orally bioavailable fixed dose combination agent containing the acetate ester prodrug of the steroidal compound abiraterone, an inhibitor of the cytochrome p450 (CYP) family member 17 alpha-hydroxylase/C17,20-lyase (CYP17; CYP17A1), and the tosylate monohydrate salt form of niraparib, an inhibitor of poly (ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) types 1 and 2 (PARP-1 and -2), with anti-androgen and antineoplastic activities. Upon administration of abiraterone acetate/niraparib, abiraterone acetate is converted to its active form abiraterone, which, in turn, targets, binds to and inhibits the enzymatic activity of CYP17, thereby preventing the formation of steroid intermediates and androgens involved in androgen synthesis. This suppresses testosterone production by testes, adrenals and testosterone-dependent prostate tumor cells in order to decrease testosterone to castrate-range levels, which inhibits proliferation of testosterone-dependent cancer cells. In addition, niraparib binds to and inhibits the activity of PARP-1 and -2, thereby inhibiting PARP-1 and -2-mediated DNA repair, enhancing the accumulation of DNA strand breaks, and promoting genomic instability, which results in cancer cell apoptosis. drug_details.drug_name: 尼拉帕利阿比特龙片;Abiraterone Acetate/Niraparib

drug_details.drug_mechanism_cn: 泼尼松是一种具有抗炎和免疫调节作用的合成糖皮质激素。在细胞表面受体附着进入细胞后，泼尼松进入核内，与特定的核受体结合并激活，导致基因表达改变和抑制促炎性细胞因子的产生。该药物还能减少循环淋巴细胞的数量，诱导细胞分化，并刺激敏感肿瘤细胞群的凋亡。
drug_details.drug_mechanism_en: A synthetic glucocorticoid with anti-inflammatory and immunomodulating properties.  After cell surface receptor attachment and cell entry, prednisone enters the nucleus where it binds to and activates specific nuclear receptors, resulting in an altered gene expression and inhibition of proinflammatory cytokine production.  This agent also decreases the number of circulating lymphocytes, induces cell differentiation, and stimulates apoptosis in sensitive tumor cell populations.

therapeutic_regimen.regimen_cn: 尼拉帕利阿比特龙片+泼尼松

p_var.variant_desc_cn: 微卫星（Microsatellite）又称简单重复序列（SSR），是指遍布于人类基因组中的短串联重复序列，一般由1-6个核苷酸组成。DNA复制时，肿瘤细胞内的微卫星由于重复单位的插入或缺失而造成的微卫星长度的变化，称为微卫星不稳定性（Microsatellite Instability, MSI）。大量研究表明，MSI是由错配修复（mismatch repair，MMR）基因突变或功能缺陷引起的（PMID: 25701956）。MSI在多种癌种中被发现，包括子宫内膜癌、结直肠癌和胃腺癌等。据报道，10%-15%的散发性结直肠癌患者存在MSI（PMID: 15528785），NCCN指南明确推荐所有结直肠癌患者均需考虑做MSI或MMR检测。临床上也已将MSI作为结直肠癌及其他实体瘤预后和制定辅助治疗方案的重要分子标志物。
p_var.variant_desc_en: Microsatellite, also known as simple repeat sequence (SSR), refers to the short tandem repeat sequences throughout the human genome, generally composed of 1-6 nucleotides. During DNA replication, Microsatellite Instability (MSI) is defined as the change in microsatellite length caused by the insertion or deletion of repeat units in tumor cells. Numerous studies have shown that MSI is caused by mismatch repair (MMR) gene mutations or functional defects (PMID: 25701956). MSI has been found in a variety of cancers, including endometrial cancer, colorectal cancer, and gastric adenocarcinoma. MSI has been reported in 10%-15% of sporadic colorectal cancer patients (PMID: 15528785), and the NCCN guidelines clearly recommend that all patients with colorectal cancer should be considered for MSI or MMR testing. MSI has also been regarded as an important molecular marker for the prognosis and adjuvant treatment of colorectal cancer and other solid tumors.

p_var.variant_desc_cn: TMB-H，具体内容待修改

evi_sum.regimen_name: 纳武利尤单抗+伊匹木单抗
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 胰腺腺癌NCCN指南（2023.v2）推荐Nivolumab+ipilimumab用于TMB-H（≥10 mut/Mb）的局部晚期/转移性胰腺腺癌患者的后续治疗以及疾病复发后的治疗。

evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: FDA已批准帕博利珠单抗（pembrolizumab）单药用于不可切除或转移性的高肿瘤突变负荷(TMB-H)[≥10mut/Mb]的成人和儿童实体瘤，这些患者经既往治疗后进展，且没有令人满意的替代治疗方案。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项多中心、非随机、开放标签试验中(KEYNOTE-158; NCT02628067)，对10个队列中具有高肿瘤突变负担(TMB-H)的实体瘤患者进行前瞻性计划的回顾性分析，以研究帕博利珠单抗在TMB-H实体瘤患者中的疗效。患者每3周静脉注射200 mg帕博利珠单抗，主要疗效指标为BIRC根据 RECIST v1.1评估的ORR和DoR。790例可评估的患者中，102例（13％）是TMB-H（TMB≥10mut/Mb）患者。研究结果显示，中位随访时间11.1个月，客观缓解率(ORR）达29%，中位缓解时间未达到，缓解持续时间≥12个月的患者占 57％，缓解持续时间≥24个月的患者占 50％。基于以上研究，FDA批准帕博利珠单抗（pembrolizumab）单药用于不可切除或转移性的高肿瘤突变负荷(TMB-H)[≥10mut/Mb]的成人和儿童实体瘤（既往治疗后疾病进展且没有更佳替代疗法）。

evi_sum.regimen_name: 贝伐珠单抗+阿替利珠单抗
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项多中心、单臂、开放标签、II期非随机对照试验（NCT03836066, PMID: 36520426），纳入18岁或以上IIIB-IV期非鳞NSCLC患者，高TMB（TMB≥10mut/Mb）且无EGFR、ALK、STK11、MDM2或ROS1变异，旨在评估阿替利珠单抗联合贝伐珠单抗治疗高TMB晚期非鳞NSCLC的疗效和安全性。参与者在每个21天周期的第1天给予阿替利珠单抗（1200 mg）联合贝伐单抗（15 mg/kg）治疗，直至出现疾病进展或不可耐受毒性或死亡等。主要疗效终点为12个月无进展生存(PFS)率。研究结果显示，在38例可评估患者中，12个月的PFS率为51.3%，12个月OS率为72.0%。中位PFS为13.0个月，中位OS未达到。16例（42.1%）达到客观缓解，30例（78.9%）达到疾病控制。中位缓解时间为2.8个月，中位缓解持续时间为11.7个月。安全性方面，不良事件多为1级或2级。PD-L1水平与反应、PFS或OS无关。研究结论：阿替利珠单抗联合贝伐珠单抗是治疗高TMB非鳞NSCLC的一种潜在疗法。

p_var.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.6148(3079/5008), 0.5443(57055/104820), 0.4949(717835/1450556), 0.5545(84301/152042), 0.4878(59721/122432) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 11 times of amino acid change at the TNFRSF14 protein position 17, of which the mutant K17R is recorded 8 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
p_var.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第17位氨基酸由赖氨酸突变为精氨酸。
p_var.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 17th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Lysine to Arginine.

p_var.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.2454（1229/5008）、0.3037（36864/121396）、0.3227（471698/1461758）、0.2752（41850/152088）、0.3915（48018/122651）；COSMIC数据库记录37次MTHFR蛋白第222位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型V记录35次。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为disease-causing，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
p_var.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.2454(1229/5008), 0.3037(36864/121396), 0.3227(471698/1461758), 0.2752(41850/152088), 0.3915(48018/122651) in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, respectively; the COSMIC database records 40 times of amino acid change at the MTHFR protein position 222, of which the mutant A222V is recorded 38 times. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered disease-causing, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
p_var.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第222位氨基酸由丙氨酸突变为缬氨酸。
p_var.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 222nd amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Alanine to Valine.

p_var.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.00004599（7/152202）、0.0006687（82/122630），ExAC、gnomADe数据库EAS人群等位基因频率分别为0.00104（9/8650）、0.0008068（32/39664），1000G数据库无记录；OncoKB数据库报道为Unknown，Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
p_var.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.00004599(7/152202), 0.0006687(82/122630) in the gnomADg, iJGVD databases, 0.00104(9/8650), 0.0008068(32/39664) in the EAS population of the ExAC, gnomADe databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G database; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.
p_var.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第2599位氨基酸由丝氨酸突变为亮氨酸。
p_var.variant_desc_en: This variant is a missense mutation, which changes the 2599th amino acid of the gene-encoded protein from Serine to Leucine.

p_var.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异为发生在功能未知重复区域的框内缺失突变。该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.00003170（46/1451314）、0.00004604（7/152030）、0.000008162（1/122516），ExAC数据库OTH人群等位基因频率为0.0123（11/894），1000G数据库无记录；CKB数据库报道为unknown，OncoKB数据库报道为Unknown，COSMIC数据库记录47次ARID1A蛋白第1334位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型Q1334del记录31次。
p_var.variant_interpret_en: This variant is an in-frame deletion that occurs in a functionally unknown repeat region. The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.00003170(46/1451314), 0.00004604(7/152030), 0.000008162(1/122516) in the gnomADe, gnomADg, iJGVD databases, 0.0123(11/894) in the OTH population of the ExAC database, respectively, with no record in the 1000G database; this variant is reported as unknown  in the CKB database, the COSMIC database records 49 times of amino acid change at the ARID1A protein position 1334, of which the mutant Q1334del is recorded 33 times.
p_var.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为缺失突变，导致基因编码蛋白第1334位氨基酸缺失。
p_var.variant_desc_en: This variant is a deletion mutation, which deletes the 1334th amino acid in the gene-encoded protein.

p_var.variant_interpret_cn: ARID1A基因全长编码2285个氨基酸，该变异导致蛋白编码终止于第1882位氨基酸，逃逸无义介导的mRNA降解，造成超过10%的编码氨基酸丢失，影响蛋白结构功能域：SWI/SNF-like complex subunit BAF250/Osa（Pfam）。该变异在1000G、ExAC、gnomAD、iJGVD数据库无记录；CKB数据库报道为loss of function - predicted，OncoKB数据库报道为Likely Oncogenic，COSMIC数据库记录173次ARID1A蛋白第1850位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型D1850Tfs*33记录87次。
p_var.variant_interpret_en: The full-length ARID1A gene encodes 2285 amino acids, this variant leads to the premature termination of protein coding at amino acid 1882, escaping nonsense-mediated mRNA decay, resulting in the loss of more than 10% of the coding amino acids, affecting protein domain: SWI/SNF-like complex subunit BAF250/Osa(Pfam). This variant is not recorded in the 1000G, ExAC, gnomAD or iJGVD databases; this variant is reported as loss of function - predicted in the CKB database, and Likely Oncogenic in the OncoKB database, the COSMIC database records 173 times of amino acid change at the ARID1A protein position 1850, of which the mutant D1850Tfs*33 is recorded 87 times.
p_var.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为移码突变，导致基因编码蛋白第1850位氨基酸由天冬氨酸突变为苏氨酸并于1882位发生终止。
p_var.variant_desc_en: This variant is a frameshift mutation, which induces a substitution of Aspartic acid with Threonine at position 1850 and causes termination of the protein at codon 1882.

evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项临床前研究表明（PMID: 27958275），ARID1A缺陷的结直肠癌细胞系对VE-821、Berzosertib（VX-970）、AZ20三种ATR抑制剂敏感，表现为细胞存活率降低，并且在细胞系异种移植瘤模型中，Berzosertib（VX-970）可抑制携带ARID1A失活突变的肿瘤细胞生长。
一项临床前研究表明（PMID: 27958275），ARID1A缺陷的结直肠癌细胞系对VE-821、Berzosertib（VX-970）、AZ20三种ATR抑制剂敏感，表现为细胞存活率降低，并且在细胞系异种移植瘤模型中，Berzosertib（VX-970）可抑制携带ARID1A失活突变的肿瘤细胞生长。

一项临床前实验中（PMID: 35852858），EZH2抑制剂GSK-126可抑制ARID1A突变的膀胱癌细胞系的生长（包括细胞活力、细胞增殖和克隆形成），并抑制这些细胞系构建的移植瘤模型中的肿瘤生长；其他EZH2相关抑制剂CPI-1205、EPZ-6438、MAK683也有类似的效果。另外，PIK3CA抑制剂阿培利司、Pictilisib、Dactolisib等可抑制ARD1A敲除或者突变的细胞的细胞活力；并且，在几个ARID1A敲除的细胞系中，与GSK-126与Pictilisib具有协同作用。
一项临床前研究表明（PMID: 26069190），ARID1A缺陷的结直肠癌细胞系和乳腺癌细胞系对PARP抑制剂Veliparib、奥拉帕利、鲁卡帕尼、他拉唑帕利敏感，表现为细胞凋亡增加，且在这两种细胞系异种移植瘤模型中，他拉唑帕利可抑制肿瘤生长。
一项临床前实验中（PMID: 27364904），达沙替尼可抑制多种携带ARID1A突变的卵巢透明细胞癌细胞系的生长，在移植瘤模型中，也可抑制肿瘤的生长。
一项Ia期临床研究中（NCT05226507），18位晚期实体瘤患者接受了至少一种剂量的NXP800治疗，截至2023年4月，最长的治疗持续时间达到10个月，该药物的临床活性支持了早期临床前数据。2023年8月，FDA授予NXP800治疗ARID1A突变的胆管癌孤儿药资格。

一项回顾性研究中（PMID: 32111729），分析了3403位病人的数据，这些患者的肿瘤组织均有二代测序数据。在9个ARID1A发生率大于5%的癌种中，与ARID1A野生型的患者相比，ARID1A突变的患者中具有MSI-H和TMB-H的比例显著更高（20% vs 0.9%, p<0.001;26% vs 8.4%, p<0.001）。在接受检查点阻断免疫疗法后，ARID1A突变的患者（n=46）的中位PFS显著高于ARID1A野生型的患者（n=329）（11个月 vs 4个月，p=0.006），且该结果独立于MSI或TMB；另外，ARID1A突变患者的中位OS也显著高于野生型患者（31个月 vs 20个月），但是没有统计学差异。

一项回顾性研究中（PMID: 32111729），分析了3403位病人的数据，这些患者的肿瘤组织均有二代测序数据。在9个ARID1A发生率大于5%的癌种中，与ARID1A野生型的患者相比，ARID1A突变的患者中具有MSI-H和TMB-H的比例显著更高（20% vs 0.9%, p<0.001;26% vs 8.4%, p<0.001）。在接受检查点阻断免疫疗法后，ARID1A突变的患者（n=46）的中位PFS显著高于ARID1A野生型的患者（n=329）（11个月 vs 4个月，p=0.006），且该结果独立于MSI或TMB；另外，ARID1A突变患者的中位OS也显著高于野生型患者（31个月 vs 20个月），但是没有统计学差异。

一项II期临床试验（PMID: 32975815），入组39位肾细胞癌患者，其中乳头状特征的未分类肾细胞癌（uRCC）患者24例，乳头状肾细胞癌（pRCC）患者14例，乳头状特征的转座相关的RCC患者1例。在结果可评估的37位患者中，6个月PFS为78%，中位PFS为13.7个月，ORR为35%；中位随访17.6个月，中位OS为33.9个月。对其中33位患者进行NGS测序，发现ARID1A、FH、MET突变的患者具有响应。其中，100%的ARID1A患者（7/7）、91%的FH突变患者（10/11）达到6个月的无进展生存；57%的ARID1A突变患者和55%的FH突变患者有客观缓解。

一项首次人体、开放标签的I/II期临床试验（NCT04104776），旨在评估Tulmimetostat在晚期实体瘤和淋巴瘤患者中的疗效和安全性。研究招募了携带ARID1A突变的晚期实体瘤和淋巴瘤患者，这些患者在先前的治疗方案中出现了疾病进展。患者被分为6个疾病特异性队列：ARID1A突变体实体瘤（M1）、ARID1A突变体卵巢透明细胞癌（M2）、ARID1A突变体子宫内膜癌（M3）、淋巴瘤（M4）、胸膜或腹膜间皮瘤伴BAP1丢失（M5）、转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌（M6）。研究的主要终点是研究人员评估的客观缓解率（ORR）；次要终点包括无进展生存期（PFS）、缓解持续时间（DOR）、至症状缓解时间（TTR）、疾病控制率（DCR）、总生存期（OS）等。研究结果显示，在采用Simon两阶段设计的五个队列中（M4队列除外），M2、M3和M5共三个队列获得了进入第二阶段的资格。在M2中（n=14），4例最佳反应为部分缓解（PR），4例疾病稳定（SD），6例疾病进展（PD）。在M3中（n=8），2例最佳反应为完全缓解（CR），1例SD，2例PD，1例无法评估疗效，1例停止治疗。在M5中（n=21），3例最佳反应为PR，10例SD，6例PD，2例停止治疗。另外三个队列（不进入第二阶段研究）的数据如下：在M1中（n=10），1例获得未经确认的PR，3例SD，2例PD，4例停止治疗。在M4中（n=12），2例最佳反应为CR，1例最佳反应为PR，4例PD，5例停止治疗。在M6中（n=10），6例最佳缓解为SD，3例PD，1例停止治疗。基于上述研究，FDA授予Tulmimetostat（CPI-0209）快速通道资格，用于治疗携带ARID1A突变且在至少1种既往治疗中出现进展的、晚期复发性或转移性子宫内膜癌患者。
一项临床前研究表明（PMID: 26069190），ARID1A缺陷的结直肠癌细胞系和乳腺癌细胞系对PARP抑制剂Veliparib、奥拉帕利、鲁卡帕尼、他拉唑帕利敏感，表现为细胞凋亡增加，且在这两种细胞系异种移植瘤模型中，他拉唑帕利可抑制肿瘤生长。

p_var.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为错义突变，导致基因编码蛋白第42位氨基酸由精氨酸突变为谷氨酰胺。

p_var.variant_interpret_cn: CSF3R基因为原癌基因，该变异为蛋白长度改变的变异。该变异在ExAC、gnomADe数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.000008249（1/121228）、0.000001368（2/1461818），1000G、gnomADg、iJGVD数据库无记录；CKB数据库报道为loss of function - predicted，COSMIC数据库记录32次CSF3R蛋白第469位氨基酸上的变异，其中突变型S469Afs*22记录26次。
p_var.variant_interpret_en: The CSF3R gene is an oncogene, this variant causes a change in protein length. The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.000008249(1/121228), 0.000001368(2/1461818) in the ExAC, gnomADe databases, respectively, with no record in the 1000G, gnomADg or iJGVD databases; this variant is reported as loss of function - predicted  in the CKB database, the COSMIC database records 32 times of amino acid change at the CSF3R protein position 469, of which the mutant S469Afs*22 is recorded 26 times.
p_var.variant_desc_cn: 该变异为移码突变，导致基因编码蛋白第469位氨基酸由丝氨酸突变为丙氨酸并于490位发生终止。
p_var.variant_desc_en: This variant is a frameshift mutation, which induces a substitution of Serine with Alanine at position 469 and causes termination of the protein at codon 490.

p_var.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在iJGVD数据库人群等位基因频率为0.0002446（30/122652），ExAC、gnomADe、gnomADg数据库EAS人群等位基因频率分别为0.001276（11/8624）、0.0008914（35/39262）、0.001737（9/5180），1000G数据库EAS_CHS人群等位基因频率为0.009524（2/210）；Cancer Hotspots、COSMIC数据库无记录。基于整合预测工具REVEL认为该变异为neutral，剪接预测软件SpliceAI认为该变异不影响剪接。
p_var.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.0002446(30/122652) in the iJGVD database, 0.001276(11/8624), 0.0008914(35/39262), 0.001737(9/5180) in the EAS population of the ExAC, gnomADe, gnomADg databases, 0.009524(2/210) in the EAS_CHS population of the 1000G database, respectively; the Cancer Hotspots database and the COSMIC database have no record for this variant. Based on the ensemble prediction tool REVEL, this variant is considered neural, based on the splice prediction tool SpliceAI, this variant may not affect splicing.

p_var.variant_interpret_cn: 该变异在gnomADe、gnomADg数据库人群等位基因频率分别为0.001006（1471/1461884）、0.001054（160/151822）；ClinVar数据库报道该变异（ID=41632）的胚系突变分类为Benign（可靠度为三颗星）。研究通过胞外错配修复活性分析实验证明该变异不影响基因正常功能（in vitro MMR activity:64.8%, relative MLH1 expression:>75%, definition:MMR+）（PMID: 17510385）。基于该变异的HCI致病性先验概率认为该变异为disease-causing。
p_var.variant_interpret_en: The allele frequencies of this variant are 0.001006(1471/1461884), 0.001054(160/151822) in the gnomADe, gnomADg databases, respectively; the record of this variant in the ClinVar database (ID=41632) is Benign in germline classification (review status: three stars). This variant was shown not to affect normal gene function in CIMRA (in vitro MMR activity:64.8%, relative MLH1 expression:>75%, definition:MMR+) (PMID: 17510385). Based on HCI prior probability for pathogenicity, the variant is considered disease-causing.

evi_sum.evi_interpretation: NCCN子宫肿瘤指南（2024 Version 2）推荐奥拉帕利、鲁卡帕尼、尼拉帕利用于BRCA突变的晚期复发/转移或不能手术的子宫平滑肌肉瘤（LMS）患者的二线或后线治疗。
临床前研究表明（2024 AACR, Abstract 670），LAE120有效抑制BRCA突变的MDA-MB-436乳腺癌细胞的增殖，并且在BRCA突变的MDA-MB-436细胞异种移植模型中，LAE120显示出强大的单药肿瘤抑制活性和良好的剂量依赖性响应，LAE120联合奥拉帕利在低剂量下具有更强、更持久的抗肿瘤疗效。
临床前研究表明（2024 AACR, Abstract 670），LAE120有效抑制BRCA突变的MDA-MB-436乳腺癌细胞的增殖，并且在BRCA突变的MDA-MB-436细胞异种移植模型中，LAE120显示出强大的单药肿瘤抑制活性和良好的剂量依赖性响应，LAE120联合奥拉帕利在低剂量下具有更强、更持久的抗肿瘤疗效。
乳腺癌NCCN指南（2025. v4）指出，在特定情况下，推荐奥拉帕利用于治疗携带体细胞BRCA1/2基因突变的转移性乳腺癌患者（等级2B）。

evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗用于一线铂类为基础的化疗完全或部分缓解的、HRD阳性的晚期卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者的治疗，其中HRD阳性定义为携带BRCA有害或疑似有害突变或基因组不稳定。
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_en:
FDA approved Olaparib in combination with bevacizumab for the maintenance treatment of adult patients with advanced epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube or primary 
peritoneal cancer who are in complete or partial response to first-line platinum-based chemotherapy and whose cancer is associated with homologous recombination deficiency (HRD)-positive status defined by either: a deleterious or suspected deleterious BRCA mutation, and/or genomic instability.
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机、双盲、安慰剂对照、多中心的III 期临床试验（PAOLA-1, NCT03737643），入组806例经一线含铂化疗和贝伐珠单抗治疗后达到完全缓解或部分缓解的晚期高级别上皮性卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌患者。患者按照2:1比例随机接受每日两次口服奥拉帕利（300mg）联合贝伐珠单抗（537例）或安慰剂联合贝伐珠单抗（269例）治疗，研究主要终点为无进展生存期（PFS），次要终点为总生存期（OS）。研究结果显示，奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗治疗组对比安慰剂联合贝伐珠单抗治疗组的中位PFS分别为22.1 个月 和16.6 个月（HR 0.59; 95% CI: 0.49-0.72;p<0.0001）；同时，研究者对入组患者的HRD及tBRCAm进行了检测并分组分析，结果显示，对于HRD阳性患者，经奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗治疗后PFS显著高于安慰剂组（28.1 个月 vs 16.6个月），tBRCA阳性患者经奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗治疗后PFS同样显著高于安慰剂组（37.2 个月 vs 21.7 个月），而HRD和tBRCA同时阳性的患者PFS获益最为明显（37.2 个月 vs 17.7个月）。基于上述研究，FDA批准奥拉帕利联合贝伐珠单抗用于一线铂类为基础的化疗完全或部分缓解的、HRD阳性的晚期卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌成人患者的治疗，其中HRD阳性定义为携带BRCA有害或疑似有害突变或基因组不稳定。

evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准氟唑帕利单药或联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼用于新辅助、辅助或转移阶段接受过化疗治疗的伴有胚系BRCA突变（gBRCAm）的人表皮生长因子受体（HER2）阴性转移性乳腺癌成年患者。激素受体（HR）阳性乳腺癌患者既往需接受过内分泌治疗或被认为不适合接受内分泌治疗。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机对照、开放、多中心的III期临床试验（FZPL-III-303, NCTO4296370），截至2023年12月15日，共入组203例伴有gBRCA1/2突变的HER2阴性转移性乳腺癌患者，其中201例纳入意向性治疗集（ITT），按1∶1∶1比例随机分配至氟唑帕利联合阿帕替尼（n=69）、氟唑帕利（n=67）或标准化疗方案（n=65）进行治疗。入组的患者既往均接受过蔥环类和/或紫杉类治疗，且在复发转移阶段接受至多2线系统化疗。对于激素受体阳性乳腺癌患者，既往均接受过至少一线内分泌治疗或不适合接受内分泌治疗。研究的主要终点为由盲态独立影像评审委员会（BICR）根据RECIST v1.1评估的无进展生存期（PFS），次要终点为根据研究者评估的无进展生存期（PFS）、客观缓解率（ORR）、疾病控制率（DCR）以及总生存期（OS）等。研究结果显示：BIRC评估的中位PFS在氟唑帕利联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼组、氟唑帕利单药组以及研究者选择化疗组分别为11.0个月、6.7个月和2.8个月，客观缓解率（ORR）分别为66.7%、43.6%及21.4%，疾病控制率（DCR）分别为87.0%、80.6%和46.2%。基于以上研究，NMPA批准氟唑帕利单药或联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼用于新辅助、辅助或转移阶段接受过化疗治疗的伴有胚系BRCA突变（gBRCAm）的人表皮生长因子受体（HER2）阴性转移性乳腺癌成年患者。激素受体（HR）阳性乳腺癌患者既往需接受过内分泌治疗或被认为不适合接受内分泌治疗。

evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准帕米帕利用于既往经过二线及以上化疗的伴有胚系BRCA（gBRCA）突变的复发性晚期卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌患者的治疗。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项多中心、开放标签I/II期临床试验（NCT03333915）的II期临床部分，入组113例既往接受过至少两项标准化疗、携有胚系BRCA1/2突变的高级别上皮性卵巢癌（包括输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌）或高级别子宫内膜上皮样癌中国患者，其中包括90例晚期铂敏感卵巢癌患者（队列1）和23例晚期铂耐药卵巢癌患者（队列2）。患者接受帕米帕利每日两次口服用药、每次60 mg的治疗，试验的主要终点为客观缓解率（ORR）。在101例疗效可评估患者中，队列1中的铂敏感卵巢癌患者的中位随访时间为17.0个月，ORR为68.3%，中位缓解持续时间（DOR）为13.8个月；队列2中的铂耐药卵巢癌患者的中位随访时间为11.6个月，ORR为31.6%，中位DOR为11.1个月。基于上述研究，NMPA附条件批准帕米帕利用于治疗既往经过二线及以上化疗、伴有胚系BRCA（gBRCA）突变的复发性晚期卵巢癌、输卵管癌或原发性腹膜癌患者的治疗。

evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准他拉唑帕利用于携带BRCA胚系有害或疑似有害突变（gBRCAm）的HER2阴性的局部晚期或转移性乳腺癌成人患者的治疗。
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_en: FDA approved Talazoparib for the treatment of adult patients with deleterious or suspected deleterious germline BRCA-mutated (gBRCAm) HER2-negative locally advanced or metastatic breast cancer.
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机、开放标签、双臂、多中心的III期临床试验（EMBRACA, NCT01945775），入组431名携带BRCA1/2胚系突变的局部晚期或转移性HER2阴性乳腺癌患者，患者既往接受过细胞毒性化疗方案不超过3种。患者被随机（2:1）分为2组，试验组（287例）接受他拉唑帕利（1 mg）治疗，对照组（144例）接受医疗机构选择的化疗（卡培他滨、艾立布林、吉西他滨或长春瑞滨）。研究结果显示，他拉唑帕利治疗组的无进展生存期（PFS）和客观缓解率（ORR）获益显著高于化疗组，两组的中位PFS和ORR分别为8.6个月 vs 5.6个月和50.1% vs 18.4%。基于上述研究，FDA批准他拉唑帕利用于携带BRCA胚系有害或疑似有害突变（gBRCAm）的HER2阴性的局部晚期或转移性乳腺癌患者的治疗。
NCCN子宫肿瘤指南（2024 Version 2）推荐奥拉帕利、鲁卡帕尼、尼拉帕利用于BRCA突变的晚期复发/转移或不能手术的子宫平滑肌肉瘤（LMS）患者的二线或后线治疗。

一项多中心1/2期临床试验（PETRA），评估Saruparib在306名经治HRR缺陷型乳腺、卵巢、胰腺或前列腺癌患者中的安全性、耐受性和有效性。患者的肿瘤在HRR相关基因中出现突变，包括：BRCA1、BRCA2、PALB2、RAD51C或RAD51D。数据显示，在接受60mg Saruparib治疗的31名乳腺癌患者中，客观缓解率（ORR）为48.4%，中位缓解持续时间（mDOR）为7.3个月，中位无进展生存期（PFS）为9.1个月。

evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准氟唑帕利单药或联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼用于新辅助、辅助或转移阶段接受过化疗治疗的伴有胚系BRCA突变（gBRCAm）的人表皮生长因子受体（HER2）阴性转移性乳腺癌成年患者。激素受体（HR）阳性乳腺癌患者既往需接受过内分泌治疗或被认为不适合接受内分泌治疗。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机对照、开放、多中心的III期临床试验（FZPL-III-303, NCTO4296370），截至2023年12月15日，共入组203例伴有gBRCA1/2突变的HER2阴性转移性乳腺癌患者，其中201例纳入意向性治疗集（ITT），按1∶1∶1比例随机分配至氟唑帕利联合阿帕替尼（n=69）、氟唑帕利（n=67）或标准化疗方案（n=65）进行治疗。入组的患者既往均接受过蔥环类和/或紫杉类治疗，且在复发转移阶段接受至多2线系统化疗。对于激素受体阳性乳腺癌患者，既往均接受过至少一线内分泌治疗或不适合接受内分泌治疗。研究的主要终点为由盲态独立影像评审委员会（BICR）根据RECIST v1.1评估的无进展生存期（PFS），次要终点为根据研究者评估的无进展生存期（PFS）、客观缓解率（ORR）、疾病控制率（DCR）以及总生存期（OS）等。研究结果显示：BIRC评估的中位PFS在氟唑帕利联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼组、氟唑帕利单药组以及研究者选择化疗组分别为11.0个月、6.7个月和2.8个月，客观缓解率（ORR）分别为66.7%、43.6%及21.4%，疾病控制率（DCR）分别为87.0%、80.6%和46.2%。基于以上研究，NMPA批准氟唑帕利单药或联合甲磺酸阿帕替尼用于新辅助、辅助或转移阶段接受过化疗治疗的伴有胚系BRCA突变（gBRCAm）的人表皮生长因子受体（HER2）阴性转移性乳腺癌成年患者。激素受体（HR）阳性乳腺癌患者既往需接受过内分泌治疗或被认为不适合接受内分泌治疗。

evi_sum.regimen_name: 尼拉帕利阿比特龙片+泼尼松龙
evi_sum.tumor_name_cn: 转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准尼拉帕利阿比特龙片联合泼尼松或泼尼松龙用于携带胚系和/或体系 BRCA基因突变的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌成人患者（mCRPC）。
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_en: The NMPA has approved Niraparib and Abiraterone Acetate Tablets in combination with prednisone or prednisolone for adult patients with metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer (mCRPC) who harbor germline and/or somatic BRCA gene mutations.
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机双盲、安慰剂对照的、多中心、多队列、III期临床试验（MAGNITUDE，NCT03748641），入组423例携带HRR相关基因变异（mHRR）的转移性趋势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）患者，随机（1:1）接受了尼拉帕利200 mg和阿比特龙1000 mg（AKEEGA组，N＝212）或安慰剂和阿比特龙（N＝211）给药，时间持续至出现不可耐受的毒性或疾病进展。所有患者均接受了泼尼松或泼尼松龙10mg/天和 GnRH类似物治疗或既往接受过双侧睾丸切除术。在纳入的423例患者中，225例（53%）有BRCA基因突变（BRCAm）。主要疗效指标是BICR评估得到的放射学无进展生存期（rPFS）、其他疗效指标包括总生存期（OS）。研究结果显示，在BRCAm和意向治疗（ITT）人群中观察到AKEEGA组与安慰剂组相比rPFS有统计学显著改善，BRCAm亚组中两组的PFS风险比为0.53，中位rPFS分别为16.6个月和10.9个月。在BRCAm患者亚组的探索性OS分析中，AKEEGA组与安慰剂组的中位OS分别为30.4个月和28.6个月， OS风险比为0.79。基于上述研究，NMPA批准尼拉帕利阿比特龙片联合泼尼松或泼尼松龙用于治疗携带胚系和/或体系BRCA基因突变的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌成人患者（mCRPC）。

evi_sum.regimen_name: 尼拉帕利阿比特龙片+泼尼松
evi_sum.tumor_name_cn: 转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准尼拉帕利阿比特龙片联合泼尼松或泼尼松龙用于携带胚系和/或体系 BRCA基因突变的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌成人患者（mCRPC）。
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_en: The NMPA has approved Niraparib and Abiraterone Acetate Tablets in combination with prednisone or prednisolone for adult patients with metastatic castration-resistant prostate cancer (mCRPC) who harbor germline and/or somatic BRCA gene mutations.
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机双盲、安慰剂对照的、多中心、多队列、III期临床试验（MAGNITUDE，NCT03748641），入组423例携带HRR相关基因变异（mHRR）的转移性趋势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）患者，随机（1:1）接受了尼拉帕利200 mg和阿比特龙1000 mg（AKEEGA组，N＝212）或安慰剂和阿比特龙（N＝211）给药，时间持续至出现不可耐受的毒性或疾病进展。所有患者均接受了泼尼松或泼尼松龙10mg/天和 GnRH类似物治疗或既往接受过双侧睾丸切除术。在纳入的423例患者中，225例（53%）有BRCA基因突变（BRCAm）。主要疗效指标是BICR评估得到的放射学无进展生存期（rPFS）、其他疗效指标包括总生存期（OS）。研究结果显示，在BRCAm和意向治疗（ITT）人群中观察到AKEEGA组与安慰剂组相比rPFS有统计学显著改善，BRCAm亚组中两组的PFS风险比为0.53，中位rPFS分别为16.6个月和10.9个月。在BRCAm患者亚组的探索性OS分析中，AKEEGA组与安慰剂组的中位OS分别为30.4个月和28.6个月， OS风险比为0.79。基于上述研究，NMPA批准尼拉帕利阿比特龙片联合泼尼松或泼尼松龙用于治疗携带胚系和/或体系BRCA基因突变的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌成人患者（mCRPC）。

evi_sum.tumor_name_cn: 转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: NMPA批准他拉唑帕利联合恩扎卢胺治疗同源重组修复(HRR)基因突变的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌(mCRPC)成人患者。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机、双盲、安慰剂对照、多队列III期临床试验（TALAPRO-2, NCT03395197），评估了他拉唑帕利与恩扎卢胺联合治疗同源重组修复（HRR）基因突变的转移性、去势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）患者的疗效。研究纳入399例mCRPC患者，按1:1的比例随机接受恩扎卢胺联合他拉唑帕利或安慰剂给药，直至出现不可接受的毒性或疾病进展，要求患者至少携带直接或间接涉及HRR通路的12个基因（ATM、ATR、BRCA1、BRCA2、CDK12、 CHEK2、FANCA、MLH1、MRE11A（MRE11）、NBN、PALB2、RAD51C）中的至少1个突变基因。主要疗效指标是由盲法独立中心评审（BICR）根据RECIST 1.1和前列腺癌工作组（PCWG3）（针对骨骼）标准评估的影像学无进展生存期（rPFS），另一个疗效指标是总生存期（OS）。在HRR基因突变人群中，与安慰剂+恩扎卢胺组相比，他拉唑帕利+恩扎卢胺组的rPFS有统计学上的显著改善，他拉唑帕利+恩扎卢胺组 vs 安慰剂+恩扎卢胺组的中位rPFS：未达到 vs 13.8个月（HR 0.45; 95% CI: 0.33, 0.61; p<0.0001）。在rPFS分析时，OS 数据尚未成熟（观察到24%的死亡事件）。按BRCA突变状态进行的探索性rPFS分析显示，BRCA突变组的HR为0.20（95% CI: 0.11, 0.36），非BRCA基因突变组的HR为0.72（95% CI: 0.49,1.07）。基于上述研究，NMPA批准他拉唑帕利联合恩扎卢胺治疗同源重组修复(HRR)基因突变的转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌(mCRPC)成人患者。

evi_sum.regimen_name: 奥拉帕利+醋酸阿比特龙+泼尼松
evi_sum.tumor_name_cn: 转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌
evi_sum.evi_adaptation_disease_cn: FDA批准奥拉帕利与阿比特龙和泼尼松（或泼尼松龙）联合用于有害或疑似有害BRCA突变（BRCAm）转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）成人患者。
evi_sum.evi_interpretation: 一项随机、双盲、安慰剂对照的多中心III期临床试验（PROpel; NCT03732820），入组了796名mCRPC患者，患者被随机分配（1：1）接受奥拉帕利联合阿比特龙或安慰剂联合阿比特龙，并且所有患者还接受泼尼松或泼尼松龙治疗。BRCA基因突变(BRCAm)状态在随机分组后、初步分析前对ctDNA或组织样本进行测定。主要疗效终点指标为研究者评估的放射学无进展生存期（rPFS），其他疗效终点指标包括总生存期（OS）。在接受检测的796名患者中，85名患者（11%）检测出BRCAm。研究结果显示，在意向治疗（ITT）人群中，观察到与安慰剂联合阿比特龙相比，奥拉帕利联合阿比特龙的rPFS出现统计学显著改善。85例（11% ITT人群）BRCAm患者的探索性亚组分析显示，奥拉帕利+阿比特龙组 vs 安慰剂+阿比特龙组中位rPFS分别为NR vs 8个月（风险比[HR]=0.24），中位OS分别为NR vs 23个月（HR=0.30）。711例（89% ITT人群）无BRCAm的患者中，rPFS HR为0.77，OS HR为0.92，表明在ITT人群中观察到的rPFS改善主要归因于BRCAm患者。基于以上研究，FDA批准奥拉帕利与阿比特龙和泼尼松（或泼尼松龙）联合用于有害或疑似有害BRCA突变（BRCAm）转移性去势抵抗性前列腺癌（mCRPC）成人患者。

evi_sum.regimen_name: 奥拉帕利+醋酸阿比特龙+泼尼松龙
